hausa: A ranar Litinin, masana kimiyya daga Kwalejin Kimiyya ta Jami'ar Stanford suka sanar da ƙirƙirar sabon kayan aikin bincike wanda zai iya rarraba ƙwayoyin hallita ta nau'i: ƙaramin cip na bugu wanda za'a iya ƙerawa ta yin amfani da ingantacciyar firintar inkjet mai yiwuwar a kan kusan cent ɗaya na Amurka kowannensu.
english: On Monday, scientists from the Stanford University School of Medicine announced the invention of a new diagnostic tool that can sort cells by type: a tiny printable chip that can be manufactured using standard inkjet printers for possibly about one U.S. cent each.

hausa: Manyan masu bincike sun ce wannan na iya sa a gano ciwon daji, tarin fuka, ƙanjamau da zazzaɓin cizon sauro da wuri ga marasa lafiya a ƙasashe masu ƙarancin kuɗaɗen shiga, inda adadin warkewa na cututtuka kamar sankarar nono zai iya kasancewa rabin na ƙasashe masu arziƙi.
english: Lead researchers say this may bring early detection of cancer, tuberculosis, HIV and malaria to patients in low-income countries, where the survival rates for illnesses such as breast cancer can be half those of richer countries.

hausa: Jirgin JAS 39C Gripen ya faɗo a kan hanyar jirgi da misalin karfe 9:30 na safe lokacin ƙasa (UTC 0230) kuma ya fashe, wanda ya haddasa rufe filin jirgin saman wa jiragen kasuwanci.
english: The JAS 39C Gripen crashed onto a runway at around 9:30 am local time (0230 UTC) and exploded, closing the airport to commercial flights.

hausa: An gano cewa matukin jirgin shine Shugaban Rundunar Sojoji Dilokrit Pattavee.
english: The pilot was identified as Squadron Leader Dilokrit Pattavee.

hausa: Kafofin watsa labarai na cikin gida sun ce wata motar kashe gobara ta mirgina yayin da take mai da martani.
english: Local media reports an airport fire vehicle rolled over while responding.

hausa: Vidal dan shekara 28 ya koma Barcelona a kakar wasanni ukun da suka wuce, daga Sevilla.
english: 28-year-old Vidal had joined Barça three seasons ago, from Sevilla.

hausa: Tun komawarsa birnin tarayyar Catalan, Vidal ya buga wasanni 49 wa ƙungiyar.
english: Since moving to the Catalan-capital, Vidal had played 49 games for the club.

hausa: Zanga-zangar ta fara ne misalin ƙarfe 11:00 agogon gida (UTC+1) a Whitehall mai kallon ƙofar shiga da ƴan sanda ke gadi zuwa Layin Downing, gurin zaman Firam minister na hukuma.
english: The protest started around 11:00 local time (UTC+1) on Whitehall opposite the police-guarded entrance to Downing Street, the Prime Minister's official residence.

hausa: Jim kadan bayan ƙarfe 11:00, masu zanga-zangar sun hana zirga-zirgar ababen hawa a kan motar da ta tasanma arewa a Whitehall.
english: Just after 11:00, protesters blocked traffic on the northbound carriage in Whitehall.

hausa: Wajen karfe 11:20 sai yan sandan su ka umarci masu zanga zangar su koma gefen titi saboda kada su shiga haƙƙin ababen hawa da ke zirga zirga a kan titin.
english: At 11:20, the police asked the protesters to move back on to the pavement, stating that they needed to balance the right to protest with the traffic building up.

hausa: Wajen 11:29, zanga-zangar ta koma Whitehall, gaba da dandalin Trafalgar, a wajajen teku, gittawa ta Aldwych sai kuma ta saman Kingsway zuwa Holborn inda jam'iyyar zaman dako ke gudanar da taron bazararsu a ɗakin otal ɗin Grand Connaught.
english: Around 11:29, the protest moved up Whitehall, past Trafalgar Square, along the Strand, passing by Aldwych and up Kingsway towards Holborn where the Conservative Party were holding their Spring Forum in the Grand Connaught Rooms hotel.

hausa: Sakamakon nasarar kai da kai na Nadal a kan ɗan kanada 7–2.
english: Nadal's head to head record against the Canadian is 7–2.

hausa: Kwanan nan ya sha kayi a hannun Raonic a Brisbane Open.
english: He recently lost against Raonic in the Brisbane Open.

hausa: Nadal ya sami makuna 88% a wasan da yake cin makuna 76 a karo na farko.
english: Nadal bagged 88% net points in the match winning 76 points in the first serve.

hausa: Bayan wasan, King of Clay ya ce, "Kawai ina farin ciki akan dawowa cikin zangon ƙarshe na mafi muhimmanci a cikin wasannin. Ina nan ne don ƙoƙarin yin nasarar wannan.
english: After the match, King of Clay said, "I am just excited about being back in the final rounds of the most important events. I am here to try to win this."

hausa: “Panama Papers” wata gamayyar kalma ce wadda ta ƙunshi takardu sama da miliyan goma na wani kamfanin lauyoyi na Panama, Mossack Fonseca, da aka tseguntawa ƴan jarida a shekarar 2016.
english: "Panama Papers" is an umbrella term for roughly ten million documents from Panamanian law firm Mossack Fonseca, leaked to the press in spring 2016.

hausa: Rubutattun hujjoji sun nuna cewa bankuna sha hudu ne su ka taimakawa abokan hurdarsu masu ƙarfin arziƙi don ɓoye dukiyoyi na biliyoyin dalolin Amurka don gujewa biyan haraji da sauran dokoki.
english: The documents showed fourteen banks helped wealthy clients hide billions of US dollars of wealth to avoid taxes and other regulations.

hausa: Jaridar The Guardian ta Birtaniya ta nuna cewa Bankin Deutsche ne yake tafiyar da aƙalla ɗaya bisa uku na kaso 1200 na kamfanonin Shell da aka yi amfani da su wajen cimma wannan.
english: British newspaper The Guardian suggested Deutsche Bank controlled roughly a third of the 1200 shell companies used to accomplish this.

hausa: An yi zanga-zanga a duk duniya, gurfanarwa na masu laifuka daban-daban, da shugabannin gwamnatocin Iceland da Pakistan duk sun sauka.
english: There were protests worldwide, several criminal prosecutions, and the leaders of the governments of Iceland and Pakistan both resigned.

hausa: An haife shi a Hong Kong, Ma ya yi karatu a Jami'ar New York da Makarantar Koyon Aikin Shari’a ta Harvard kuma ya taɓa riƙe katin zama a Amurka na dindindin “Green card”.
english: Born in Hong Kong, Ma studied at New York University and Harvard Law School and once held an American permanent resident "green card".

hausa: Hsieh ya yi nuni a lokacin zaben cewa Ma na iya tserewa daga ƙasar yayin rikici.
english: Hsieh implied during the election that Ma might flee the country during a time of crisis.

hausa: Hsieh kuma ya bayar da hujjar cewa Ma mai kyau a hoto ya fi salo amman bashi da amfani.
english: Hsieh also argued that the photogenic Ma was more style than substance.

hausa: Duk da wadannan zarge-zargen, Ma yayi nasara da kyau a kan aiki a shafin da yake ta kiran a samu alaƙa ta kusa da cikin ƙasar China.
english: Despite these accusations, Ma won handily on a platform advocating closer ties with the Chinese mainland.

hausa: Yau ɗan wasan da yafi nuna ƙwazo shi ne Alex Ovechkin na Washinton Capitals.
english: Today's Player of the Day is Alex Ovechkin of the Washington Capitals.

hausa: Ya ci ƙwallaye 2 da kuma 2 da ya taimaka aka ci a nasarar wasan Washington 5-3 akan Atlanta Thrashers.
english: He had 2 goals and 2 assists in Washington's 5-3 win over the Atlanta Thrashers.

hausa: Taimakon Ovechkin na farko a daren ta kasance sanadiyar lashe wasa ta rookie Nicklas Backstrom;
english: Ovechkin's first assist of the night was on the game-winning goal by rookie Nicklas Backstrom;

hausa: ƙwallo na biyu da ya shigar a daren shi ne na 60 a kakar wasanni, haka nan ya zama ɗan wasa na farko da ya shigar da ƙwallaye 60 ko fiye da haka a cikin kakar wasanni tun daga 1995-96, a lokacin da Jaromir Jagr da Mario Lemieux kowanensu ya kai wancan matakin.
english: his second goal of the night was his 60th of the season, becoming the first player to score 60 or more goals in a season since 1995-96, when Jaromir Jagr and Mario Lemieux each reached that milestone.

hausa: An bai wa Batten matsayi na 190 a jerin sunayen Ƴan Amurka 400 mafi kuɗi a shekarar 2008 inda aka ƙiyasta dukiyarsa ta kai biliyan $2.3.
english: Batten was ranked 190th on the 2008 400 Richest Americans list with an estimated fortune of $2.3 billion.

hausa: Ya kammala karatun sa daga Kwalejin Zane da kimiya na Jami’ar Virginia a 1950 kuma yana daga cikin manyan masu taimakawa cibiyar.
english: He graduated from the College of Arts & Sciences of the University of Virginia in 1950 and was a significant donor to that institution.

hausa: An saka wa kurkukun Abu Ghraib na Iraq wuta lokacin hargitsi.
english: Iraq's Abu Ghraib prison has been set alight during a riot.

hausa: Kurkukun ta yi ƙaurin suna bayan an gano cin zarafin fursunoni da ake yi a can bayan dakarun Amurka sun karɓi iko.
english: The jail became notorious after prisoner abuse was discovered there after US forces took over.

hausa: Piquet Jr. ya faɗi a gasar Grand Prix ta 2008 a Singapore jim kaɗan bayan dakatawar wucin-gadi ta wuri da aka yi wa Fernando Alonso, inda aka fito da motar agaji.
english: Piquet Jr. crashed in the 2008 Singapore Grand Prix just after an early pit stop for Fernando Alonso, bringing out the safety car.

hausa: Yayin da motocin da ke gaban Alonso suka shiga don shan mai a mota mai ba da kariya, sai ya matsa sama don samun nasara.
english: As the cars ahead of Alonso went in for fuel under the safety car, he moved up the pack to take victory.

hausa: An kori Piquet Jr. bayan gasar Hungarian Grand Prix ta 2009.
english: Piquet Jr. was sacked after the 2009 Hungarian Grand Prix.

hausa: Daidai ƙarfe 8:46 na safe, wani yanayin shuru ya faɗo a cikin birnin, yana nuna alamar daidai lokacin da jirgin farkon ya faɗa gurin da yake hari.
english: At exactly 8:46 a.m. a hush fell across the city, marking the exact moment the first jet struck its target.

hausa: An kunna katako biyu na haske don fuskantar sama a cikin daren.
english: Two beams of light have been rigged up to point skywards overnight.

hausa: Aiki yana cigaba da gudana na gina sababbin dogayen benaye biyar a wurin, tare da cibiyar sufuri da kuma wurin shaƙatawa na tuna mamaci a tsakiya.
english: Construction is ongoing for five new skyscrapers at the site, with a transportation center and memorial park in the middle.

hausa: Shirin PBS ya ci lambobin yabo kimanin dozin biyu na Emmy, ya kuma kasance kawai a bayan shirin Sesame Street da Shirin Mister Rogers Neighborhood wajen dadewa ana yinsa.
english: The PBS show has more than two-dozen Emmy awards, and its run is shorter only than Sesame Street and Mister Rogers' Neighborhood.

hausa: Kowane aukuwar shirin zai mayar da hankali kan wani jigon wani littafi na musamman sannan zata bincika jigon ta hanyan labarai masu yawa.
english: Each episode of the show would focus on a theme in a specific book and then explore that theme through multiple stories.

hausa: Kowane shirin zai ba da shawarwarin littattafai wanda ya kamata yara su nema idan sun je ɗakin karatu.
english: Each show would also provide recommendations for books that children should look for when they went to their library.

hausa: John Grant, daga WNED Buffalo (Reading Rainbow's home station) ya ce “Karanta Rainbow ya koya wa yara dalilin karatu,...son karatu - [wasan kwaikwayo] yana ƙarfafa wa yara gwiwa su ɗauki littafi su karanta.”
english: John Grant, from WNED Buffalo (Reading Rainbow's home station) said "Reading Rainbow taught kids why to read,... the love of reading — [the show] encouraged kids to pick up a book and to read."

hausa: Yawanci sun gaskanta, tare da John Grant, cewa bada kuɗi da matsawa a fasaha na shirye-shiryen talabijin ya taimaka don gama shirin mai dogon zangon.
english: It is believed by some, including John Grant, that both the funding crunch and a shift in the philosophy of educational television programming contributed to ending the series.

hausa: Guguwar tana nisan kimanin mil 645 (kilomita 1040) a yamma da tsibirin Cape Verde, ana tsammanin za ta washe kafin ta kai doron ƙasa inji masu hasashen yanayi.
english: The storm, situated about 645 miles (1040 km) west of the Cape Verde islands, is likely to dissipate before threatening any land areas, forecasters say.

hausa: A halin yanzu guguwar Fred na da iskar mil 105 cikin awa guda (165 km/h) kuma ta doshi arewa-maso-yamma.
english: Fred currently has winds of 105 miles per hour (165 km/h) and is moving towards the northwest.

hausa: Guguwar Fred ita ce guguwar teku mafi ƙarfi da aka taɓa gani a kudu da gabas a Atlantic tun sanda aka fara amfani da tauraron Ɗan Adam, kuma ita ce kawai guguwa babba ta uku wadda ake da bayananta da ta faru a gabashin 35°W.
english: Fred is the strongest tropical cyclone ever recorded so far south and east in the Atlantic since the advent of satellite imagery, and only the third major hurricane on record east of 35°W.

hausa: Ranar 24 ga Satumba, 1759, Arthur Guinness ya sanya hannu kan yarjejeniyar hayar shekara 9,000 da kamfanin Barasa na St Jame’s Gate da ke Dublin a kasar Ireland.
english: On September 24, 1759, Arthur Guinness signed a 9,000 year lease for the St James' Gate Brewery in Dublin, Ireland.

hausa: Bayan shekaru 250, Guinness ya bunƙasa zuwa wani kasuwancin duniya da ke samun sama da biliyan 10 na euro (US$14.7 biliyan) kowace shekara.
english: 250 years later, Guinness has grown to a global business that turns over 10 billion euros (US$14.7 billion) every year.

hausa: Jonny Reid, direba ne na kungiyar A1GP New Zealand, a yau ya kafa tarihi da yayi tuƙi mafi gudu a kan gadar Aukland Harbor mai shekaru 48, New Zealand, wanda bai keta doka ba.
english: Jonny Reid, co-driver for the A1GP New Zealand team, today made history by driving the fastest over the 48-year-old Auckland Harbour Bridge, New Zealand, legally.

hausa: Mista Reid ya yi ƙoƙarin tuƙa motar A1GP, Black Beauty ta New Zealand, a gudu na sama da 160km / h sau bakwai a bisa gadar.
english: Mr Reid managed to drive the New Zealand's A1GP car, Black Beauty at speeds over 160km/h seven times over the bridge.

hausa: Ƴan sandan New Zealand sun sami matsalar yin amfani da bindigoginsu na radar masu sauri don gane irin gudun da Mr Reid ya ke yi, saboda yanda Black Beauty take da gajarta, kuma lokaci ɗaya da ƴan sandan suka yi nasarar auna gudun Mr Reid shine lokacin da ya rage gudu zuwa 160km / h.
english: The New Zealand police had trouble using their speed radar guns to see how fast Mr Reid was going because of how low Black Beauty is, and the only time the police managed to clock Mr Reid was when he slowed down to 160km/h.

hausa: A cikin watanni 3 da suka gabata, fiye da mutane 80 a ka saka daga babban wajen tsare mutane ba tare da an gurfanar da su gaban kotu ba.
english: In the last 3 months, over 80 arrestees were released from the Central Booking facility without being formally charged.

hausa: A cikin watan Afrilun bana, Alkali Glynn ya ba da doka marar ɗorewa ta hana fita akan yunƙurin tilasta sakin wadanda aka tsare fiye da awanni 24 bayan ɗaukan su wanda kwamishinan kotu bai saurari tuhumar su ba.
english: In April this year, a temporary restaining order was issued by Judge Glynn against the facility to enforce the release of those held more than 24 hours after their intake who did not receive a hearing by a court commissioner.

hausa: Kwamishinan zai bayar da beli, idan an yarda, sai jami’in da ya yi kamun ya shigar da tuhumar. Sannan sai a saka cajin tuhumar cikin kwamfutar jihar yadda za’a iya bin shari’ar.
english: The commissioner sets bail, if granted, and formalizes the charges filed by the arresting officer. The charges are then entered into the state's computer system where the case is tracked.

hausa: Sauraren ƙarar haka kuma ya tabbatar da ranar da haƙƙin wanda ake zargi, na samun shari’a cikin gaggawa.
english: The hearing also marks the date for the suspect’s right to a speedy trial.

hausa: Peter Costello, ma'ajin Australia kuma mutumin da ake ganin zai gaji Minista John Howard a matsayin shugaban jam'iyyar 'yantattu ya bada goyan bayan sa ga masana'antar nukiliya a Australia.
english: Peter Costello, Australian treasurer and the man most likely to succeed Prime Minister John Howard as Liberal party leader has thrown his support behind a nuclear power industry in Australia.

hausa: Mista Costello ya ce lokacin da ƙarfin nukiliya ta zama mai amfani da tattalin arziƙi, ya kamata Australia ta ci gaba da amfani da ita.
english: Mr Costello said that when nuclear power generation becomes economically viable, Australia should pursue its use.

hausa: “Idan har abin ya zama na kasuwanci, to ya kamata mu same shi. Shi ne, babu wata ƙa’idar nuna rashin amincewa da makamashin nukiliya,” inji Mista Costello.
english: "If it becomes commercial, we should have it. That is, there's no in-principle objection to nuclear energy" Mr Costello said.

hausa: A cewar Ansa, “ ƴan sanda sun damu da wasu manyan matakan bugu wanda suke tsoro na iya tasar da babban yaƙi na gadon muƙami.
english: According to Ansa, "police were concerned by a couple of top-level hits they feared might spark a full-blown war of succession.

hausa: Ƴan sanda sun ce Lo Piccolo yana da babban matsayi saboda shine na hanun damar Provenzano a Palermo kuma mafi girman kwarewanshi ya ba shi girmamawa daga shuwagabannin manyan dattawa yadda suka fuskanci dokar Provenzo na ajiya mafi ƙanƙanta mai yiwuwa tare da ƙarfafa mahaɗin ƙarfin su.
english: Police said Lo Piccolo had the upper hand because he had been Provenzano's right-hand man in Palermo and his greater experience won him the respect of the older generation of bosses as they pursued Provenzano's policy of keeping as low as possible while strengthening their power network.

hausa: Provenzano ne ya ƙayyade waɗannan shuwagabannin a lokacin da ya kawo ƙarshen yaƙin da Riina ke yi da jihar da ya yi sababin rayukan maharan Mafia Giovanni Falcone da Paolo Borsellino a shekarar 1992.”
english: These bosses had been reined in by Provenzano when he put an end to the Riina-driven war against the state that claimed the lives of Mafia crusaders Giovanni Falcone and Paolo Borsellino in 1992."

hausa: Shugaban Kamfanin Apple Steve Jobs ya ƙaddamar da na'urar ta hanyar takawa zuwa kan dandamalin sannan ya fitar da iPhone ɗin daga aljihun wandonsa na jeans.
english: Apple CEO Steve Jobs unveiled the device by walking onto the stage and taking the iPhone out of his jeans pocket.

hausa: A jawabinsa na sa’o’i 2 ya bayyana cewa “Yau kamfanin Apple zai sake buga wayar, za mu kafa tarihi a yau”.
english: During his 2 hour speech he stated that "Today Apple is going to reinvent the phone, We are going to make history today".

hausa: Brazil ita ce babbar cibiyar Roman Katolika a Duniya, kuma Cocin Roman Katolika na cigaba da adawa da halatta auren jinsi a ƙasar.
english: Brazil is the largest Roman Catholic country on Earth, and the Roman Catholic Church has consistently opposed the legalization of same-sex marriage in the country.

hausa: Babban Taron Ƙasa na Brazil ya yi shekaru goma ya na muhawarar yin dokar, kuma irin wannan aure an halasta shi ne kawai a jihar Rio Grande.
english: The National Congress of Brazil has debated legalization for 10 years, and such civil marriages are currently only legal in Rio Grande do Sul.

hausa: Tsohon magajin garin São Paulo, Marta Suplicy ce ta ƙirƙiri dokar ta asali. Ƙudurin dokar da aka gabatar, bayan an yi mata gyara, yanzu tana hannun Roberto Jefferson.
english: The original bill was drafted by former mayor of São Paulo, Marta Suplicy. The proposed legislation, after being amended, is now in the hands of Roberto Jefferson.

hausa: Masu zanga-zangar suna zaton samun taƙaddama mai dauke da sa hannun mutum miliyan 1.2 domin ƙaddamarwa a taron majalisar ƙasa cikin watan Nuwamba.
english: Protesters hope to collect a petition of 1.2 million signatures to present to the National Congress in November.

hausa: Bayan ya bayyana cewa iyalai da dama na neman agajin doka wajen yaƙin korar, an gudanar da zama na a ranar 20 ga watan Maris a nan Al’umar East Bay Law Center ga waɗanda damfarar gidaje ta shafa.
english: After it became apparent that many families were seeking legal help to fight the evictions, a meeting was held on March 20 at the East Bay Community Law Center for the victims of the housing scam.

hausa: Lokacin da masu hayan suka fara musayar abin da ya faru da su, mafi yawan dangin da abin ya shafa sun fahimci cewa Carolyn Wilson na OHA ya saci ajiyarsu ta tsaro, kuma ya gudu ya bar ƙasar.
english: When the tenants started sharing what had occurred to them, most of the families involved suddenly realized that Carolyn Wilson of the OHA had stolen their security deposits, and skipped out of town.

hausa: Masu haya a lambun Lockwood sunyi imanin cewa za'a iya samun wasu iyalai 40 ko fiye da haka da zasu iya fuskantar kora daga gidajensu, tunda sun fahimci cewa 'yan sanda OHA suna binciken wasu kadarorin gidajen jama'a a Oakland waɗanda ka iya faɗawa cikin zambar harkar gidaje.
english: Tenants at Lockwood Gardens believe that there may be another 40 families or more to face eviction, since they learned that OHA police are also investigating other public housing properties in Oakland that may be caught up in the housing scam.

hausa: ƙungiyar makaɗa ta soke wasan filin Maui War Memorial, wanda mutane 9,000 za su iya halarta, kuma sun nemi afuwa daga magoya baya.
english: The band canceled the show at Maui's War Memorial Stadium, which was set to be attended by 9,000 people, and apologized to fans.

hausa: Kamfani mai gudanar da ƙungiyar makadan, HK Management Inc., bai ba da wani dalili ba da farko lokacin da suka soke a Satumba 20, amma sun ɗora laifin a kan rashin kayan aiki washe gari.
english: The band's management company, HK Management Inc., gave no initial reason when they canceled on September 20, but blamed logistical reasons by the next day.

hausa: An ɗaure fitattun lauyoyin Girka, Sakis Kechagioglou da George Nikolakopoulos a gidan kason Korydallus na Athens, yayin da aka same su da laifin cin hanci da rashawa.
english: The famous Greek lawyers, Sakis Kechagioglou and George Nikolakopoulos have been imprisoned in the Athens' jail of Korydallus, as they were found guilty of graft and corruption.

hausa: A sakamakon haka, an tayar wani babban abin kunya tsakanin kungiyar lauyoyin Girka ta hanyar fallasa haramtattun ayyuka da alkalai, lauyoyi, yan gudunmowa da manyan alkalai suka aikata a shekarun da suka gabata.
english: As a result of this, a big scandal within the Greek legal community has been raised through the exposure of illegal actions that judges, lawyers, solicitors and attorneys have done during the previous years.

hausa: Bayan 'yan makonnin da suka gabata, bayan bayanan da dan jaridar Makis Triantafylopoulos ya wallafa a cikin sanannen wasan sa na gidan Talabijin mai suna “Zoungla” a cikin gidan talabijin na Alpha, an cire dan majalisar dokoki kuma lauya, Petros Mantouvalos yayin da mambobin ofishinsa ke da hannu a harkar sata da almubazzaranci. .
english: A few weeks ago, after the information published by the journalist Makis Triantafylopoulos in his popular Television show "Zoungla" in Alpha TV, the member of Parliament and lawyer, Petros Mantouvalos was abdicated as members of his office had been involved in illegal graft and corruption.

hausa: Haka kuma, babban alkalin Evangelos Kalousis yana kurkuku saboda an same shi da laifin rashawa da kuma munanan halaye.
english: Moreover, top judge Evangelos Kalousis is imprisoned as he found guilty of corruption and degenerate behaviour.

hausa: Roberts ya cije akan ƙin yin magana game da lokacin da ya yi imanin cewa rayuwa ta fara, wata muhimmiyar tambaya idan ana la’akari da dacewar zubar da ciki, yana mai cewa ba zai dace a faɗi maganganu game da takamaiman lamura masu kama da haka ba.
english: Roberts flatly refused to say about when he believes life begins, an important question when considering the ethics of abortion, saying that it would be unethical to comment on the specifics of likely cases.

hausa: Don haka, ya sake nanata abinda ya fada a baya cewa Roe v. Wade ya kasance “doka karbabbiya a ƙasa”, tare da jaddada mahimmancin rashin kwan gaba kwan baya a hukunce-hukunce kotun ƙoli.
english: He did, however, reiterate his earlier statement that Roe v. Wade was the "settled law of the land", emphasizing the importance of consistent Supreme Court rulings.

hausa: Ya kuma tabbatar da cewa ya yarda da manufar da ke bada damar samun sirri wadda hukuncin Roe ya dogara a kai.
english: He also confirmed that he believed in the implied right to privacy which the Roe decision depended upon.

hausa: Maroochydore ya gama a saman tsanin, tare da makuna shida a gaban Noose da ya zo na biyu.
english: Maroochydore had finished on top of the ladder, six points clear of Noosa in second.

hausa: Ɓangarorin biyu za su haɗu a babban wasan kusa da na ƙarshe inda Noosa ya ƙare da yin nasara da maki 11.
english: The two sides would meet in the major semi final where Noosa ran out winners by 11 points.

hausa: Daga nan Maroochydore ya doke Caboolture a Wasan share Fagen na Ƙarshe.
english: Maroochydore then defeated Caboolture in the Preliminary Final.

hausa: Hesperonychus elizabethae wani jinsin halitta ne cikin iyalin Dromaeosauridae kuma ƴan uwa ne ga Velociraptor.
english: Hesperonychus elizabethae is a species of the family Dromaeosauridae and is a cousin of Velociraptor .

hausa: Wannan tsuntsu mai cikar gashi, mai ɗumin jini mai farauta an yi imanin cewa ya taɓa yin tafiya a miƙe akan ƙafafu biyu masu manyan faratu kamar Velociraptor.
english: This fully feathered, warm blooded bird of prey was believed to have walked upright on two legs with claws like the Velociraptor.

hausa: Farcen ta na biyu ta fi girma, wanda ya haifar da sunan Hesperonychus wanda ke nufin “farcen yamma.”
english: Its second claw was larger, giving rise to the name Hesperonychus which means "western claw."

hausa: Ƙari akan ruguza ƙanƙara, yanayi mai tsananin gaske na kawo cikas ga aikin ceto.
english: In addition to the crushing ice, extreme weather conditions have been hampering rescue efforts.

hausa: Pittman ya ba da shawara cewa yanayin ba zai gyaru ba sai cikin sati na gaba.
english: Pittman suggested that conditions wouldn't improve until sometime next week.

hausa: Yawa da kaurin ƙanƙarar teku, a cewar Pittman, shi ne mafi muni da ya kasance ga matuƙan teku a cikin shekaru 15 da suka gabata.
english: The amount and thickness of the pack ice, according to Pittman, is the worst it has been for sealers in the past 15 years.

hausa: Labari ya bazu a cikin yankin Red Lake a yau yayin jana'izar Jeff Weise  da kuma kama mutun uku daga cikin tara da abin ya shafa cewa an kama wani ɗalibi dangane da harbe-harben makarantar na ranar 21 ga Maris.
english: News spread in the Red Lake community today as funerals for Jeff Weise and three of the nine victims were held that another student was arrested in connection with the school shootings of March 21.

hausa: Mahukunta sun yi magana kaɗan ne a hukumance ba tare da tabbatar da kamun yau ba.
english: Authorities said little officially beyond confirming today's arrest.

hausa: Dukda haka, wata hanya mai masaniya game da binciken ta gaya wa kotun Minneapolis Star cewa Louis Jourdain ne, yaro mai shekara 16 ɗan shugaban ƙabilun Red Lake Floyd Jourdain.
english: However, a source with knowledge of the investigation told the Minneapolis Star-Tribune that it was Louis Jourdain, 16-year old son of Red Lake Tribal Chairman Floyd Jourdain.

hausa: Har yanzu ba a san tuhumar da za a yi ba ko kuma abin da ya jagoranci hukumomi ga yaron amma an fara shari’ar yara a kotun tarayya.
english: It is not known at this time what charges will be laid or what led authorities to the boy but juvenile proceedings have begun in federal court.

hausa: Lodin ya kuma ce jami'ai sun yanke shawarar soke zagaye na biyu ne domin kare 'yan Afghanistan da hatsarin rashin tsaro na wani zaɓen.
english: Lodin also said officials decided to cancel the runoff in order to save Afghans the expense and security risk of another election.

hausa: Jami’an diflomasiyya sun ce sun gano matuƙar rikitarwa a cikin tsarin mulkin Afghanistan da zai tabbatar da cewa sake zaben bai zama dole ba.
english: Diplomats said that they had found enough ambiguity in the Afghan constitution to determine the runoff as unnecessary.

hausa: Wannan ya saɓawa rahotannin baya, wadanda suka ce sauke zaɓen zai kasance ya saɓawa kundin tsarin mulki.
english: This contradicts earlier reports, which said that cancelling the runoff would have been against the constitution.

hausa: An tafi zuwa Irkutsk da jirgin saman kuma sojojin cikin ƙasar ne ke sarrafa shi.
english: The aircraft had been headed to Irkutsk and was being operated by interior troops.

hausa: An ƙaddamar da aikin bincike domin a bincika.
english: An inquiry was established to investigate.

hausa: Il-76 ta kasance ɗaya daga cikin muhimmin ginshiƙi na sojojin Rasha da Soviet tun shekarun 1970, kuma ta riga ta fuskanci mummunar haɗari a Rasha a watan da ya gabata.
english: The Il-76 has been a major component of both the Russian and Soviet military since the 1970s, and had already seen a serious accident in Russia last month.

hausa: Ranan bakwai (7) ga watan Oktoba wani injin ya rabu yayin tashi, babu raunuka. Russia ta dakatar da II-76s na ɗan lokaci bayan wannan haɗari.
english: On October 7 an engine separated on takeoff, without injuries. Russia briefly grounded Il-76s after that accident.

hausa: Mil 800 na hanyar man Trans-Alaska aka rufe bayan asarar dubban gangar ɗanyen mai a kudancin Fairbanks, Alaska.
english: 800 miles of the Trans-Alaska Pipeline System were closed down following a spill of thousands of barrels of crude oil south of Fairbanks, Alaska.

hausa: Matsalan wutan lantarki bayan gwaje-gwajen tsari na yau da kullum ta sanya bawul na taimako ya buɗe sannan ɗanyen mai ya yi ambaliya kusa da tashar fanfo na 9 na Fort Greely.
english: A power failure following a routine fire-command system test caused relief valves to open and crude oil overflowed near the Fort Greely pump station 9.

hausa: Buɗawar mafitar na bada damar fitar ƙarfin aikin tsarin da gudanar mai a kan faifai zuwa tankin da zai iya riƙe ganga 55,000 ( gallan miliyan 2.3).
english: The valves opening allowed a pressure release for the system and oil flowed on a pad to a tank that can hold 55,000 barrels (2.3 million gallons).

hausa: Tun daga ranar Laraba da maraice, tankin yana cigaba da yoyo wataƙila daga ƙaruwar zafin cikin tankin.
english: As of Wednesday afternoon, the tank vents were still leaking probably from thermal expansion inside the tank.

hausa: Wani mazubin mataki na biyu a ƙasan tankunan da yake da damar riƙe galan 104,500 bai cika dam ba.
english: Another secondary containment area below the tanks capable of holding 104,500 barrels was not yet filled to capacity.

hausa: Jawabin, na kai tsaye ta talbijin, shine karo na farko da majiyoyin Iran suka amince cewa takunkumin da aka sanya na yin tasiri.
english: The comments, live on television, were the first time that senior Iranian sources have admitted that the sanctions are having any effect.

hausa: Sun haɗa da taƙaita kuɗi da kuma haramcin da Tarayyar Turai ta yi kan fitar da ɗanyen mai, wanda daga shi ne tattalin arziƙin Iran yake karbar kashi 80% na kuɗaɗen shigarta na ƙasashen waje.
english: They include financial restrictions and a ban by the European Union on the export of crude oil, from which the Iranian economy receives 80% of its foreign income.

hausa: A rahoton wata-wata na baya-bayan nan, OPEC ta sanarda cewa yawan ɗanyen man da ake fitarwa ya yi kasa da ganga miliyan 2.8 a rana, faɗuwar da bai taɓa yi ba a shekaru ashirin da suka gabata.
english: In its most recent monthly report, OPEC said exports of crude had fallen to their lowest level for two decades at 2.8 million barrels per day.

hausa: Babban Jagoran ƙasar, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, ya bayyana dogaro da mai a matsayin “tarko” tun kafin juyin juya halin Musulunci na Iran a 1979 kuma daga wanda ƙasar ya kamata ta 'yantar da kanta.
english: The country's supreme leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, has described the dependency on oil as "a trap" dating from before Iran's Islamic revolution in 1979 and from which the country should free itself.

hausa: Idan jirgin ya zo Duniya kuma ta shiga sararin samaniya, kimanin ƙarfe 5 na safe(lokacin gabas), ana tsamanin a saka wasan haske ga mutanen da ke Arewancin California, Oregon, Nevada, da Utah.
english: When the capsule gets to Earth and enters the atmosphere, at about 5am (eastern time), it is expected to put on quite a light show for folks in Northern California, Oregon, Nevada, and Utah.

hausa: Jirgin zai yi kamar tauraruwa mai wutsiya da ke wucewa ta sararin sama.
english: The capsule will look much like a shooting star going across the sky.

hausa: Jirgin zai yi tafiyar kimanin kilomita 12.8 ko mil 8 a kowace daƙiƙa, gudu sosai da zai je garin Los Angeles daga San Francisco a cikin minti guda.
english: The capsule will be traveling at about 12.8 km or 8 miles per second, fast enough to go from San Francisco to Los Angeles in one minute.

hausa: Jirgin Stardust zai kafa tarihin da ba a taɓa yi ba na kasancewa jirgi mai tafiya samaniya da ya fi kowanne saurin dawowa Duniya, inda ya karya tarihin baya wanda aka kafa a watan Mayu na shekarar 1969 yayin da jirgin Apollo X command module ya dawo duniya.
english: Stardust will set a new all-time record for being the fastest spacecraft to return to Earth, breaking the previous record set in May of 1969 during the return of the Apollo X command module.

hausa: “Zai tafi saman yammacin bakin teku na arewacin California kuma za ta haskaka samaniya daga California ta cikin tsakiyar Oregon sannan ya cigaba ta cikin Nevada da Idaho sannan zuwa cikin Utah,” Tom Duxbury, manajan aiki na Stardust ya faɗa.
english: “It will move over the west coast of northern California and will light the sky from California through central Oregon and on through Nevada and Idaho and into Utah,” Tom Duxbury, Stardust's project manager said.

hausa: Matakin da Mista Rudd ya ɗauka na rattaba hannu kan yarjejeniyar sauyin yanayi ta Kyoto ya maida ƙasar Amurka saniyar ware, inda ta zama ƙasa tilo cikin ƙasashen da su ka ci gaba wadda ba ta saka hannu a yarjejeniyar ba.
english: Mr. Rudd's decision to sign the Kyoto climate accord isolates the United States, which will now be the only developed nation not to ratify the agreement.

hausa: Tsohuwar gwamnatin Australia mai ra’ayin mazan jiya ta ki amincewa da Kyoto, tana mai cewa za ta yi illa ga tattalin arziƙin da ya dogara matuƙa kan fitar da gawayi, yayin da ƙasashe kamar India da China yarjejeniyar fitar hayaƙin ba ta aiki a kansu.
english: Australia's former conservative government refused to ratify Kyoto, saying it would damage the economy with its heavy reliance on coal exports, while countries like India and China were not bound by emissions targets.

hausa: Shine mafi girma da aka samu a tarihin eBay.
english: It is the biggest acquisition in eBay's history.

hausa: Kamfanin yana fatan faɗaɗa hanyoyin samun riba da kuma yin fice a wuraren da Skype ke da ƙarfi, kamar China, Gabashin Turai, da Brazil.
english: The company hopes to diversify its profit sources and gain popularity in areas where Skype holds a strong position, such as China, Eastern Europe, and Brazil.

hausa: Masana kimiya sun yi zargin Enceladus a matsayin mai aiki a duniya kuma mai iya jawo Saturn’s icy E ring.
english: Scientists have suspected Enceladus as geologically active and a possible source of Saturn's icy E ring.

hausa: Enceladus shine mafi kyawun abu a cikin duniyar wata, wanda yake dawo da haske na kusan kashi 90 na hasken rana da ya same shi.
english: Enceladus is the most reflective object in the solar system, reflecting about 90 percent of the sunlight that hits it.

hausa: Mawallafin wasan Konami ya bayyana cikin wata jaridar Japan a yau cewa ba za su saki wasan a Fallujah na kwana shida ba.
english: The game publisher Konami stated today in a Japanese newspaper that they will not be releasing the game Six Days in Fallujah.

hausa: Wasan ya ɗoru ne akan Yaƙin Fallujah na biyu, mummunan yaƙi na tsakanin sojojin Amurka da na Iraƙi.
english: The game is based on the Second Battle of Fallujah, a vicious battle between American and Iraqi forces.

hausa: ACMA ta kuma gano cewa duk da ana nuna bidiyon a yanar gizo, Big Brother bata saɓawa dokokin tantancewa na yanar gizo ba domin ba a adana bidiyon ba a shafin Big Brother na yanar gizo.
english: The ACMA also found that despite the video being streamed on the Internet, Big Brother had not breached online content censorship laws as the media had not been stored on Big Brother's website.

hausa: Dokar yaɗa labarai ta samar da hanyar kula ga al'amuran yanar gizo, duk da cewa baya zama al'amarin yanar gizo, sai ya kasance a kallace yana kan sabar.
english: The Broadcasting Services Act provides for the regulation of Internet content, however to be considered Internet content, it must physically reside on a server.

hausa: Ofishin jakadancin Amurka da ke Nairobi, Kenya ya bayar da wani gargaɗi cewa “masu tsatsauran ra’ayi daga Somaliya” na shirin ƙaddamar da harin bom na ƙunar-baƙin-wake a Kenya da Ethiopia.
english: The United States embassy located in Nairobi, Kenya has issued a warning that "extremists from Somalia" are planning to launch suicide bomb attacks in Kenya and Ethiopia.

hausa: Ƙasar U.S. ta ce ta karba bayani daga tushe da ba a bayyana ba wadda musamman ta ambaci amfani da ƴan kunar bakin wake wajen fasa “sanannu wurare” a Ethiopia da Kenya.
english: The U.S. says it has received information from an undisclosed source that specifically mentions the use of suicide bombers to will blow up "prominent landmarks" in Ethiopia and Kenya.

hausa: Tun kafin Daily Show da kuma The Colbert Report, Heck da Johnson sun yi tunanin wani ɗab’i da zai kwaikwayi labarai - da rahoton labarai - lokacin da suke ɗalibai a UW a 1988.
english: Long before The Daily Show and The Colbert Report, Heck and Johnson envisioned a publication that would parody the news—and news reporting—when they were students at UW in 1988.

hausa: Tun mafarinta, Onion ta zama mai yaɗa labaru mai gaskiya, tare da bugu, shafin yanar gizonta ta jawo masu ziyarta har 5,000,000 a watar Oktoba, tallace-tallace na sirri, labaru na tsawon awa 24, podcasts, da kuma kwanan nan ta fara taswirar duniya da ake kira Dumb World.
english: Since its inception, The Onion has become a veritable news parody empire, with a print edition, a website that drew 5,000,000 unique visitors in the month of October, personal ads, a 24 hour news network, podcasts, and a recently launched world atlas called Our Dumb World.

hausa: Al Gore da Janar Tommy Franks cikin raha sun kururuta kanun labaran da suka fi so (Na Gore shi ne a lokacin da The Onion ta ba da rahoton cewa shi da Tipper suna yin jima’i ma fi daɗi a rayuwarsu bayan kayen da ya sha a zaben Electoral College a 2000).
english: Al Gore and General Tommy Franks casually rattle off their favorite headlines (Gore's was when The Onion reported he and Tipper were having the best sex of their lives after his 2000 Electoral College defeat).

hausa: Yawancin marubutan su sun ci gaba da yin tasiri sosai a kan shirin labarai marar inganci na Jon Stewart da na Stephen Colbert.
english: Many of their writers have gone on to wield great influence on Jon Stewart and Stephen Colbert's news parody shows.

hausa: Lamarin zayyane-zayyane shi ma yana cikin gangamin Taron Birnin Bucharest wanda ya nemi sake ƙaddamar da hoton babban birnin Romania a matsayin birnin fikirar ƙirkire-ƙirkire kuma mai tasiri sosai.
english: The artistic event is also part of a campaign by the Bucharest City Hall that seeks to relaunch the image of the Romanian capital as a creative and colourful metropolis.

hausa: Birnin zai kasance na farko a rukunin kudu maso yamma na nahiyar turai da zata ɗauki nauyin CowParade, taron mafi girma a duniya, tsakanin watan Yuni da Agusta na bana.
english: The city will be the first in southeastern Europe to host CowParade, the world's largest public art event, between June and August this year.

hausa: Sanarwar yau ta kuma tsawaita sadaukarwa da gwamnati ta yi a Maris na wannan shekara na ɗaukan nayin ƙarin karusai.
english: Today's announcement also extended the government's commitment made in March of this year to fund extra carriages.

hausa: Ƙarin 300 ya kawo jimillar ababen hawa 1,300 da za a saya don sauƙaƙe cunkoson.
english: An additional 300 brings the total to 1,300 carriages to be acquired to relieve overcrowding.

hausa: Christopher Garcia, mai magana da yawun Ofishin ‘yan sanda na Los Angeles, ya ce ana tuhumar wanda ake zargi da laifin ƙetare iyaka, ba da laifin ɓarna ba.
english: Christopher Garcia, a spokesperson of the Los Angeles Police Department, said the suspected male offender is being investigated for trespassing rather than vandalism.

hausa: Ba a lalata alamar a zahiri ba; an yi gyaran ne ta hanyar amfani da baƙin tamfol da aka yi wa ado da alamun zaman lafiya da zuciya domin sauya “O” don karanta ta da ƙaramin baƙi “e”.
english: The sign was not physically damaged; the modification was done using black tarpaulins decorated with signs of peace and heart to alter the "O" to read lowercase "e".

hausa: Jar igiyar ruwa tana tasowa idan da dandazon Karenia brevis ya yi sama fiye na kullum, wata ainihin halittar ruwa mai ƙwayar halitta guda ɗaya.
english: Red tide is caused by a higher than normal concentration of Karenia brevis, a naturally-occurring single-celled marine organism.

hausa: Aukuwa na halitta suna iya haɗuwa don sarrafa kyakkyawan yanayi, wanda yake sa yawan wannan algae ya ƙaru sosai.
english: Natural factors can intersect to produce ideal conditions, allowing this algae to increase in number dramatically.

hausa: Algae na samar da guba mai iya nakasa jijiyoyin jikin mutum da kifi.
english: The algae produces a neurotoxin that can disable nerves in both humans and fish.

hausa: Sau da yawa kifi na mutuwa saboda yawan guba a cikin ruwa.
english: Fish often die because of the high concentrations of the toxin in the waters.

hausa: Ƴan Adam na iya fuskantar masalar shaƙar iskar ta hanyar ruwa da ya shiga iska ta hanyar guguwa da igiyar ruwa.
english: Humans can be affected by breathing affected water taken into the air by wind and waves.

hausa: Lokacin da guguwar teku ta Gonu, wadda aka samo sunanta daga ganyen kwakwa a yaren Maldives, take tsaikonta, gudun iskarta na kaɗawa da gudun kilomita 240 a awa guda (mil 149)
english: At its peak, Tropical Cyclone Gonu, named for a bag of palm leaves in the language of the Maldives, reached sustained winds of 240 kilometers an hour (149 miles per hour) .

hausa: Yau da sassafe, gudun iska ya kai saurin kilomita 83 a awa guda, amma dai ana tsammanin zai yi ta raguwa.
english: By early today, winds were around 83 km/h, and it was expect to keep weakening.

hausa: A ranar Laraba, Hukumar wasan Kwalon Kondo (NBA) ta Amurka ta dakatar da kakar bana ta ƙwallon hannu sanadiyar al’amura da suka danganci COVID-19.
english: On Wednesday, the United States' National Basketball Association (NBA) suspended its professional basketball season due to concerns regarding COVID-19.

hausa: Hukuncin da hukumar NBA ta yanke ya biyo bayan gwajin da ya tabbatar da cewa ɗan wasan Jazz na Utah na ɗauke da ƙwayar cutar Covid-19.
english: The NBA's decision followed a Utah Jazz player testing positive for the COVID-19 virus.

hausa: “A bisa waɗannan ƙasusuwan tarihi, wannan na nufin rabewar ta zo da wuri fiye da yadda ake tsammani ta hanyar hujjojin ƙwayar halitta.
english: "Based on this fossil, that means the split is much earlier than has been anticipated by the molecular evidence.

hausa: Yana nufin dole a mayar da komai baya, “in ji mai binciken a Rift Valley Research Service a Habasha kuma wani abokin aikin binciken, Berhane Asfaw.
english: That means everything has to be put back," said researcher at the Rift Valley Research Service in Ethiopia and a co-author of the study, Berhane Asfaw.

hausa: Har zuwa yanzu, AOL ta sami damar motsawa da haɓaka kasuwar IM a tsarin ta, saboda yawan amfani da shi a cikin Amurka.
english: Until now, AOL has been able to move and develop the IM market at its own pace, due to its widespread use within the United States.

hausa: Da wannan tsari a ƙasa, wannan ‘yanci na iya zuwa ƙarshe.
english: With this arrangement in place, this freedom might end.

hausa: Yawan masu amfani da ayyukan Yahoo! da Microsoft a haɗe zai yi kunnen-doki da yawan abokan cinikin AOL.
english: The number of users of the Yahoo! and Microsoft services combined will rival the number of AOL's customers.

hausa: An mayar da Bankin Northern Rock ta ƙasa a shekara 2008 bayan bayyana cewa kamfanin ya samu tallafin gaggawa daga Gwamnatin Burtaniya.
english: The Northern Rock bank had been nationalised in 2008 following the revelation that the company had received emergency support from the UK Government.

hausa: Northern Rock ya buƙaci tallafi saboda matsalar da ya shiga a lokacin ƙaramin rikicin bashin gina gida marar madafa a 2007.
english: Northern Rock had required support due to its exposure during the subprime mortgage crisis in 2007.

hausa: Virgin Group na Sir Richard Branson ya yi tayin sayen bankin da aka ƙi amincewa kafin bankin ya zama na ƙasa.
english: Sir Richard Branson's Virgin Group had a bid for the bank rejected prior to the bank’s nationalisation.

hausa: A 2010, yayinda yake na ƙasa, banki na yanzu Northern Rock plc an rusa shi daga ‘banki mummuna’, Northern Rock (gudanar da kadara).
english: In 2010, while nationalised, the current high street bank Northern Rock plc was split from the ‘bad bank’, Northern Rock (Asset Management).

hausa: Virgin ya sayi ' banki mai kyau' na Northern Rock ne kawai, ba kamfanin sarrafa kadara ba.
english: Virgin have only purchased the ‘good bank’ of Northern Rock, not the asset management company.

hausa: An gaskata cewa wannan shine karo na biyar a tarihi da mutane suka ga abin da ya kasance abin da aka tabbatar a sinadarance abubuwan martian ne da ke faɗowa duniya.
english: This is believed to be the fifth time in history that people have observed what turned out to be chemically confirmed martian material falling to Earth.

hausa: Daga cikin kimanin tubalan sararin sama 24,000 da aka sani sun fado zuwa Duniya, kusan 34 ne kawai aka tabbatar da asalin Martian ne.
english: Out of the approximately 24,000 known meteorites to have fallen to Earth, only about 34 have been verified to be martian in origin.

hausa: Guda sha biyar cikin duwatsun ana danganta su da ruwan duwatsun da suka faɗo duniya a watan Yuli da ya gabata.
english: Fifteen of these rocks are attributed to the meteorite shower last July.

hausa: Wasu daga cikin duwasun, waɗanda samun su na da wuya a doran kasa, ana siyar dasu tsakanin ukiya $11,000 zuwa $22,500 wanda haka ya ninka farashin zinari sau goma.
english: Some of the rocks, which are very rare on Earth, are being sold from US$11,000 to $22,500 per ounce, which is about ten times more than the cost of gold.

hausa: Bayan tseren, Keselowski ya kasance zakarar gwajin Gasar Direbobi da maki 2,250.
english: Following the race, Keselowski remains the Drivers' Championship leader with 2,250 points.

hausa: Yana baya da maki bakwai, Johnson ne na biyu da 2,243.
english: Seven points behind, Johnson is second with 2,243.

hausa: A matsayin na uku, Hamlin ya kasance a bayan da maki ashirin, amma ya zarta Bowyer da maki biyar. Su kuma Kahne da Truex, Jr. su ne na biyar da na shida a jere da maki 2,220 da kuma 2,207.
english: In third, Hamlin is twenty points behind, but five ahead of Bowyer. Kahne and Truex, Jr. are fifth and sixth respectively with 2,220 and 2,207 points.

hausa: Stewart, Gordon, Kenseth, da Harvick sun tsallake manyan matsayi goma na Gasar Zakaru ta Direbobi yayin da tsere hudu ne suka rage a kakar wasannin.
english: Stewart, Gordon, Kenseth, and Harvick round out the top-ten positions for the Drivers' Championship with four races remaining in the season.

hausa: Rundunar sojin ruwan Amurka sun ce suna binciken lamarin.
english: The US Navy also said they were investigating the incident.

hausa: Haka kuma sun faɗa a cikin jawabin cewa, “Tawagar tana aiki a halin yanzu don gano hanya mafi kyau wajen ciro jirgin ruwan ba tare da matsala ba”.
english: They also said in a statement, "The crew is currently working to determine the best method of safely extracting the ship".

hausa: Jirgin ta ajin jigilar fasinjoji ta kangi, jirgin yana kan hanyarsa ta zuwa Puerto Princesa a Palawan.
english: An Avenger class mine countermeasures ship, the ship was on its way to Puerto Princesa in Palawan.

hausa: An tura shi zuwa jirgin ruwan sojan ruwa na bakawi na Amurka da ke can a Sasebo da ke kasar Japan.
english: It is assigned to the U.S. Navy’s Seventh Fleet and based in Sasebo, Nagasaki in Japan.

hausa: Maharan birnin Mumbai ɗin sun shigo ne ta wani ƙaramin jirgin ruwa ranar 26 ga watan Nuwamban 2008, an kawo musu gurnet-gurnet da makamai masu sarrafa kansu inda suka hari tashar jiragen ƙasa mai matuƙar dandazon jama’a ta Chhatrapati Shivaji da kuma shahararren ginin Otel ɗin nan na Taj Mahal.
english: The Mumbai attackers arrived via boat on Novemeber 26, 2008, bringing with them grenades, automatic weapons and hit multiple targets including the crowded Chhatrapati Shivaji Terminus railway station and the famous Taj Mahal Hotel.

hausa: Leƙen asiri da tattara bayannan David Headley sun taimaka don ba da dama ga ‘yan bindiga 10 su yi aiki daga ƙungiyar sojojin Pakistan Laskhar-e-Taiba.
english: David Headley's scouting and information gathering had helped to enable the operation by the 10 gunmen from the Pakistani militant group Laskhar-e-Taiba.

hausa: Harin ya kawo tsamin dangantaka tsakanin India da Pakistan.
english: The attack put a huge strain on relations between India and Pakistan.

hausa: An yi shari’ar ne a Virginia saboda nan ne garin kamfanin AOL mai samar da mashigar yanar gizo, kamfanin da ya shigar da karar.
english: The case was prosecuted in Virginia because it is the home to the leading internet service provider AOL, the company who instigated the charges.

hausa: Wannan shi ne karo na farko da aka samu yanke hukunci ta amfani da dokar da aka zartar a 2003 don rage imel mai yawa, ko spam, daga watsuwa cikin akwatin imel ba tare buƙatar masu amfani ba.
english: This is the first time a conviction has been gained using the legislation enacted in 2003 to curb bulk e-mail, aka spam, from unsolicited distribution into users mailboxes.

hausa: Yesu mai shekaru 21 ya shiga ƙungiyar Manchester City shekaran da ta gabata a watan Janairu shekara 2017 daga ƙugiyar Palmeiras na Brazil a kudi miliyan £27.
english: 21-year-old Jesus joined Manchester City last year in January 2017 from Brazilian club Palmeiras for a reported fee of £27 million.

hausa: Tun daga wannan lokacin, ɗan ƙasar Brazil ɗin ya buga wasanni 53 a ƙungiyar a duk gasa kuma ya zira ƙwallaye 24.
english: Since then, the Brazilian has featured in 53 matches for the club in all competitions and has scored 24 goals.

hausa: Dr. Lee ya nuna damuwarsa akan rahotanni cewa yanzu yara a ƙasar Turkiya sun kamu da cutar murar A(H5N1) ba tare da sun yi rashin lafiya ba.
english: Dr. Lee also expressed his concern about reports that children in Turkey have now become infected with the A(H5N1) avian influenza virus without becoming ill.

hausa: Sakamakon wasu bincike sun nuna cewa dole tasirin cutar ya ragu kafin ta iya haifar da annoba a duniya, in ji shi.
english: Some studies suggest that the disease must become less lethal before it can cause a global epidemic, he noted.

hausa: Akwai damuwa cewa majinyatan zasu iya cigaba da yaɗa cutar a kan mutane da dama ta hanyar alamuransu na yau da kullum idan har alamun ciwon bai bayana ba.
english: There is concern that patients may continue to infect more people by going through their daily routines if the flu symptoms remain mild.

hausa: Leslie Aun, mai magana da yawun Gidauniyar Komen, ya ce hukumar ta amince da wata sabuwar doka wadda ta hana bayar da tallafi ko gudunmuwar kuɗi ga ƙungiyoyin da ake wa binciken shari’a.
english: Leslie Aun, a spokesperson for the Komen Foundation, said the organization adopted a new rule that does not allow grants or funding to be awarded to organizations that are under legal investigation.

hausa: Manufar Komen ta hana Planned Parenthood sanadiyyar binciken da akeyi akan yanda Planned Parenthood take kashewa da kuma bayar da ba'asin kuɗin ta wanda Wakili Cliff Stearns yake gudanarwa.
english: Komen's policy disqualified Planned Parenthood due to a pending investigation on how Planned Parenthood spends and reports its money that is being conducted by Representative Cliff Stearns.

hausa: Stearns yana binciken ko an yi amfani da haraji don biyan kuɗin zubar da ciki ta hanyar ƙungiyar planned Parenthood a matsayinsa na shugaban Ƙaramin Kwamiti na Sa-ido da Bincike, wanda ke ƙarƙashin lamuran Kwamitin House Energy and commerce .
english: Stearns is investigating whether taxes are used to fund abortions through Planned Parenthood in his role as chairman of the Oversight and Investigations Subcommittee, which is under the umbrella of the House Energy and Commerce Committee.

hausa: Tsohon gwamnan Massachusetts Mitt Romney ya lashe zaɓen fitar da gwani na ɗan takarar shugaban ƙasa na Jam’iyyar Republican a ranar Talata da kashi 46 na kuri’un.
english: Former Massachusetts governor Mitt Romney won the Florida Republican Party presidential primary election on Tuesday with over 46 percent of the vote.

hausa: Tsohon Kakakin Majalisar Wakilai ta Amurka Newt Gingrich ya zo na biyu da kashi 32.
english: Former U.S. Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich came in second with 32 percent.

hausa: A matsayin mai nasara ke kwashe duka jihohi, Florida ta miƙa dukkan wakilanta hamsin ga Romney, inda hakan ya tura shi sama a matsayin wanda yake kan gaba a Jam’iyyar Republican da aka tsayar.
english: As a winner-takes-all state, Florida awarded all fifty of its delegates to Romney, pushing him ahead as the front-runner for the Republican Party nomination.

hausa: Masu shirya zanga-zangar sun ce kusan mutane 100,000 ne suka fito a biranen Jamus kamar su Berlin, Cologne, Hamburg, da Hanover.
english: Organisers of the protest said about 100,000 people turned up in German cities such as Berlin, Cologne, Hamburg, and Hanover.

hausa: A Berlin, ƴan sanda sun kimanta masu zanga-zanga guda 6,500.
english: In Berlin, police estimated 6,500 protestors.

hausa: An ƙaddamar da zanga-zanga a garin Paris, Sofia a Bulgaria, Vilinius a Lithuania, Valetta a Malta, Tallinn a Estonia, da kuma Edinburgh da Glasgow a Scotland.
english: Protests also took place in Paris, Sofia in Bulgaria, Vilnius in Lithuania, Valetta in Malta, Tallinn in Estonia, and Edinburgh and Glasgow in Scotland.

hausa: A Landan, Kimanin mutane 200 ne suka yi zanga-zanga a kofar inda manyan ofisoshin wasu masu haƙƙin mallaka su ke.
english: In London, about 200 people protested outside some major copyright holders' offices.

hausa: Watan da ya gabata, akwai manya-manya zanga-zanga a Poland yayin da ƙasar ta sa hannu a ACTA, wanda ya haifar da gwamnatin Poland yanke shawarar ƙin amincewa da yarjejeniyar, a halin yanzu.
english: Last month, there were major protests in Poland when that country signed ACTA, which has led to the Polish government deciding not to ratify the agreement, for now.

hausa: Latvia da Slovakia duk sun jinkirtar da aiwatar haɗin kai da ACTA.
english: Latvia and Slovakia have both delayed the process of joining ACTA.

hausa: Ƙungiyoyin kare haƙƙin dabbobi da ƙungiyar ƴanta dabbobi da kuma ƙungiyar hana yi wa dabbobi uƙuba, na ƙara kiran cewa lallai ne a saka na’urar ɗaukan hoto mai motsi, a dukkan mayankar da ke ƙasar Australiya.
english: Animal Liberation and the Royal Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals (RSPCA) are again calling for the mandatory installation of CCTV cameras in all Australian abattoirs.

hausa: Sabon babban jami’in RSPCA na Wales ta Kudu David O'Shannessy ya shaidawa ABC cewa ya kamata a sa-ido da kuma duba mayanka ya kasance aikin yau da kullum a Australia.
english: RSPCA New South Wales chief inspector David O'Shannessy told the ABC that surveillance and inspections of abattoirs should be commonplace in Australia.

hausa: “Na’urar ɗaukar hoton zai ja hankali ga waɗanda ke aiki da dabbobi wajen tabbatar da cewa lura dasu shine mafi muhimmaci.
english: "The CCTV would certainly send a strong signal to those people working with animals that their welfare is of the highest priority."

hausa: Taswirar binciken yanayin girgizar ƙasa ta duniya na Amurka ta nuna babu girgizar ƙasa a Iceland a satin da ya gabata.
english: The United States Geological Survey international earthquake map showed no earthquakes in Iceland in the week prior.

hausa: Ofishin kula da yanayi na Iceland shima ya ba da rahoton cewa babu wata girgizar ƙasa a yankin Hekla a cikin awanni 48 da suka gabata.
english: The Icelandic Meteorological Office also reported no earthquake activity in the Hekla area in the past 48 hours.

hausa: Muhimmin abinda girgizar ƙasar ta yi shine kawo canji a ranar 10 ga watan Maris a daidai arewa maso gabashin dutse mai aman wuta na Caldera.
english: The significant earthquake activity resulting in the phase change had took place on March 10 on the northeast side of the volcano's summit caldera.

hausa: An sanar da baƙin hadari mara alaƙa da al’amari na amon dutse a gindin dutsen.
english: Dark clouds unrelated to any volcanic activity were reported at the base of the mountain.

hausa: Gizagizai sun gabatar da yiwuwar rikicewa game da ko ainihin fashewar dutsen ta auku.
english: The clouds presented the potential for confusion as to whether an actual eruption had taken place.

hausa: Jirgin Luno na da man da ya kai cubic mita 120-160 a cikinsa a lokacin da ya lalace kuma iska da igiyoyin ruwa masu ƙarfi suka tura shi kan shingen ruwa.
english: The Luno had 120–160 cubic metres of fuel aboard when it broke down and high winds and waves pushed it into the breakwater.

hausa: Jirage masu saukar ungulu sun ceci ma'aikata goma sha biyu kuma babu wani rauni sai dai karyewar hanci.
english: Helicopters rescued the twelve crewmembers and the only injury was a broken nose.

hausa: Jirgin ruwan mai girman mita-100 yana kan hanyar zuwa ɗaukar kayan takin zamani da ya saba kuma da farko jami’ai sun yi fargabar jirgin ruwan zai zubar da kaya.
english: The 100-metre ship was en route to pick up its usual fertiliser cargo and initially officials feared the vessel could spill a load.

hausa: Canjin da aka gabatar ya riga ya wuce duka gidaje biyun a cikin 2011.
english: The proposed amendment already passed both houses in 2011.

hausa: An yi wani canji a wannan zaman majalisar lokacin da aka share jumla ta biyu da farko a Majalisar Wakilai sannan sai Majalisar Dattijai ta miƙa shi a cikin irin takardar Monday.
english: A change was made this legislative session when the second sentence was deleted first by the House of Representatives and then was passed in a similar form by the Senate Monday.

hausa: Kasawar jimla ta biyun, wadda ta kawo shawarar haramta ƙungiyoyin jama’a na jinsi guda, zai iya buɗe ƙofa ga ƙungiyoyin jama’a nan gaba.
english: The failure of the second sentence, which proposes to ban same-sex civil unions, could possibly open the door for civil unions in the future.

hausa: Idan akayi la’akari da matakan, za’a ƙara yin dubiya ga HJR-3 a zaɓaɓɓen majalisar na gaba cikin 2015 ko 2016 domin ya zauna a matakin.
english: Following the process, HJR-3 will be reviewed again by the next elected legislature in either 2015 or 2016 to remain in process.

hausa: Nasarorin da Vautier banda bada umarni sun haɗa da yajin cin abinci a 1973 a kan abin da ya ke ganin dabaibayin siyasa ne.
english: Vautier's achievements outside of directing include a hunger strike in 1973 against what he viewed as political censorship.

hausa: An canza dokar Faransa. Jajircewar sa ta samo asali tun a baya yana da shekaru 15 lokacin da ya shiga rundunar sa-kai ta Faransa yayin yaƙin duniya na ll.
english: French law was changed. His activism went back to age 15 when he joined the French Resistance during World War II.

hausa: Ya rubuta labarin kansa a cikin wani littafin 1998.
english: He documented himself in a 1998 book.

hausa: A shekarun 1960 ya kama hanyar komawa zuwa Algeria da bata daɗe da samun ‘yancin kai ba don koyar da aikin bada umarni a fim.
english: In the 1960s he headed back to newly-independent Algeria to teach film directing.

hausa: Judoka Hitoshi Saito ɗan ƙasar Japan, wanda ya ci lambobin zinare biyu na Olamfik, ya rasu da shekaru 54.
english: Japanese judoka Hitoshi Saito, winner of two Olympic gold medals, has died at the age of 54.

hausa: An ba da sanarwar sanadin mutuwar shine ciwon daji na maɗaciyar cikin hanta.
english: The cause of death was announced as intrahepatic bile duct cancer.

hausa: Ya rasu a Osaka a ranar Talata.
english: He died in Osaka on Tuesday.

hausa: Baya ga kasancewa tsohon zakaran gasar Olamfik da na Duniya, a lokacin mutuwarsa Salto ya kasance shugaban kwamitin horas da ‘yan wasa na Tarayyar Ƙungiyoyin Judo na ƙasar Japan.
english: As well as a former Olympic and World champion, Saito was the All Japan Judo Federation training committee chairman at the time of his death.

hausa: Aƙalla mutane 100 ne suka halarci walimar, don murnar cikar shekara guda ta ma’auratan da aka ɗaura wa aure shekarar da ta gabata.
english: At least 100 people had attended the party, in order to celebrate the first anniversary of a couple whose wedding was held last year.

hausa: An shirya taron bikin kewayon shekara zuwa wani lokaci na gaba, jami'an sun ce.
english: A formal anniversary event was scheduled for a later date, officials said.

hausa: Ma'auratan sun yi aure a Texas shekara guda da ta gabata kuma sun zo Buffalo don yin biki tare da abokai da dangi.
english: The couple had married in Texas one year ago and came to Buffalo to celebrate with friends and relatives.

hausa: Mijin mai shekaru 30, wanda haifaffen garin Buffalo, yana ɗaya daga cikin mutane huɗun da aka kashe a harbin, amma matarsa bata sami rauni ba.
english: The 30-year-old husband, who was born in Buffalo, was one of the four killed in the shooting, but his wife was not hurt.

hausa: Karno sanannen ne amman malamin turanci ne mai jayayya wanda ya koyar a ƙarƙashin Modern Education da King’s Glory wadda yake ikirarin ya yi ɗalibai dubu 9,000 a ganiyar aikinsa na koyarwa.
english: Karno is a well-known but controversial English tutor who taught under Modern Education and King's Glory who claimed to have 9,000 students at the peak of his career.

hausa: A cikin rubutunsa ya yi amfani da kalmomi waɗanda wasu iyayen suke ganin ba su dace ba, kuma an ruwaito cewa ya yi amfani da kalmomin ɓatanci a cikin aji.
english: In his notes he used words which some parents considered coarse, and he reportedly used profanity in class.

hausa: Ilimin Zamani ya zarge shi da buga manyan tallace-tallace a jikin motocin bas ba tare da izini ba da kuma yin ƙaryar cewa shi ne babban malamin Turanci.
english: Modern Education accused him of printing large advertisements on buses without authorisation and lying by saying that he was the chief English tutor.

hausa: An kuma zarge shi a baya da keta haƙƙin mallaka, amma ba a tuhume shi ba.
english: He has also been accused previously of copyright infringement, but was not charged.

hausa: Wani tsohon ɗalibi ya faɗa cewa ya ‘yi amfani da wani harshe na dabam, ya koyar da dabarun soyayya a rubuce, sannan ya zama kamar abokin ɗaliban.’
english: A former student said that he 'used slang in class, taught dating skills in notes, and was just like the students' friend.'

hausa: A cikin shekaru talatin da suka gabata, duk da kasancewarta a matsayin kwaminisanci a hukumance, China ta bunƙasa tattalin arziƙin kasuwa.
english: During the last three decades, despite officially remaining a communist state, China has developed a market economy.

hausa: Sauye-sauyen tattalin arziƙi na farko ta gudana ne a ƙarƙashin jagorancin Deng Xiaoping.
english: The first economic reforms were made under the leadership of Deng Xiaoping.

hausa: Tun lokacin, tattalin arziƙin China ya ƙaru har sau 90.
english: Since then, China's economic size has grown by 90 times.

hausa: A karo na farko, shekarar da ta gabata ƙasar China ta fitar da mafi yawan motoci fiye da Jamus sannan ta zarce America a matsayin mafi girman kasuwa a wannan masana’anta.
english: For the first time, last year China exported more cars than Germany and surpassed the United States as the biggest market for this industry.

hausa: GDP ɗin China zai iya girma fiye da Amurka cikin shekaru ashirin.
english: China's GDP could be larger than the United States within two decades.

hausa: Guguwar Daniell na ƙasashe masu zafi, guguwa ta huɗu da aka sakawa suna a Atlantic hurricane na 2010, ya kafu a gabashin tekun atlantic.
english: Tropical Storm Danielle, fourth named storm of the 2010 Atlantic hurricane season, has formed in the eastern Atlantic Ocean.

hausa: Guguwar, da ke da nisan kimanin mil 3,000 daga Miami, Florida, na tare da iska mai ƙarfi da ke gudun mil 40 a awa guda (64 kph).
english: The storm, located approximately 3,000 miles from Miami, Florida, has maximum sustained winds of 40 mph (64 kph).

hausa: Masana kimiyya a Cibiyar Guguwa ta Ƙasa sun yi hasashen cewa Danielle za ta yi ƙarfi ta zama guguwa zuwa Laraba.
english: Scientists at the National Hurricane Center predict that Danielle will strengthen to a hurricane by Wednesday.

hausa: Tun da guguwar tayi nisa da doron ƙasa, abu ne mawuyaci a iya tantance irin tasirin da za ta haifar ga Amurka ko yankin Caribbean.
english: As the storm is far from landfall, it remains difficult to assess potential impact to the United States or Caribbean.

hausa: Haifafen birnin tarayyan Croatia, Zagreb, Bobek ya samu shahara yayinda yake yi wa Partizan Belgrade wasa.
english: Born in the Croatian capital, Zagreb, Bobek gained fame while playing for Partizan Belgrade.

hausa: Ya haɗe da su a cikin 1945 kuma ya kasance har zuwa 1958.
english: He joined them in 1945 and stayed until 1958.

hausa: A zaman shi da ƙungiyar, ya ci ƙwallaye 403 a fitowa 468.
english: During his time with the team, he scored 403 goals in 468 appearances.

hausa: Babu wanda yayi yawan fitowan wasanni ko zura ƙwallaye mafi yawa wa ƙungiyar kamar Bobek.
english: No one else has ever made more appearances or scored more goals for the club than Bobek.

hausa: A 1995 an zaɓe shi ɗan wasa mafi kyau a tarihin Partizan.
english: In 1995 he was voted the best player in Partizan's history.

hausa: Bikin ya fara da nuni na musamman daga mashahuriyar ƙungiyar nan ta duniya Cirque du Soleil.
english: The celebrations started with a special show by the world-renowned group Cirque du Soleil.

hausa: Istanbul State Symphony Orchestra suka biyo baya, ƙungiyar Janissary, da mawaƙa Fatih Erkoç da Müslüm Gürses.
english: It was followed by the Istanbul State Symphony Orchestra, a Janissary band, and the singers Fatih Erkoç and Müslüm Gürses.

hausa: Daga nan Muridai Masu Juyi suka shiga fagen.
english: Then Whirling Dervishes took to the stage.

hausa: Shahararriyar mawaƙiyar Turkiyya Sezen Aksu ta yi waƙa tare da mawaƙin tenor ɗan ƙasar Italiya Alessandro Safina da kuma mawaƙin Girka Haris Alexiou.
english: Turkish diva Sezen Aksu performed with the Italian tenor Alessandro Safina and Greek singer Haris Alexiou.

hausa: Domin kammalawa, ƙungiyar rawa daga Turkiya wato Fire of Anatolia sun yi wasan “Troy”.
english: To finish, Turkish dance group Fire of Anatolia performed the show "Troy".

hausa: Peter Lenz, wani ɗan tseren babur mai shekaru 13, ya mutu bayan da ya samu hatsari a Titin Tseren Mota na Indianapolis.
english: Peter Lenz, a 13-year-old motorcycle racer, has died after being involved in a crash at the Indianapolis Motor Speedway.

hausa: Yayin da ya ke zagayen motsa jiki, Lenz ya faɗo daga kan kekensa, inda abokin tserensa Xavier Zayat ya buge shi.
english: While on his warm-up lap, Lenz fell off his bike, and was then struck by fellow racer Xavier Zayat.

hausa: Nan da nan ma'aikatan asibitin filin wasan suka tarbe shi suka mayar dashi wani asibitin gida inda daga baya ya mutu.
english: He was immediately attended to by the on-track medical staff and transported to a local hospital where he later died.

hausa: Zayat bai sami rauni ba a cikin haɗarin.
english: Zayat was unhurt in the accident.

hausa: Game da yanayin hada-hadar kuɗi a duniya, Zapatero ya ci gaba da cewa “tsarin kuɗi wani bangare ne na tattalin arziƙi, kuma mai matuƙar muhimmanci.
english: Regarding the global financial situation, Zapatero continued by saying that "the financial system is a part of the economy, a crucial part.

hausa: Mun sami rikicin rashin kuɗi na tsawon shekara guda, wanda ya tsananta matuƙa a cikin watanni biyu da suka gabata, kuma ina tsammanin yanzu kasuwannin sha’anin kuɗi sun fara murmurewa.”
english: We have a year-long financial crisis, which has had its most acute moment in the past two months, and I think now the financial markets are beginning to recover."

hausa: A makon da ya gabata, Naked News ta ba da sanarwar cewa za ta ƙara ƙarfin ikon harshenta a duniya zuwa rahoton labarai, tare da sabbin labarai uku.
english: Last week, Naked News announced that it would dramatically increase its international language mandate to news reporting, with three new broadcasts.

hausa: Dama tana rahoto a Ingilishi da harshen Japan, ƙungiyar ta duniya za ta ƙaddamar da shirye-shiryen harsunan Spanish, Italiyanci, da yaren Koriya, don talabijin, yanar-gizo, da kuma na'urorin tafi-da-gidanka.
english: Already reporting in English and Japanese, the global organization is launching Spanish, Italian, and Korean-language programs, for television, the web, and mobile devices.

hausa: “Cikin sa’a babu abun da ya faru da ni, amma na ga abun tashin hankali, yayin da mutane suke ƙaƙarin fasa tagogi domin su fita.
english: "Luckily nothing happened to me, but I saw a macabre scene, as people tried to break windows in order to get out.

hausa: Mutane na buga ƙyauren tagogin da kujeru, amma tagogin ba masu fashewa ba ne.
english: People were hitting the panes with chairs, but the windows were unbreakable.

hausa: Ɗaya daga cikin mumurfin tagar ya karye daga ƙarshe, sai suka fara fita ta taga," inji Franciszek Kowal wanda ya tsira.
english: One of the panes finally broke, and they started to get out by the window," said survivor Franciszek Kowal.

hausa: Taurari suna fitar da wuta da zafi saboda ƙarfin da aka samo yayin da aka haɗa ƙwayar Hydrogen (ko aka hada) tare domin haifar abubuwa masu nauyi.
english: Stars give off light and heat because of the energy made when hydrogen atoms are merged (or fused) together to form heavier elements.

hausa: Masana kimiyya suna aiki don ƙirƙirar wata na’ura da za ta sarrafa makamashi ta irin wannan hanya.
english: Scientists are working to create a reactor that can make energy in the same way.

hausa: Wannan, duk da haka, matsala ce mai matuƙar wahalar warwarewa kuma zai ɗauki shekaru da yawa kafin mu ga an gina na’urori haɗaka masu amfani.
english: This, however, is a very hard problem to solve and will take many years before we see useful fusion reactors built.

hausa: Allurar ƙarfen tana yawo a saman ruwa saboda kaurin saman ruwa.
english: The steel needle floats on top of the water because of surface tension.

hausa: Surface tension na faruwa ne saboda ƙananan kwayoyin cikin ruwa a farfajiyan ruwan suna matuƙar haɗuwa da juna saɓanin yadda suke da ƙananan ƙwayoyi na iska da ke samansu.
english: Surface tension happens because the water molecules at the surface of the water are strongly attracted to each other more than they are to the air molecules above them.

hausa: ƙwayoyin ruwan suna yin wata fata da ba a gani a saman ruwa wadde ke ba da dama ga abubuwa kamar allura su riƙa yawo a saman ruwa.
english: The water molecules make an invisible skin on the water’s surface that allows things like the needle to float on top of the water.

hausa: Ƙarfen da ke kan takalman sulun ƙanƙara na zamani na da baki biyu da buɗaɗɗen rami tsakanin su. Gefen biyun suna ba da izini don kyakkyawan kama ƙanƙaran, koda kuwa an goge shi.
english: The blade on a modern ice skate has a double edge with a concave hollow between them. The two edges allow for a better grasp of the ice, even when tilted.

hausa: Saboda ƙasan wuƙar ta ɗan lanƙwashe, yayinda ƙarfen ya karkace daga gefe ɗaya zuwa wani gefen, tsinin wanda yake taɓa ƙanƙarar shi ma yana ɗan lanƙwashewa.
english: Because the bottom of the blade is slightly curved, as the blade tilts to one side or the other, the edge which is in contact with the ice also curves.

hausa: Wannan yana sa mai sulun ƙanƙarar ya juya. Idan takalman sulun ƙanƙarar ya juya dama, mai sulun ƙanƙarar zai juya dama,Idan takalman sulun ƙanƙarar ya juya hagu, mai sulun ƙanƙarar zai juya hagu.
english: This causes the skater to turn. If the skates tilt to the right, the skater turns right, if the skates tilt to the left, the skater turns left.

hausa: Don komowa kan matakin makamashinsu irin na baya, dole sai sun kawar da ƙarin makamashin da suka samu daga haske.
english: To return to their previous energy level, they must get rid of the extra energy they got from the light.

hausa: Suna yin wannan ta hanyar sakin wani ɗan ƙaramin hasken wuta da ake kira “photon”.
english: They do this by emitting a tiny particle of light called a "photon".

hausa: Masana kimiyya suna kiran wannan tsarin “stimulated emission of radiation” domin ana rura ƙwayar zarra ta hanyar wuta mai haske, wanda ke sa watsin hasken foton, kuma haske wata irin haskawa ne.
english: Scientists call this process "stimulated emission of radiation" because the atoms are stimulated by the bright light, causing the emission of a photon of light, and light is a type of radiation.

hausa: Hoto na gaba yana nuna ƙwayan zarra masu fitar da photons. Haƙiƙa, a zahiri photons sunfi ƙanƙanta akan waɗanda suke cikin hoton.
english: The next picture shows the atoms emitting photons. Of course, in reality photons are a lot smaller than those in the picture.

hausa: Photons suna da ƙanƙanci fiye da abin da ke ƙunshe cikin atom!
english: Photons are even smaller than the stuff that makes up atoms!

hausa: Bayan aiki na ɗaruruwan sa’o’i a ƙarshe sai zaren haske da ke cikin ƙwan fitilar ya ƙone daga nan ƙwan fitilar ya daina aiki.
english: After hundreds of hours of operation the filament in the bulb eventually burns out and the light bulb no longer works.

hausa: Sai kuma ƙwan fitilan lantarkin na buƙatan maye gurbi. Yana da muhimmanci a natsu wurin maye gurbin ƙwan fitilan.
english: The light bulb then needs replacing. It is necessary to be careful in replacing the light bulb.

hausa: Farko, ya kamata a kashe matatsar wutan ko kuma a katse haɗin wayar kebur ɗin.
english: First, the switch for the light fixture needs to be turned off or the cable disconnected.

hausa: Abinda yasa haka shine wutan lantarki da ke shiga socket a inda ƙarfe na jikin ƙwan fitila ke zaune na iya baka shokin mai tsanani idan ka taɓa cikin socket ko ƙarfen ƙasa na ƙwan fitilan yayinda rabin shi yake haɗe da socket ɗin.
english: This is because electricity flowing into the socket where the metallic part of bulb sits can give you a severe electric shock if you touch the inside of the socket or the metal base of the bulb while it is still partly in the socket.

hausa: Babban sashen jiki na tsarin magudanar jini shine zuciya, wacce ke harba jini.
english: The major organ of the circulatory system is the heart, which pumps the blood.

hausa: Jini na fitowa daga zuciya ta hanyoyin da ake kira arteries sannan ya na komawa cikin zuciya ta hanyoyin da ake kira veins. Mafi ƙanƙantar hanyoyi su ake kira da capillaries.
english: Blood goes away from the heart in tubes called arteries and comes back to the heart in tubes called veins. The smallest tubes are called capillaries.

hausa: Hakoran triceratop za su iya taune ba kawai ganye ba har ma da tsauraran rassa da saiwoyi.
english: A triceratops' teeth would have been able to crush not only leaves but even very tough branches and roots.

hausa: Wasu masana kimiyya suna tunanin Triceratops ne suka ci Cycads, wanda nau'in tsirrai ne da aka saba da shi a cikin Cretaceous.
english: Some scientists think Triceratops ate cycads, which are a type of plant that was common in the Cretaceous.

hausa: Waɗannan tsirrai suna kama da ƙananan bishiyar kwakwa da rawani mai kaifi, ganyaye masu ƙaya.
english: These plants look like a small palm tree with a crown of sharp, spiky leaves.

hausa: Triceratops na iya amfani da bakin sa mai ƙarfi don cire ganyen kafin cin gangar jikin bishiya.
english: A Triceratops could have used its strong beak to strip off the leaves before eating the trunk.

hausa: Wasu masana kimiyyar sun kawo hujjar cewa waɗannan tsirrai suna ɗauke da guba don haka zai yi wuya a ce kakannin ƙadangare sun cin su,  duk da yanzu sloth da sauran dabbobi kamar aku (jikokin kakannin ƙadangare) su kan ci ganyaye ko ƴaƴan itace masu guba.
english: Other scientists argue that these plants are very poisonous so it is unlikely that any dinosaur ate them, even though today the sloth and other animals like the parrot (a descendant of the dinosaurs) can eat poisonous leaves or fruit.

hausa: Ta yaya ne nauyin lo zai ja ni? Idan ku ka tsaya a farfajiyan Io, nauyin ku ba zai kai nauyin ku na kan duniyarmu ba.
english: How would Io's gravity pull on me? If you stood on the surface of Io, you would weigh less than you do on Earth.

hausa: Mutum mai nauyin fam 200 (90kg) a duniya zai yi kimanin fam 36 (16kg) a kan Io, Haka nauyin, ba shakka, yana jan ƙasa akan ku.
english: A person who weighs 200 pounds (90kg) on Earth would weigh about 36 pounds (16kg) on Io. So the gravity, of course, pulls less on you.

hausa: Rana ba ta da guri mai tauri kamar Duniya wanda za ka iya tsayawa a kai. Duka ranar ta ƙeru ne daga iskar gas, wuta, da kuma sinadarin plasma.
english: The Sun doesn't have a crust like the Earth that you can stand on. The whole Sun is made out of gases, fire, and plasma.

hausa: Iskar gas ɗin tana zama siriri yayin da kake ƙara nisa daga tsakiyar rana.
english: The gas becomes thinner as you go farther from the center of the Sun.

hausa: Ɓangaren da muke gani idan muka kalli Rana ana kiran sa photosphere, wanda yake nufin “ƙwallon haske”.
english: The outer-part we see when we look at the Sun is called the photosphere, which means "ball of light".

hausa: Kimanin shekaru dubu uku bayan haka, a cikin 1610, masanin ilimin taurari ɗan ƙasar Italiya Galileo Galilei ya yi amfani da na’urar hangen nesa don lura cewa Venus tana da matakai, kamar yadda wata yake da shi.
english: About three thousand years later, in 1610, Italian astronomer Galileo Galilei used a telescope to observe that Venus has phases, just as the moon does.

hausa: Matakan suna faruwa ne saboda kawai gefen Venus (ko na Wata) da ke fuskantar Rana yake yin haske. Matakan Venus sun goyi bayan ƙa'idar Copernicus cewa duniyoyin suna zagaya Rana.
english: Phases happen because only the side of Venus (or of the Moon) facing the Sun is lighted. The phases of Venus supported the theory of Copernicus that the planets go around the Sun.

hausa: Sai kuma a shekaru ƙalilian bayan haka a shekarar 1639, wani masanin ilimin taurari ɗan ƙasar Ingila mai suna Jeremiah Horrocks ya gano motsin tauraron Venus.
english: Then, a few years later in 1639, an English astronomer named Jeremiah Horrocks observed a transit of Venus.

hausa: England ta fuskanci doguwar lokacin salama bayan ta sake karɓe iko daga Danelaw.
english: England had experienced a long period of peace after the reconquest of the Danelaw.

hausa: Duk da haka a 991 Ethelred ta fuskanci annobar jirgin Viking wanda ya fi kowanne girma tun ƙarnin Guthrum a baya.
