english: However in 991 Ethelred was faced with a Viking fleet larger than any since Guthrum's a century earlier.

hausa: Wannan kwambar jiragen ruwan yaƙi ta kasance karkashin jagorancin Olaf Trygvasson, ɗan ƙasar Norway da ke da burin ƙwato ƙasarsa daga danniyar ƙasar Denmark.
english: This fleet was led by Olaf Trygvasson, a Norwegian with ambitions to reclaim his country from Danish domination.

hausa: Bayan koma bayan soja da aka samu da farko, Ethelred ya sami daidaituwa da Olaf, wanda ya koma Norway domin ƙoƙarin ƙwato masarautar sa, wadda ya sami nasara a wani wajen amma a wani wajen bai samu ba.
english: After initial military setbacks, Ethelred was able to agree to terms with Olaf, who returned to Norway to try to gain his kingdom with mixed success.

hausa: Hangeul shine kaɗai haruffai wadda aka ƙirƙira da gangan kuma ake amfani da shi kullum. An ƙirƙiro haruffan ne a 1444 a zamanin mulkin Sarki Sejong (1418 - 1450).
english: Hangeul is the only purposely invented alphabet in popular daily use. The alphabet was invented in 1444 during the reign of King Sejong (1418 – 1450).

hausa: Sarki Sajong shi ne sarki na huɗu a Daular Joseon kuma ɗaya daga cikin waɗanda aka fi ji da su.
english: King Sejong was the fourth king of the Joseon Dynasty and is one of the most highly regarded.

hausa: Asali ya sakawa haruffan Hangeul sunan Hunmin Jeongeum, wanda ke nufin “haruffa da su ka dace wajen koyar da mutane.
english: He originally named the Hangeul alphabet Hunmin Jeongeum, which means "the correct sounds for the instruction of the people".

hausa: Akwai hasashe da yawa kan yadda aka sami harshen Sanskrit. Ɗaya daga cikinsu shine game da hijirar jinsin Aryaniyawa daga yamma zuwa India waɗanda suka zo da yarensu.
english: There are many theories to how Sanskrit came into existence. One of them is about an Aryan migration from the west into India who brought their language with them.

hausa: Sanskrit tsohon harshe ne wanda za a iya kwatantawa da harshen Latin da ake magana da shi a Turai.
english: Sanskrit is an ancient language and is comparable to the Latin language spoken in Europe.

hausa: Littafin farko da aka sani a duniya an rubuta shi da Sanskrit. Bayan an haɗa Upanishads, sai Sanskrit ya ɓace saboda matsayi.
english: The earliest known book in the world was written in Sanskrit. After the compilation of Upanishads, Sanskrit just faded due to hierarchy.

hausa: Sanskrit yare ne mai faɗi da kuma wadatar gaske, wanda ya zama tushen harsunan Indiya na zamani da yawa , kamar yanda Latin shine tushen harsunan Turai kamar Faransanci da yaran spanish.
english: Sanskrit is a very complex and rich language, which has served to be the source for many modern Indian languages, just like Latin is the source for European languages like French and Spanish.

hausa: Tare da gama yaƙin Faransa, Jamus ta fara shirin mamaye tsibirin Biritaniya.
english: With the battle for France over, Germany began to get ready to invade the island of Britain.

hausa: Sunan lambar-sirri da Jamus ta sanya wa harin “Operation Sealion”. Yawancin manyan makamai da kayan sojojin Burtaniya sun ɓace lokacin da aka kwashe su daga Dunkirk, don haka sojojin ba su da ƙarfi.
english: Germany code-named the attack “Operation Sealion”. Most of the British Army's heavy weapons and supplies had been lost when it evacuated from Dunkirk, so the army was fairly weak.

hausa: Amma Rundunar Sojojin ruwa na Sarauta na da ƙarfi sosai fiye da rundunar sojojin ruwan Jamus (“Kriegsmarine”) kuma da ya salwantar da duk wani mamayewar jirgin ruwan da aka aika ƙetaren hanyar ruwan Ingila.
english: But the Royal Navy was still much stronger than the German Navy (“Kriegsmarine”) and could have destroyed any invasion fleet sent across the English Channel.

hausa: Dukda haka, jiragen ruwan Birtaniya ƙalilan ne su ke kusa da hanyoyin da ake tsammanin za’a kawo farmaki saboda shugabannin sojan na tsoron harin Jamus na sama na iya nutsar da su.
english: However, very few Royal Navy ships were based near the likely invasion routes as the admirals were afraid they would be sunk by German air attack.

hausa: Bari mu fara da bayani game da shirye-shiryen Italiya. Italiya ta kasance “ƙanin” Jamus da Japan.
english: Let's start with an explanation about Italy's plans. Italy was mainly the "little brother" of Germany and Japan.

hausa: Tana da rundunar sojan ƙasa da na ruwa marasa ƙarfi, duk da cewa sun ƙera sabbin jiragen ruwa guda huɗu kafin ɓarkewar yaƙin.
english: It had a weaker army and a weaker navy, although they had just built four new ships right before the beginning of the war.

hausa: Babban burin Italiya shine ƙasashen Afirka. Domin mamayar waɗannan ƙasashen, suna buƙatar samun wajen tara sojoji ta yadda rundunoninsu zasu iya ratsa tekun Bahr Rum su mamaye Afirka.
english: Italy's main goals were African countries. To capture those countries, they would need to have a troop launching pad, so as troops could sail across the Mediterranean Sea and invade Africa.

hausa: Don hakan, dole ne su kawar da sansanoni da jiragen ruwan Birtaniya a Masar. Bayan waɗancan ayyukan, bai kamata  jiragen ruwan yaƙi na Italiya su yi wani abu ba.
english: For that, they had to get rid of British bases and ships in Egypt. Besides those actions, Italy's battleships were not supposed to do anything else.

hausa: Yanzu ga Japan. Japan ƙasa ce ta tsibiri, kamar Biritaniya.
english: Now for Japan. Japan was an island country, just like Britain.

hausa: An tsara Jiragen ƙarkashin ruwa domin yin tafiya a ƙarkashin ruwa, kuma su kasance a can na wani dogon lokaci.
english: Submarines are ships designed to travel underwater, and remain there for an extended amount of time.

hausa: An yi amfani da jiragen yaƙi masu tafiya a ƙarƙashin ruwa a Yaƙin Duniya na I da Yaƙin Duniya na II. A can baya ba su da sauri kuma ba su iya harbi mai nisa.
english: Submarines were used in World War I and World War II. Back then they were very slow and had a very limited shooting range.

hausa: A farkon yaƙin galibi suna tafiya akan saman teku, amma yayin da kimiyyar radar ta ƙara haɓakada kuma ƙwarancewa ta samu sosai  jiragen ƙarkashin teku basu da zaɓi dole sai sun yi nutso yadda ba za’a iya ganin su ba.
english: In the beginning of the war they mostly travelled on top of the sea, but as radar began developing and becoming more accurate the submarines were forced to go under water to avoid being seen.

hausa: Ana kiran jiragen ruwa masu nutso na ƙasar Jamus da sunan U-Boats. Jamusawa sun iya tuƙawa da sarrafa waɗannan jiragen ƙasan ruwan nasu.
english: German submarines were called U-Boats. The Germans were very good at navigating and operating their submarines.

hausa: Saboda nasarar da suke samu da jirage masu tafiya a ƙarƙashin ruwa, bayan yaƙin ba a yarda Jamusawa su riƙe su da yawa ba.
english: Because of their success with submarines, after the war Germans aren't trusted to have many of them.

hausa: Haka ne! Sarki Tutankhamun, wani lokaci ana kiransa “Sarki Tut” ko “Yaron Sarki”, ɗayan sanannun sarakunan Masar ne a zamanin yau.
english: Yes! King Tutankhamun, sometimes referred to as "King Tut" or "The Boy King", is one of the most well known ancient Egyptian kings in modern times.

hausa: Abin sha'awa, ba a ɗauke shi da muhimmanci sosai ba a zamanin da kuma ba a rubuta shi a cikin jerin sunayen tsoffin sarakuna ba.
english: Interestingly, he was not considered to be very important in ancient times and was not recorded on most ancient king lists.

hausa: Dukda haka, ganowar ƙabarin sa a 1922 ya maida shi shahararre. Yayin da ƙaburbura na baya suka fuskanci barazanan sata, an bar ƙabarin sa ba tare da hargitsa shi ba.
english: However, the discovery of his tomb in 1922 made him a celebrity. While many tombs of the past were robbed, this tomb was left virtually undisturbed.

hausa: Mafi yawan abubuwan da aka binne Tutankhamun da su an adana su sosai, ciki har da dubban kayan ƙawa waɗanda aka samar daga duwatsu masu daraja da waɗansu duwatsu da babu irinsu.
english: Most of the items buried with Tutankhamun have been well preserved, including thousands of artefacts made from precious metals and rare stones.

hausa: Ƙerawar sandar linzamin ya sa ƙurasain Assiriyawa ya zama da rashin nauyi, sauri da kuma shiri mai kyau domin su fi sojoji gudu da wasu ƙurasain.
english: The invention of spoke wheels made Assyrian chariots lighter, faster, and better prepared to outrun soldiers and other chariots.

hausa: Kibiyoyinsu daga kwari da bakar su masu haɗari na iya fasa kariyar sojojin abokan gaba. Wajajen shekaru 1000 B.C ƴan Asiriya su ka ƙirƙiri sojojin dawaki.
english: Arrows from their deadly crossbows could penetrate the armor of rival soldiers. About 1000 B.C., the Assyrians introduced the first cavalry.

hausa: Cavalry su ne rundunar sojan da ke yaƙi kan dawakai. Ba a ƙirƙiro sirdi a lokacin ba, don haka sojan dawakai na Assiriyawa sun yi yaƙi a kan tsuran bayan dawakan su.
english: A cavalry is an army that fights on horseback. The saddle had not yet been invented, so the Assyrian cavalry fought on the bare backs of their horses.

hausa: Mun san ‘yan siyasa, masana kimiyya da kuma masu nishaɗantarwa na Girka da dama. Mai yiwuwa mafi shaharar mutum a wannan al’ada shi ne Homer, fitaccen mawaƙin nan makaho, wanda ya rubuta fitattun ayyukan adabin Greek biyu: waƙoƙin Iliad da Odyssey.
english: We know many Greek politicians, scientists, and artists. Possibly the most known person of this culture is Homer, the legendary blind poet, who composed two masterpieces of Greek literature: the poems Iliad and Odyssey.

hausa: Sophocles da Aristophanes har yanzu shahararrun marubutan wasan kwaikwayo ne kuma ana ganin wasannin su suna daga cikin manyan ayyukan adabin duniya.
english: Sophocles and Aristophanes are still popular playwrights and their plays are considered to be among the greatest works of world literature.

hausa: Wani sanannen Bagirke mai ilimin lissafi Pythagoras, an san shi da fitaccen dabara dangane da dangantakar kusuryoyin right triangle.
english: Another famous Greek is a mathematician Pythagoras, mostly known for his famous theorem about relations of the sides of right triangles.

hausa: Akwai mabambantan ƙiyasi na yawan mutanen da ke jin harshen Hindi. An ƙiyasta cewa yana tsakanin harshe na biyu zuwa na huɗu cikin yarukan da aka fi magana da su a duniya.
english: There are varying estimates for how many people speak Hindi. It is estimated to be between the second and fourth most commonly spoken language in the world.

hausa: Adadin asalin masu magana da yaren ya bambanta idan an ƙidaya harsuna masu alaƙa da juna.
english: The number of native speakers varies depending on whether or not very closely related dialects are counted.

hausa: Kimantawa ta nuna masu magana da yaren sun kai tsakanin miliyan 340 zuwa miliyan 500, kuma kusan mutane miliyan 800 ne ke iya fahimtar yaren.
english: Estimates range from 340 million to 500 million speakers, and as many as 800 million people can understand the language.

hausa: Hindi da Urdu sun yi kama a kalmomi amma daban a rubutu; a tattaunawar yau da kullun, masu magana da harsunan biyu na iya fahimtar junan su.
english: Hindi and Urdu are similar in vocabulary but different in script; in everyday conversations, speakers of both languages can usually understand each other.

hausa: A wajejen ƙarni na 15, arewacin Estonia yana ƙarƙashin tasirin al’adu na ƙasar Jamus.
english: Around the 15th century, northern Estonia was under great cultural influence of Germany.

hausa: Wasu malaman addini na Jamus sun so su kawo Allah kusa da mutanen gargajiyan, saboda haka suka ƙirƙiro yaren Estonia.
english: Some German monks wanted to bring God closer to the native people, so they invented the Estonian literal language.

hausa: Ya dogara da harafin Jamusanci kuma an ƙara harafi ɗaya “Õ / õ”.
english: It was based on the German alphabet and one character "Õ/õ" was added.

hausa: Yayin da zamani ya yi nisa, yawancin kalmomin da aka aro daga Jamusanci sun haɗe. Wannan shi ne farko zamanin wayewa.
english: As time passed, many words that were borrowed from German coalesced. This was the beginning of enlightenment.

hausa: A al’adance, wanda zai gaji sarautar kai tsaye zai tafi ne ga sojoji bayan kammala makaranta.
english: Traditionally, the heir to the throne would go straight into the military after finishing school.

hausa: Duk da haka, Charles ya halarci jami'a a Trinity College, Cambridge inda ya karanci Ilimin Al’ummomi da Al’adu da kuma Ilimin Nazarin Kayan Tarihi, kuma daga bisani Tarihi, ya sami maki 2:2 (digiri ajin ƙasa na biyu).
english: However, Charles went to university at Trinity College, Cambridge where he studied Anthropology and Archaeology, and later History, earning a 2:2 (a lower second class degree).

hausa: Charles shi ne memba na farko cikin dangin Sarauta na Burtaniya da aka ba shi digiri.
english: Charles was the first member of the British Royal Family to be awarded a degree.

hausa: Turkiyyar Turai (wato gabashin Thrace ko Rumelia da ke cikin sashen tsibirin Balkan) ya ƙunshi kashi 3% ne na ƙasar.
english: European Turkey (eastern Thrace or Rumelia in the Balkan peninsula) includes 3% of the country.

hausa: Faɗin ƙasar Turkiyya ya kai tsawon kilomita 1,600 (mil 1,000) da kuma faɗin kilomita 800 (mil 500), mai shatin kusurwoyi guda huɗu.
english: The territory of Turkey is more than 1,600 kilometres (1,000 mi) long and 800 km (500 mi) wide, with a roughly rectangular shape.

hausa: Yankin Turkiyya, wanda ya haɗa da tabkuna, ya mamaye kilomita square 783,562 (300,948 sq mi), wanda kilomita square 755,688 (kilomita 291,773) yana kudu maso yammacin Asiya da kuma kilomita square 23,764 (9,174 sq mi) a Turai.
english: Turkey's area, including lakes, occupies 783,562 square kilometres (300,948 sq mi), of which 755,688 square kilometres (291,773 sq mi) are in south west Asia and 23,764 square kilometres (9,174 sq mi) in Europe.

hausa: Faɗin yankin Turkiyya ya sanya ta kasance ƙasa ta 37 mafi girma a duniya, ta kai girman ƙasashen Faransa da Birtaniya a haɗe.
english: Turkey's area makes it the world's 37th-largest country, and is about the size of Metropolitan France and the United Kingdom combined.

hausa: Ƙasar turkiya tana zagaye da tekuna guda uku a gefe uku: Tekun Aegean a yamma, da Baƙin teku a arewa sai kuma na Bahar rum a kudanci.
english: Turkey is encircled by seas on three sides: the Aegean Sea to the west, the Black Sea to the north and the Mediterranean Sea to the south.

hausa: Luxembourg tana da dogon tarihi amma samin ƴancinta ya samo asali ne daga 1839.
english: Luxembourg has a long history but its independence dates from 1839.

hausa: Sassan yanzu na ƙasar Belgium, a baya sun kasance ɓangare ne na Luxembourg waɗanda a lokacin juyin juya hali na shekarun 1830 su ka komo Belgium.
english: Present-day parts of Belgium were part of Luxembourg in the past but became Belgian after the 1830s Belgian Revolution.

hausa: Luxembourg a kodayaushe ta kan yi ƙoƙarin kasancewarta ƙasa ‘yar ba-ruwanmu amma Jamus ta mamaye ta a yaƙin Duniya na Ɗaya da Yaƙin Duniya na Biyu.
english: Luxembourg has always tried to remain a neutral country but it was occupied in both World War I and World War II by Germany.

hausa: A 1957 Luxembourg ta zama ɗaya daga membobin da suka kafa ƙungiyar da aka sani yanzu da suna European Union.
english: In 1957 Luxembourg became a founding member of the organization which is today known as the European Union.

hausa: Drukgyal Dzong tsohon birni ne da ya rushe wanda ake bautar addinin Buddha da ke arewa da gundumar Paro (a ƙauyen Phondey).
english: The Drukgyal Dzong is a ruined fortress and Buddhist monastery in the upper part of the Paro District (in Phondey Village).

hausa: An ce a 1649, Zhabdrung Ngawang Namgyel ya ƙirƙiri birni don tunawa da nasarar da ya samu a kan sojojin Tibet-Mongol.
english: It is said that in 1649, Zhabdrung Ngawang Namgyel created the fortress to commemorate his victory against the Tibetan-Mongol forces.

hausa: A 1951, wutar da ta tashi domin zama wata shaidar Drukgyal Dzong ya ci gaba da wanzuwa, kamar hotunan Zhabdrung Ngawang Namgyal.
english: In 1951, a fire caused for only some of the relics of the Drukgyal Dzong to remain, such as the image of Zhabdrung Ngawang Namgyal.

hausa: Bayan wutar, an kiyaye sansanin soja da kariya, ya kasance ɗaya daga cikin abubuwan jan hankali na Bhutan.
english: After the fire, the fortress was preserved and protected, remaining to be one of Bhutan's most sensational attractions.

hausa: A ƙarni na 18 Cambodia ta sami kanta a matse tsakanin ƙarfafan maƙwabta biyu, Thailand da Vietnam.
english: During the 18th century Cambodia found itself squeezed between two powerful neighbors, Thailand and Vietnam.

hausa: Ƴan Thailand sun mamaye Cambodia lokuta da yawa a ƙarni na 18 a kuma shekarar 1772 suka rusa Phnom Phen.
english: The Thais invaded Cambodia several times in the 18th century and in 1772 they destroyed Phnom Phen.

hausa: A shekarun ƙarshe na karni 18 ‘yan Vietnam sun mamaye Cambodia.
english: In the last years of the 18th century the Vietnamese also invaded Cambodia.

hausa: Kashi goma sha takwas na ƴan Venezuela ba su da aiki, kuma mafi yawan waɗanda ke da aiki suna aiki ne a ƙananan masana’antu.
english: Eighteen percent of Venezuelans are unemployed, and most of those who are employed work in the informal economy.

hausa: Kashi biyu bisa uku na mutanen Venezuela dake aiki na aiki ne a sashen ma’aikatu, ɗaya bisa huɗu kuma na aiki a masana’antu, sai kashi ɗaya cikin biyar a noma.
english: Two thirds of Venezuelans who work do so in the service sector, nearly a quarter work in industry and a fifth work in agriculture.

hausa: Wata muhimmiyar masana'antu ga 'yan Venezuela ita ce mai, inda ƙasar ta kasance mai fitar da kayayyaki zuwa ƙasashe, kodayake kashi ɗaya cikin ɗari ne ke aiki a masana'antar mai.
english: An important industry for Venezuelans is oil, where the country is a net exporter, even though only one percent work in the oil industry.

hausa: A farko farkon samun ƴanci ƙasa, ƙwarewar masana lambu na ƙasar Singapore sun taimaka wajen maida ta tsibiri mai cike da tsirrai a yanki mai zafin yanayi.
english: Early in the nation's independence, Singapore Botanic Gardens' expertise helped to transform the island into a tropical Garden City.

hausa: A shekarar 1981, an zaɓi furen Vanda Miss Joaquim, wanda ake samarwa ta barbara a gona, a matsayin furen ƙasa.
english: In 1981, Vanda Miss Joaquim, an orchid hybrid, was chosen as the nation's national flower.

hausa: Kowace shekara a watan Oktoba kusan dabbobi masu cin ciyawa miliyan 1.5 suke tafiya zuwa tuddan kudu, suna ƙetare Kogin Mara, daga tuddan arewa don ruwan sama.
english: Every year around October nearly 1.5 million herbivores travel towards the southern plains, crossing the Mara River, from the northern hills for the rains.

hausa: sai kuma dawowa arewa ta yamma, sake tsallake kogin Mara, bayan ruwan sama a wajen watan Afrilu.
english: And then back to the north through the west, once again crossing the Mara river, after the rains in around April.

hausa: Yankin Serengeti yana ɗauke da wajen shaƙatawa na Serengeti, Yankin Kiyayewa na Ngorongoro da wajen Keɓe Namomin Daji na Maswa a Tanzania da ma wajen namun daji Maasai Mara na ƙasa a Kenya.
english: The Serengeti region contains the Serengeti National Park, the Ngorongoro Conservation Area and Maswa Game Reserve in Tanzania and the Maasai Mara National Reserve in Kenya.

hausa: Koyo don ƙirƙirar kafofin watsa labarai masu hulɗa yana buƙatar ƙwarewa na al'ada da na gargajiya, gami da kayan aikin da aka ƙware a cikin azuzuwan hulɗa (haɗa labarai, gyaran murya da bidiyo, ba da labari, da sauransu)
english: Learning to create interactive media requires conventional and traditional skills, as well as tools mastered in interactive classes (storyboarding, audio and video editing, story telling, etc.)

hausa: Zayyana ta cuɗanya tana buƙatar da ka sake duba hasashen ka game da shirin kafofin yaɗa labarai sannan ka koyi yin tunani ba ta fuska ɗaya ba.
english: Interactive design requires that you re-assess your assumptions about media production and learn to think in a non-linear ways.

hausa: Zayyana ta cuɗanya na buƙatar cewa kowane sashe na haɗe da juna amma kuma ɗaiɗaikun abubuwan su kasance da ma’ana idan su na ware.
english: Interactive design requires that components of a project connect to each other, but also make sense as a separate entity.

hausa: Rashin alfanun tabarau mai ƙara girma shine cewa wahalar tsayar da gani da kuma yawan kayan gilashin da ake buƙata domin cim ma wasu jerin focal length ya fi girma akan gilasan ƙayyadajjen gani.
english: The disadvantage of zoom lenses is that the focal complexity and number of lens elements required to achieve a range of focal lengths is much greater than for prime lenses.

hausa: Wannan na kasancewa ba matsala ba saboda masu ƙirar madubin sun cimma wani matsayi babba a wajen ƙera madubi.
english: This is becoming less of an issue as lens manufacturers achieve higher standards in lens production.

hausa: Wannan ya ba wa tabarau mai ƙara girma dama wajen samar da ingantattun hotuna fiye da na tabarau mai taƙaitaccen focal lenth.
english: This has allowed zoom lenses to produce pictures of a quality comparable to that achieved by lenses with fixed focal length.

hausa: Wani nakasun tabarau mai ƙara girma shine girman faɗin ƙofar da haske ke shiga (saurinta) mai rauni ne.
english: Another disadvantage of zoom lenses is that the maximum aperture (the speed) of the lens is usually lower.

hausa: Wannan yana sanya tabarau mai ƙara girma mara tsada wahalar amfani a cikin yanayi mai haske kaɗan ba tare da walƙiya ba.
english: This makes inexpensive zoom lenses hard to use in low-light conditions without a flash.

hausa: Ɗaya daga cikin matsalolin da aka fi samu yayin ƙoƙarin juya fim zuwa tsarin DVD shine overscan.
english: One of the most common problems when trying to convert a movie to DVD format is the overscan.

hausa: Yawancin telebijin ana yin su ne ta hanyar da za ta faranta wa jama'a rai.
english: Most televisions are made in a way to please the general public.

hausa: Bisa wannan dalilin, dukkan wani abu da ka gani a Telebijin an yanyanke iyakokin shi daga ta sama da ƙasa da kuma gefensa.
english: For that reason, everything you see on the TV had the borders cut, top, bottom and sides.

hausa: Ana yin wannan don tabbatar da cewa hoton ya rufe dukkan allo. Wannan shi ake kira overscan.
english: This is made to ensure that the image covers the whole screen. That is called overscan.

hausa: Abun takaici, idan kayi DVD, ana iya yanka iyakokin ta ma, kuma idan bidiyon suna da rubutun ɗab'i kusa da ƙasa, ba za a nuna su gabaɗaya ba.
english: Unfortunately, when you make a DVD, it's borders will most likely be cut too, and if the video had subtitles too close to the bottom, they won't be fully shown.

hausa: Fadar tarihin gargajiya ta daɗe da tsuma tunani, tattaro hotunan abubuwan ban sha'awa, bukukuwa da jarumta na Arthurian.
english: The traditional medieval castle has long inspired the imagination, conjuring up images of jousts, banquets and Arthurian chivalry.

hausa: Ko da a tsaye a cikin lalacewan shekaru dubu yana da sauƙi mu tuna da sautuna da ƙanshi na fadace-fadace da suka daɗe da wucewa, don kusan jin motsin murfi a kan cobbles kuma ku ji ƙanshin fargabar dake tashi daga ramin kurkukun.
english: Even standing amidst thousand year-old ruins it is easy to bring to mind the sounds and smells of battles long gone, to almost hear the clatter of hooves on the cobbles and to smell the fear rising from the dungeon pits.

hausa: Shin tunaninmu kuwa ya dogara a kan zahirin al’amari? Ina dalilin da aka fara gina fada tun asali? ta yaya aka tsara kuma aka gina su?
english: But is our imagination based on reality? Why were castles built in the first place? How were they designed and built?

hausa: Kamar yadda ya ke a zamanin, Fadar Kirby Muxloe yafi kama da zagayayyen gida maimakon fadar gaske.
english: Typical for the period, Kirby Muxloe Castle is more of a fortified house than a true castle.

hausa: Manyan tagoginsa da ke liƙe da gilashi da siraran katangu ba za su iya jure wani shiryayyen hari na dogon lokaci ba.
english: Its large glazed windows and thin walls would not have been able to resist a determined attack for long.

hausa: A cikin 1480s, lokacin da Lord Hastings ya fara ginin ta, ƙasar ta kasance cikin kwanciyar hankali kuma ana buƙatar kariya ne kawai daga ƙananan ƙungiyoyin masu satar hanya.
english: In the 1480s, when its construction was begun by Lord Hastings, the country was relatively peaceful and defense was only required against small bands of roving marauders.

hausa: Daidaiton iko wani tsari ne wanda ƙasashen Turai suka yi amfani da shi domin tabbatar da ƴancinkan duk ƙasashen yankin Turai.
english: The balance of power was a system in which European nations sought to maintain the national sovereignty of all European states.

hausa: Manufar ita ce cewa duk ƙasashen Turai dole ne su nemi hana wata ƙasa ta zama mai ƙarfin iko, don haka gwamnatocin ƙasashe sau da yawa sukan sauya ƙawancensu don kiyaye daidaiton.
english: The concept was that all European nations had to seek to prevent one nation from becoming powerful, and thus national governments often changed their alliances in order to maintain the balance.

hausa: Yaƙin mallaka na Mutanen Espanya ya nuna farkon yaƙin wanda babban batunsa shine daidaiton iko.
english: The War of Spanish Succession marked the first war whose central issue was the balance of power.

hausa: Wannan ya nuna sauyi mai mahimmancin, da Masu ikon Turai ba za su fake da zama yaƙeƙen addini ba. Sabo da haka, yaƙin shekara talatin zai kasance yaƙi na ƙarshe wanda za a kira yaƙin addini.
english: This marked an important change, as European powers would no longer have the pretext of being religious wars. Thus, the Thirty Years' War would be the last war to be labeled a religious war.

hausa: An rushe majami'ar Artemis a Ephesus a ranar 21 a Yuli, 356 BCE a cinna mashi wuta da Herostratus ya aikata.
english: The temple of Artemis at Ephesus was destroyed on July 21, 356 BCE in an act of arson committed by Herostratus.

hausa: Kamar yadda labarin ya ce, abin da ya ba shi ƙwarin guiwa shi ne neman suna ta kowane hali. Afisawa, cikin fushi, suka ba da sanarwar cewa ba za a taɓa rubuta sunan Herostratus ba.
english: According to the story, his motivation was fame at any cost. The Ephesians, outraged, announced that Herostratus' name never be recorded.

hausa: Masanin tarihin Girka Strabo ya lura da sunan daga baya, wanda shine yadda muka sani a yau. An rusa majami'ar a cikin daren da aka haifi Alexander the Great .
english: The Greek historian Strabo later noted the name, which is how we know today. The temple was destroyed on the same night that Alexander the Great was born.

hausa: Alexander, a matsayin sa na sarki, ya ba da kuɗi don sake gina majami'a, amma ba a karɓi tayin nasa ba. Bayan haka, bayan Alexander ya mutu, aka sake gina majami'ar a 323 BCE.
english: Alexander, as king, offered to pay to rebuild the temple, but his offer was denied. Later, after Alexander died, the temple was rebuilt in 323 BCE.

hausa: Tabbata cewa hannunku suna a sake daidai gwargwado yayin da kake bugun kiɗa daidai - kuma yi ƙoƙarin kada kuyi ƙarin motsin da yatsunku.
english: Make sure your hand is as relaxed as possible while still hitting all the notes correctly - also try not to make much extraneous motion with your fingers.

hausa: Wannan hanyar, za ku gajiyar da kanku kamar kaɗan daidai gwargwado. Ku tuna cewa babu buƙatar a bugi makullin da ƙarfi sosai don ƙarin murya kamar a kan fiyano.
english: This way, you will tire yourself out as little as possible. Remember there's no need to hit the keys with a lot of force for extra volume like on the piano.

hausa: A accordion, domin samun ƙarin yawa, ka yi amfani da mabushi da ƙarfi ko sauri.
english: On the accordion, to get extra volume, you use the bellows with more pressure or speed.

hausa: Sufanci shine bin tarayya da, shaida tare da, ko sani a hayyaci na ainihin gaskiya, allahntaka, gaskiyar ruhaniya, ko Allah.
english: Mysticism is the pursuit of communion with, identity with, or conscious awareness of an ultimate reality, divinity, spiritual truth, or God.

hausa: Mai imani yana neman wata ƙwarewa, ilhama, ko basira kai tsaye a cikin tabbacin Ubangiji/allah ko alloli.
english: The believer seeks a direct experience, intuition, or insight into divine reality/the deity or dieties.

hausa: Mabiya suna bin wasu hanyoyi na rayuwa, ko ayyukan da aka yi niyyar haɓaka waɗancan ƙwarewar.
english: Followers pursue certain ways of living, or practices that are intended to nurture those experiences.

hausa: Za a iya babbance ilimin sufanci daga sauran imanin addinai da ibada ta hanyar girmamawa ga ƙwarewar kai tsaye na wani yanayi na musamman, musamman na zaman lafiya, mai hankali, ni'ima, ko ma mai tsananin farin ciki.
english: Mysticism can be distinguished from other forms of religious belief and worship by its emphasis on the direct personal experience of a unique state of consciousness, particularly those of a peaceful, insightful, blissful, or even ecstatic character.

hausa: Sikhism addini ne daga yankin India. Ya samo asali ne daga yankin Punjab a lokacin ƙarni na 15 daga rarrabuwa tsakanin mazhabobin Hindu.
english: Sikhism is a religion from the Indian sub-continent. It originated in the Punjab region during the 15th century from a sectarian split within the Hindu tradition.

hausa: Mabiya addinin Sikh dai na ɗaukar imanin su a matsayin masu bin wani addini na daban da addinin Hindu duk da cewa ma suna ɗaukar addinin Hindun a matsayin tushe dama al’adarsu.
english: Sikhs consider their faith to be a separate religion from Hinduism though they acknowledge its Hindu roots and traditions.

hausa: Mutanen Sikh suna kiran addininsu Gurmat, wanda shine Punjabi ga “al'adar Guru”. Guru shine muhimmin ɓangare na dukkanin addinan Indiya amma a cikin Sikhism ya ɗauki mahimmancin da ke samar da asalin imanin Sikh.
english: Sikhs call their religion Gurmat, which is Punjabi for "way of the guru". The guru is a fundamental aspect of all Indian religions but in Sikhism has taken on an importance that forms the core of Sikh beliefs.

hausa: An kafa adinin a ƙarni na 15 wanda Guru Nanak (1469 - 1539) yayi. Sannan a ka biyo da waɗanda suka ci gadon sarauta wasu gurus guda tara.
english: The religion was founded in the 15th century by Guru Nanak (1469–1539). There followed in succession a further nine gurus.

hausa: Dukda haka, a watan Yuni ta 1956, an gwada alƙawuran Krushchev a lokacin da tarzoma a Poland, inda ma'aikata ke zanga-zangar adawa da ƙarancin abinci da rage albashi, ta rikiɗe zuwa zanga-zangar gama gari ta adawa da Kwaminisanci.
english: However, in June 1956, Krushchev's promises were put to the test when riots in Poland, where workers were protesting against food shortages and wage cuts, turned into a general protest against Communism.

hausa: Koda yake a ƙarshe, Kruschev ya aika da tankokin yaƙi don maido da zaman lafiya, amma ya amince da wasu buƙatun tattalin arziƙi da kuma yarda da naɗa mutumin nan mai farin jini Wladyslaw Gomulka a matsayin sabon firayin minista.
english: Although in the end, Krushchev sent in tanks to restore order, he did give way to some economic demands and agreed to appoint the popular Wladyslaw Gomulka as the new prime minister.

hausa: Wayewar-kai na Kwarin Indus wata wayewar-kai na Zamanin Tagulla ce a arewa maso yamma na ƙaramar nahiyar Indiya wadda ta ƙunshi yawancin ƙasar Pakistan na zamanin yau da kuma wasu yankuna a cikin arewa maso yamma na Indiya da kuma arewa maso gabas na ƙasar Afganistan.
english: The Indus Valley Civilization was a Bronze Age civilisation in the northwest Indian subcontinent encompassing most of modern-day Pakistan and some regions in northwest India and northeast Afghanistan.

hausa: Wayewa ya bunƙasa a kewayen kogin Indus ta inda ya samo sunansa.
english: The civilisation flourished in the basins of the Indus River wherefore it derives its name.

hausa: Koda yake wasu masana suna hasashen cewa tun da wayewa ya wanzu a kwarin kogin Sarasvati da yanzu ya ƙafe, ya kamata a kira shi da wayewar Indus-Sarasvati, yayin da wasu ke kiransa da wayewan Haraffa, yankin da aka fara haƙewa a shekarun 1920.
english: Although some scholars speculate that since the civilisation also existed in the basins of the now dried up Sarasvati River, it should be aptly called the Indus-Sarasvati Civilization, while some call it the Harappan Civilization after Harappa, the first of its sites to be excavated in the 1920s.

hausa: Yanayin Roman empire da ke ɗauke da salon soja ya taimaka wajen ci gaba a fanni lafiya.
english: The militaristic nature of the Roman empire aided in the development of medical advances.

hausa: Sarki Augustus ya fara ɗaukar likitoci aiki inda har ya kafa Ƙungiyar Likitocin Rum ta farko domin amfani da ita bayan yaƙi.
english: Doctors began to be recruited by Emperor Augustus and even formed the first Roman Medical Corps for use in the aftermath of battles.

hausa: Likitocin fiɗa suna da ilimin magunguna daban-daban na kashe jiki waɗanda suka haɗa da sinadarin morphine daga irin poppy da scopolamine da aka samo daga irin herbane.
english: Surgeons had knowledge of various sedatives including morphine from extracts of poppy seeds and scopolamine from herbane seeds.

hausa: Sun ƙware wajen yanke gaɓoɓi don kare masu ciwo daga ruɓewar sashen jiki da kuma kayan aikin matse jijiyoyi don tsayar da gudanar jini.
english: They became proficient at amputation to save patients from gangrene as well as tourniquets and arterial clamps to stem blood flow.

hausa: A cikin ƙarnoni masu yawa, daular Rumawa ta ci riba a ɓangaren magunguna kuma ta samar da mafi yawancin ilimin da mu ka sani yanzu.
english: Over multiple centuries, the Roman empire led to great gains in the field of medicine and formed much of the knowledge we know today.

hausa: Pureland origami shi ne origami mai iyakancewa akan iya naɗi ɗaya kawai za'ayi iya yi a lokaci guda, ba a yarda da naɗi mai wuya ba kamar naɗin baya, kuma dukkan naɗi suna da wurare kai tsaye.
english: Pureland origami is origami with the restriction that only one fold may be done at a time, more complex folds like reverse folds are not allowed, and all folds have straightforward locations.

hausa: John Smith ya ƙirƙiro shi a cikin shekarar 1970 don taimakon fayiloli da ba su da ƙwarewa ko waɗanda ke da ƙuntatacciyar damar motsi.
english: It was developed by John Smith in the 1970s to help inexperienced folders or those with limited motor skills.

hausa: Yara suna ɗaukar fahimta ta launin fata da tsana ta launin fata tun suna ƙanana kuma waɗannan tsana ta launin fata kan shafi halayya.
english: Children develop an awareness of race and racial stereotypes quite young and these racial stereotypes affect behavior.

hausa: Alal misali, yaran da suke daga tsirarun ƙabilun da ake yi wa kallon basa wani abin kirki a makaranta akwai yiwuwar hakan ya dakushe himmarsu a makaranta da zarar sun fahimci cewa ana musu wani kallon-kallo saboda launin fatarsu.
english: For instance, children who identify with a racial minority that is stereotyped as not doing well in school tend to not do well in school once they learn about the stereotype associated with their race.

hausa: MySpace shine shahararren yanar gizo na uku a cikin Amurka kuma yana da bayanan martaba miliyan 54 a halin yanzu.
english: MySpace is the third most popular website used in the United States and has 54 million profiles currently.

hausa: Waɗannan sassan yanar gizon sun ja ra’ayi sosai, musamman a ɓangaren tsara ilimi.
english: These websites have gotten a lot of attention, especially in the education setting.

hausa: Akwai alfanu masu yawa a kan waɗannan yanar gizon, wanda ya haɗa da damar buɗe wani shafin na aji da zai ƙunshi, ƙaramin shafin yanar gizo, hoto mai motsi, hoto marar motsi da wasu abubuwan.
english: There are positive aspects to these websites, which include, being able to easily setup a class page which can include blogs, videos, photos, and other features.

hausa: Za a iya shiga wannan shafin cikin sauƙi ta hanyar samar da adireshin yanar-gizo guda ɗaya kawai, wanda ya saka shi sauƙin tunawa da kuma sauƙin rubutawa ga ɗaliban da za su iya samun matsala ta amfani da keyboard ko a cikin rubutawa daidai.
english: This page can easily be accessed by providing just one web address, which makes it easy to remember and easy to type in for students who may have trouble using the keyboard or with spelling.

hausa: Ana iya tsara shi domin sauƙin karatu kuma tare da launi mai yawa ko launi kaɗan kamar yadda ake buƙata.
english: It can be customized to make it easy to read and also with as much or little color as desired.

hausa: Attention Deficit Disorder “cuta ce ta jijiyoyi wacce ta ke bayyana sa game da alamomin ciki har da rashin motsin jiki, ɗaukewar hankali, da kuma kazar-kazar ko wuce haddi da tsananin kuzari”.
english: Attention Deficit Disorder "is a neurological syndrome whose classic defining triad of symptoms including impulsivity, distractibility, and hyperactivity or excess energy".

hausa: Ba nakasa bane na koyo, rashin lafiya ne na koyo; yana “shafan kashi 3 zuwa 5 cikin dari na yara, ƙila kimanin miliyan 2 na yaran America”.
english: It is not a learning disability, it is a learning disorder; it "affects 3 to 5 percent of all children, perhaps as many as 2 million American children".

hausa: Yara masu ADD suna fuskantar mawuyacin hali game da mayar da hankali akan ayyukan makaranta, amma zasu iya mayar da hankali kan abubuwan da suke so kamar su yin wassani ko kallon shirin barkwancin da suka fi so ko rubuta jimloli ba tare da sa alamomin rubutu ba.
english: Children with ADD have a hard time focusing on things like school work, but they can concentrate on things they enjoy doing like playing games or watching their favorite cartoons or writing sentences without punctuation.

hausa: Waɗannan yara sukan shiga cikin matsala mai yawa, saboda suna “shiga halaye masu haɗari, shiga faɗa, kuma suna ƙalubalantar hukuma” don haɓaka ƙwaƙwalwarsu, tunda kwakwalwar ba za ta iya motsa su ta hanyoyin yau da kullun ba.
english: These children tend to get into a lot of trouble, because they "engage in risky behaviors, get into fights, and challenge authority" in order to stimulate their brain, since their brain can not be stimulated by normal methods.

hausa: ADD yana shafar alaƙa da sauran takwarorinsu saboda wasu yara ba sa iya fahimtar abin da ya sa suke yin abin da suke yi ko kuma dalilin da ya sa suke yin karatun harrufa kamar yadda suke yi ko kuma matakinsu na girma ya bambanta.
english: ADD affects relationships with other peers because other children can not understand why they act the way that they do or why they spell they way they do or that their maturity level is different.

hausa: Yadda damar samun ilimi da koyo ke sauyawa kamar yadda a ka ambata a sama, tushen samun ilimin ya canza.
english: As the ability to obtain knowledge and to learn changed in such a way as mentioned above the base rate at which knowledge was obtained changed.

hausa: Matakin neman bayanin ya bambanta. Yanzu babu sauran matsin lambar tunawa tare da tunawar mutum guda, sai dai damar iya tuno rubutu ya zama gurin maida hankali.
english: The approach to obtaining information was different. No longer did pressure reside within individual recall, but the ability to recall text became more of a focus.

hausa: A takaice dai, sabon ilimin ya yi sauyi mai matuƙar tasiri wajen yadda ake tafiyar da koyo da kuma yaɗa ilimi.
english: In essence, the Renaissance made a significant change in the approach to learning and the dissemination of knowledge.

hausa: Ba kamar sauran birrai ba, hominids basa amfani da hannayensu don motsi ko ɗaukar nauyi ko yin lilo ta cikin bishiyoyi.
english: Unlike other primates, hominids no longer use their hands in locomotion or bearing weight or swinging through the trees.

hausa: Hannun chimpanzee da ƙafa sun yi daidai a girma da tsayi, suna nuna amfanin hannun don ɗaukar nauyi a tafiyar mahaɗan yatsu yatsan ƙafa.
english: The chimpanzee's hand and foot are similar in size and length, reflecting the hand's use for bearing weight in knuckle walking.

hausa: Hannun ɗan adam ya fi ƙafa gajarta, da ƙasusuwan yatsu miƙaƙƙu.
english: The human hand is shorter than the foot, with straighter phalanges.

hausa: Busassun ƙasussuwan hannu wanda ke da shekaru miliyan biyu zuwa miliyan uku sun nuna wannan matsawa a ƙwarewa na hannun daga tafiya zuwa tasiri kan sarrafawa.
english: Fossil hand bones two million to three million years old reveal this shift in specialization of the hand from locomotion to manipulation.

hausa: Wasu mutane sun gaskata cewa fuskantar mafarkai da ba na haƙiƙa ba yawancin lokuta na iya jawo gajiya sosai.
english: Some people believe that experiencing many artificially induced lucid dreams often enough can be very exhausting.

hausa: Babban dalilin don wannan lamarin shi ne sakamakon mafarkai da ake iya ganewa da yake faɗaɗa tsawon lokacin tsakanin yanayoyin garuruwan REM.
english: The main reason for this phenomenon is the result of the lucid dreams expanding the length of time between REM states.

hausa: Ƙarancin REMs a kowani dare, yanayin da kake samun bacci na haƙiƙa koma jikin ka ya murmure yana zama yanda jifa-jifansa bazai iya haifar da matsala ba.
english: With fewer REMs per night, this state in which you experience actual sleep and your body recovers becomes infrequent enough to become a problem.

hausa: Wannan yana da gajiyarwa kamar kuna tashi kowane minti ashirin ko talatin ku kalli Talabijin.
english: This is just as exhausting as if you were to wake up every twenty or thirty minutes and watch TV.

hausa: Tasirin ya dogara ne akan yadda sau da yawa ƙwaƙwalwarka take ƙoƙarin yin mafarki mai kyau kowane dare.
english: The effect is dependent on how often your brain attempts to lucidly dream per night.

hausa: Abubuwa ba suyi kyau ba ga ƴan Italia a Arewacin Afirka kusan tun daga farko. A cikin mako guda da sanarwar yaƙin Italiya a ranar 10 ga Yuni, 1940, Turawan Birtaniyya na 11 sun kame Fort Capuzzo a Libya.
english: Things did not go well for the Italians in North Africa almost from the start. Within a week of Italy's declaration of war on June 10, 1940, the British 11th Hussars had seized Fort Capuzzo in Libya.

hausa: A wani harin kwanton-ɓauna da ke gabashin Bardia, Turawan ingila sun kame Babban Injiniyan Soja na Italia, Janar Lastucci.
english: In an ambush east of Bardia, the British captured the Italian Tenth Army's Engineer-in-Chief, General Lastucci.

hausa: A ranar 28 ga Yuni, aka kashe Marshal Italo Balbo, Gwamna-Janar na Libya kuma magaji ga Mussolini, ta hanyar harbin ƙawance yayin da yake sauka a Tobruk.
english: On June 28, Marshal Italo Balbo, the Governor-General of Libya and apparent heir to Mussolini, was killed by friendly fire while landing in Tobruk.

hausa: Ana wasan takobi na zamani a matakai masu yawa, kama daga ɗalibai masu koyo a jami’a zuwa ga ƙwararru da kuma gasar olympic.
english: The modern sport of fencing is played at many levels, from students learning at a university to professional and Olympic competition.

hausa: Ana buga wasan yawanci a wani tsarin gwagwarmaya, mai wasan ɗaya yana gogawa da wani.
english: The sport is primarily played in a duel format, one fencer dueling another.

hausa: Golf wani wasa ne da ƴan wasan ke amfani da sanduna domin buga ƙwallaye zuwa cikin ramuka.
english: Golf is a game in which players use clubs to hit balls into holes.

hausa: Ana buga ramuka goma sha takwas yayin zagaye na ko yaushe, tare da ƴan wasa galibi suna farawa akan rami na farko a kwas ɗin da gamawa a na goma sha takwas.
english: Eighteen holes are played during a regular round, with players usually starting on the first hole on the course and finishing on the eighteenth.

hausa: Ɗan wasan da ya ɗauki ƙarancin bugu, ko kuma wulla sandar wasan, don kammala sashen yake samun nasara.
english: The player who takes the fewest strokes, or swings of the club, to complete the course wins.

hausa: Ana buga wasan ne a kan ciyawa, kuma  ana sassabe ciyawar da ke zagayen ramin tayi guntu kuma ana kiran shi kore.
english: The game is played on grass, and the grass around the hole is mown shorter and called the green.

hausa: Wataƙila yawon buɗe ido da aka fi sani shi ne wanda yawancin mutane ke alaƙantawa da tafiya: Recreation tourism.
english: Perhaps the most common type of tourism is what most people associate with traveling: Recreation tourism.

hausa: Wannan shine lokacin da mutane ke zuwa wani wuri daban da irin wanda su ka saba yau da gobe domin hutawa da annashuwa.
english: This is when people go to a place that is very different from their regular day-to-day life to relax and have fun.

hausa: Bakin tekuna, filin shaƙatawa da zangon hutawa su ne mafi wuraren da baƙi masu yawon buɗe ido suka fi zuwa.
english: Beaches, theme parks and camp grounds are often the most common places frequented by recreational tourists.

hausa: Idan maƙasudin ziyarar mutum wani wuri na musamman shi ne sanin tarihinta da al'adunta to wannan nau'in yawon shaƙatawa an san shi da cultural tourism.
english: If the objective of one’s visit to a particular place is to get to know its history and culture then this type of tourism is known as cultural tourism.

hausa: Masu yawon buɗe ido na iya ziyartan alamar ƙasa dabam-dabam na ƙasa ta musamman ko kuma suna iya zaɓi kawai su mai da hankali wuri ɗaya.
english: Tourists may visit different landmarks of a particular country or they may simply opt to focus on just one area.

hausa: Ƴan mulkin mallakan, ganin wanna lamarin, sun nemi karin taimako.
english: The Colonists, seeing this activity, had also called for reinforcements.

hausa: Runduna dake sahun matsayar gaba sun haɗa da dakaru na 1 da na 3 daga rundunar New Hampshire rajimantin maza 200, ƙarƙashin shugabancin Kanar John Stark da James Reed (dukkansu daga baya sun zama Janar).
english: Troops reinforcing the forward positions included the 1st and 3rd New Hampshire regiments of 200 men, under Colonels John Stark and James Reed (both later became generals).

hausa: Mutanen Stark suka ja daga a jikin shingen ta ƙarshen arewacin inda Ƴan mulkin mallakan suka tsaya.
english: Stark's men took positions along the fence on the north end of the Colonist's position.

hausa: Lokacin da ƙaramin tashin ruwa ta buɗe rata kusa da Kogin Mystic kusa da arewa maso gabas na mashigin teku, sun hanzarta ƙara tsayin shinge tare da ɗan gajeren bangon dutse zuwa arewa wanda ya ƙare da gefen ruwa a ƙaramin bakin teku.
english: When low tide opened a gap along the Mystic River along the northeast of the peninsula, they quickly extended the fence with a short stone wall to the north ending at the water's edge on a small beach.

hausa: Gridley ko Stark sun sanya gungumen da ke kusa da ƙafa 100 (mita 30) a gaban katangar kuma suka ba da umarnin cewa babu wanda zai yi harbi har sai masu doka sun bada shi.
english: Gridley or Stark placed a stake about 100 feet (30 m) in front of the fence and ordered that no one fire until the regulars passed it.

hausa: Shirin Amurka ya dogara da kai hari a jere daga sassa uku daban-daban.
english: The American plan relied on launching coordinated attacks from three different directions.

hausa: Janar John Cadwalder zai ƙaddamar da harin wuce gona da iri kan rundunar sojojin Burtaniya a Bordentown, don toshe duk wani ƙarfafawa.
english: General John Cadwalder would launch a diversionary attack against the British garrison at Bordentown, in order to block off any reinforcements.

hausa: Janar James Ewing zai ɗauki mayaƙa 700 a hayin Kogin Trenton Ferry, ƙwace gadar Assunpink Creek kuma ta hana duk wasu sojojin abokan gaba tserewa.
english: General James Ewing would take 700 militia across the river at Trenton Ferry, seize the bridge over the Assunpink Creek and prevent any enemy troops from escaping.

hausa: Babbar rundunar farmakin mai dakaru 2,400 za ta ƙetara kogin a daidai mil 9 a arewacin Trenton, sannan su kasu gida biyu, ɗaya ƙarƙashin Greene da kuma ɗayan ƙarƙashin Sullivan, domin kai farmakin kafin asuba.
english: The main assault force of 2,400 men would cross the river nine miles north of Trenton, and then split into two groups, one under Greene and one under Sullivan, in order to launch a pre-dawn attack.

hausa: Da samun sauyi daga kwatan gudun rabin mil guda, batun saurin gudu ya zama maras muhimmanci sosai yayin da jajircewa kuma ya zama wani abu na lallai.
english: With the change from the quarter to the half mile run, speed becomes of much less importance and endurance becomes an absolute necessity.

hausa: Tabbas mai tseren rabin mil ta lamba ɗaya, mutumin da zai iya ƙure minti biyu, dole ne ya mallaki saurin gudu, amma dole ne a sami juriya a kowane haɗari.
english: Of course a first-class half-miler, a man who can beat two minutes, must be possessed of a fair amount of speed, but endurance must be cultivated at all hazards.

hausa: Wasu tseren ƙetare-ƙasa a lokacin hunturu, haɗe da aikin motsa jiki na ɓangaren saman jiki, shine mafi kyawun shirin lokacin gudu.
english: Some cross country running during the winter, combined with gymnasium work for the upper part of the body, is the best preparation for the running season.

hausa: Tsarin abinci mai kyau kawai ba zai iya samar da ƙwazon fitattun mutane ba, amma suna iya tasiri sosai ga lafiyar 'yan wasa matasa gaba ɗaya.
english: Proper nutritional practices alone cannot generate elite performances, but they can significantly affect young athletes' overall wellness.

hausa: Kula da ƙoshin lafiyar daidaituwar ƙarfin jiki, yin ɗabi'a mai kyau game da shan ruwa, da fahimtar abubuwa daban-daban na ayyukan haɓaka na iya taimaka wa 'yan wasa su inganta ayyukansu kuma su ƙara jin daɗin wasanni.
english: Maintaining a healthy energy balance, practicing effective hydration habits, and understanding the various aspects of supplementation practices can help athletes improve their performance and increase their enjoyment of the sport.

hausa: Matsakaicin gudun nesa wasa ne mara tsada; dukda haka, akwai ra'ayoyi da yawa game da ƙananan kayan aikin da ake buƙata don shiga.
english: Middle distance running is a relatively inexpensive sport; however, there are many misconceptions regarding the few pieces of equipment required to participate.

hausa: Za a iya siyan kaya kamar yadda ake buƙata,amma yawanci zasu zama marasa fa’ida ko kadan akan aikin.
english: Products can be purchased as needed, but most will have little or no real impact on performance.

hausa: Ƴan wasan motsa jiki na iya jin cewa sun fi son wani kaya ko da ba shi da wani ainihin amfani.
english: Athletes may feel that they prefer a product even when it provides no real benefits.

hausa: Ana ganin atom ɗin a matsayin muhimmin abun da ke gina duk wani abu.
english: The atom can be considered to be one of the fundamental building blocks of all matter.

hausa: Abu ne mai matuƙar wuyar sha’ani da ya haɗa da, bisa ga sassauƙan tsarin Bohr, na nucleus ɗin tsakiya wanda electrons suke zagaye shi, ya yi kama da duniyoyi da ke kewaye da rana - duba Hoto na 1.1.
english: Its a very complex entity which consists, according to a simplified Bohr model, of a central nucleus orbited by electrons, somewhat similar to planets orbiting the sun - see Figure 1.1.

hausa: Nucleus ta ƙunshi abubuwa guda biyu- neutrons da protons.
english: The nucleus consists of two particles - neutrons and protons.

hausa: Protons na ɗauke da cajin wutan lantarki mafi soyuwa yayin da ita Neutron bata ɗauke da wutan lantarki. Electrons suna da cajin wutan lantarki mummuna.
english: Protons have a positive electric charge while neutrons have no charge. The electrons have a negative electric charge.

hausa: Kafin a duba wanda ya raunata, dole ne da farko ka bincike wurin don tabbatar da tsaronka.
english: To Check the victim, you must first survey the scene to ensure your safety.

hausa: Kuna buƙatar lura da matsayin wanda ya raunata yayin da kuka kusance shi da kuma kowane alamar munanan yanayi.
english: You need to notice the victim's position as you approach him or her and any automatic red flags.

hausa: Idan kun ji rauni yayin ƙoƙarin taimako, kawai kuna iya sa al'amura su ƙara taɓarɓarewa.
english: If you get hurt trying to help, you may only serve to make matters worse.

hausa: Binciken ya gano cewa cutar damuwa, tsoro da bala'i sun daidaita dangantakar da ke tsakanin ciwo da nakasu ga masu fama da ciwon baya.
english: The study found that depression, fear and catastrophising mediated the relationship between pain and disability in lower back pain sufferers.

hausa: Sakamakon bala'i ne kawai, ba shiga damuwa da tsoro ba ya kasance sharaɗin ganawar sati-sati karkashin tsarin PA.
english: Only the effects of catastrophizing, not depression and fear was conditional of regular weekly structured PA sessions.

hausa: Waɗanda suka tsunduma cikin ayyuka na yau da kullum na buƙatar taimako wajen sauya mummunar tunani na zafi tare da bambanta tsakanin tsananin raɗaɗi da rashin sukuni daga juyawar gabobi ke haifarwa.
english: Those participating in regular activity required more support in terms of negative perception of pain distinguishing the differences of chronic pain and discomfort feel from normal physical movement.

hausa: Gani, ko ikon iya ganin ya dogara a kan hanyoyin gani na gaɓɓai ko idanuwa.
english: Vision, or the ability to see depends on visual system sensory organs or eyes.

hausa: Akwai tsaruka daban-daban na yadda ido ke aiki, daga complexity wanda su ka danganta da buƙatuwar halitta.
english: There are many different constructions of eyes, ranging in complexity depending on the requirements of the organism.

hausa: Kowane irin gini da irin nasa iyawan, suna da ankarewa ga wave-lengths daban-daban kuma suna da matakin fahimta mabanbanta, har lau suna buƙatar sarrafawa daban don samar da ma'anar abinda za'a saka da lambobi daban-daban don yayi aiki da inganci.
english: The different constructions have different capabilities, are sensitive to different wave-lengths and have differing degrees of acuity, also they require different processing to make sense of the input and different numbers to work optimally.

hausa: Yawan jama'a yana nufin tarin halittu na wani jinsi na musamman a cikin wani keɓaɓɓen wurin ƙasa.
english: A population is the collection of organisms of a particular species within a given geographic area.

hausa: Idan mutane a cikin yawan jama'a suka zama iri ɗaya dangane da wani irin dabi'a na musamman ana kiran su monomorphic.
english: When all individuals in a population are identical with regard to a particular phenotypic trait they are known as monomorphic.

hausa: Lokacin da ɗaiɗaikun mutane suka nuna mabambantan nau’uka masu yawa na wata keɓaɓɓiyar ɗabi’a su masu banbanin ƙwayar halitta ne.
english: When the individuals show several variants of a particular trait they are polymorphic.

hausa: Sojojin tururuwa suna tafiya da mazauni a matakai daban-daban kuma.
english: Army ant colonies march and nest in different phases as well.

hausa: A matakin makiyaya, gungun dakaru na sintiri ne da daddare sai tsaya don su huta da rana.
english: In the nomadic phase, army ants march at night and stop to camp during the day.

hausa: Mulkin mallaka yana fara matakin makiyaya lokacin da wadatar abinci ya ragu. A wannan mataki, mulkin mallakan yana yin gidajan wucin gadi waɗanda ake canza kullum.
english: The colony begins a nomadic phase when available food has decreased. During this phase, the colony makes temporary nests that are changed everyday.

hausa: Kowane ɗaya daga waɗannan tashin hankali ko tafiyar baroro tana ɗaukar kimanin kwanaki 17.
english: Each of these nomadic rampages or marches lasts for approximately 17 days.

hausa: Menene ƙwayar halitta? Kalmar cell ta fito ne daga kalmar Latin “cella”, ma'ana “ƙaramin ɗaki”, kuma masanin mikroskof ne ya ƙirƙira da yake nazari a kan abin toshe kwalba.
english: What is a cell? The word cell comes from the Latin word "cella", meaning "small room", and it was first coined by a microscopist observing the structure of cork.

hausa: Ƙwayar halitta ita ce tushen dukkan abubuwa masu rai, kuma kowacce halitta ta ƙunshi ƙwayar halitta ɗaya ko fiye da haka.
english: The cell is the basic unit of all living things, and all organisms are composed of one or more cells.

hausa: Ƙwayoyin halitta suna da matukar mahimmanci da amfani wajen nazarin rayuwa, a zahiri, shi ya sa ake kiransu da "tubalin ginin rayuwa".
english: Cells are so basic and critical to the study of life, in fact, that they are often referred to as "the building blocks of life".

hausa: Tsarin Sadarwar Jiki yana kula da daidaitun yanayin cikin jiki ta hanyar aika saƙonnin motsin jijiyoyi a gabaɗayan jiki don kula da yadda jini yake gudana ba tare da matsala ba.
english: The Nervous System maintains homeostasis by sending nerve impulses through out the body to keep the flow of blood going as well as undisturbed.

hausa: Ana iya turo waɗannan bugawar jijiya da wuri a dukkan jiki wanda hakan yake taimaka jikin ya zama da lafiya daga wani haɗari mai iya tasowa.
english: These nerve impulses can be sent so quickly throughout the body which helps keep the body safe from any potential threat.

hausa: Mahaukaciyar guguwa tana afkawa wani ƙaramin yanki idan aka kwatanta da sauran guguwa masu ƙarfi, amma suna iya lalata komai a hanyar su.
english: Tornadoes strike a small area compared to other violent storms, but they can destroy everything in their path.

hausa: Mahaukaciyar guguwa kan tuge bishiyoyi, su yage falankai daga jikin gine-gine, sannan su yi wurgi da motoci zuwa sama. Kashi biyu na mahaukaciyar guguwa masu tsananin ƙarfi kan wuce tsawon awanni uku.
english: Tornadoes uproot trees, rip boards from buildings, and fling cars up into the sky. The most violent two percent of tornadoes last more than three hours.

hausa: Waɗannan mugayen guguwar suna ɗauke da iska har zuwa 480 km/h (133 m/s; 300 mph).
english: These monster storms have winds up to 480 km/h (133 m/s; 300 mph).

hausa: ‘yan Adam sun kasance suna ƙerawa da amfani da tabarau mai ƙara girma don ƙara girman abu a shekaru dubbai da suka wuce.
english: Humans have been making and using lenses for magnification for thousands and thousands of years.

hausa: Duk da haka, an yi ainihin na'urar hangen nesa ta fari a Turai a ƙarshen ƙarni na 16.
english: However, the first true telescopes were made in Europe in the late 16th century.

hausa: Na’urar hangen nesa tayi amfani da gilashi biyu domin sanya abubuwa dake nesa su dawo kusa kuma babba.
english: These telescopes used a combination of two lenses to make distant objects appear both nearer and larger.

hausa: Son kai da zalama za su ci gaba da kasancewa da mu kuma tsarin haɗin kai ne yayin da yawanci aka amfana za'a samu ƙarin moriya a koda yaushe a ƙaramin lokaci ta aiki da son zuciya.
english: Greed and selfishness will always be with us and it is the nature of cooperation that when the majority benefit there will always be more to gain in the short term by acting selfishly

hausa: Ana fata, mutane da dama su gane cewa mafi kyan zaɓin su na dogon lokaci shine su haɗa kansu da sauran jama’a.
english: Hopefully, most people will realise that their long term best option is to work together with others.

hausa: Mutane da yawa suna tunanin ranar da ɗan adam zai iya tafiya zuwa wata tauraruwa domin bincika wasu duniyoyi, wasu mutane suna mamakin abin da ke can wasu sun gaskata cewa akwai baƙin halitta ko wasu rayuwa da zasu iya rayuwa a wata duniya.
english: Many people dream of the day when humans can travel to another star and explore other worlds, some people wonder what's out there some belive that aliens or other life may live on another plant.

hausa: Amma, idan wannan ya taɓa faruwa mai yuwuwa ba zai faru na dogon lokaci ba. Taurari sun bazu sosai yanda akwai miliyoyin mil tsakanin taurari waɗanda “maƙwabta” ne.
english: But, if this ever does happen probably won't happen for a very long time. The stars are so spread out that there are trillions of miles between stars that are "neighbors".

hausa: Wataƙila wata rana, ‘ya’yan jikokinka za su tsaya a kan duniyar baƙin halittu suna mamaki game da magabatansu na zamanin baya?
english: Maybe one day, your great grandchildren will be standing atop an alien world wondering about their ancient ancestors?

hausa: An hallici dabobi ne ta ƙwayoyin hallita dayawa. Suna cin abubuwa kuma su sarrafa su a ciki. Yawancin dabobi na iya motsi.
english: Animals are made of many cells. They eat things and digest them inside. Most animals can move.

hausa: Dabbobi ne kawai ke da ƙwaƙwalwa (kodayake ba duk dabbobi ke da shi ba; misali, jellyfish, ba su da ƙwaƙwalwa).
english: Only animals have brains (though not even all animals do; jellyfish, for example, do not have brains).

hausa: Ana samun dabobi a ko ina a doran kasa. Suna tona ƙasa, iyo a cikin ruwa, da kuma tashi a sama.
english: Animals are found all over the earth. They dig in the ground, swim in the oceans, and fly in the sky.

hausa: Kwayar hallita ita kashin tsari da kuma mai aiki mafi ƙarami na wani hallita (abubuwa) mai rai.
english: A cell is the smallest structural and functional unit of a living (things) organism.

hausa: kalmar Cell ta samo asali ne daga kalmar Latin cella wacce ke nufin ƙaramin daki.
english: Cell comes from the Latin word cella which means small room.

hausa: Idan ka kalli abubuwa masu rai ta ƙarƙashin madubin makuroskof, za ka ga cewa an yi su ne da ƙananan murabba'i da ƙwallaye.
english: If you look at living things under a microscope, you will see that they are made of small squares or balls.

hausa: Robert Hooke, masanin ilimin halittu daga Ingila, ya ga ƙananan murabba'ai a cikin abin toshe kwalaba tare da microscope.
english: Robert Hooke, a biologist from England, saw small squares in cork with a microscope.

hausa: Suna kama da ɗakuna. Shi ne mutum na farko da ya lura da matattun ƙwayoyin halittaa
english: They looked like rooms. He was the first person to observe dead cells

hausa: Daidaikun sinadarai ko dunkulensu na iya canza yanayi ba tare da sun canza ba a karan kansu.
english: Elements and compounds can move from one state to another and not change.

hausa: Nitrogen a matsayin gas har yanzu yana da sinadarai iri ɗaya kamar nitrogen na ruwa. Yanayin ruwa ya fi yawa amma kwayoyin sun kasance iri ɗaya.
english: Nitrogen as a gas still has the same properties as liquid nitrogen. The liquid state is denser but the molecules are still the same.

hausa: Ruwa ma wani misali ne. Mahadin ruwa ya kunshi ƙwayoyin halitta biyu na sinadarin hydrogen da ƙwayar halittar oxygen daya.
english: Water is another example. The compound water is made up of two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom.

hausa: Yana da siffa iri guda ko da kuwa iska ce ko ruwa-ruwa ko kuma ma abu mai kauri.
english: It has the same molecular structure whether it is a gas, liquid, or solid.

hausa: Kodayake yanayin jikinta na iya canzawa, yanayin sinadaran ba ya canja wa.
english: Although its physical state may change, its chemical state remains the same.

hausa: Lokaci wani abu ne wanda yake kewaye da mu, kuma yana shafan duk abin da muke yi, duk da haka yana da wuyar fahimta.
english: Time is something that is all around us, and affects everything we do, yet is difficult to understand.

hausa: Masana, kama daga na addini, masu falsafa da masana kimiyya sun yi shekaru dubbai su na nazari a kan Lokaci.
english: Time has been studied by religious, philosophical, and scientific scholars for thousands of years.

hausa: Muna wayar lokaci a matsayin wani jeri na abubuwan da ke wucewa daga zamani na gaba ta cikin zamanin yanzu zuwa zamanin baya.
english: We experience time as a series of events passing from the future through the present to the past.

hausa: Wata fassarar ta lokaci ita ce yadda mu ke kwatanta tsawon faruwar wasu abubuwa.
english: Time is also how we compare the duration (length) of events.

hausa: Za ka iya ƙayyade wucewar lokaci da kanka ta hanyar duba maimaituwar wani al'amura mai juyowa. Wani al'amura mai juyowa wani abu ne da yake faruwa akai-akai.
english: You can mark the passing of time yourself by observing the repetition of a cyclical event. A cyclical event is something that happens again and again regularly.

hausa: A zamanin yanzu ana amfani da kwamfutoci wajen jirkita hotuna da bidiyoyi.
english: Computers today are used to manipulate pictures and videos.

hausa: Zane-zane masu ƙayatarwa za a iya haɗa su a kwamfutoci, kuma irin waɗannan zane-zanen suna ci gaba da samun karbuwa a telebijin da finafinai.
english: Sophisticated animations can be constructed on computers, and this kind of animation is increasingly being used in television and films.

hausa: Ana yin rikodin waƙoƙi sau da yawa ta amfani da ƙwararrun kwamfutoci don sarrafawa da haɗa sautuka tare.
english: Music is often recorded using sophisticated computers to process and mix sounds together.

hausa: A tsawon lokaci a ƙarnoni na goma sha tara da ashirin, an yi imanin cewa mazaunan farko na New Zealand su ne mutanen Maori, waɗanda suka yi farautar manya-manyan tsuntsaye da ake kira moas.
english: For a long time during the nineteenth and twentieth centuries, it was believed the first inhabitants of New Zealand were the Maori people, who hunted giant birds called moas.

hausa: Daga nan ƙa’idar ta tabbatar da ra’ayin cewa mutanen Maori sun yi ƙaura daga Polynesia a wata Babbar Kwambar Jiragen ruwa sannan suka karbe New Zealand daga Moriori, inda suka kafa al’ummar manoma.
english: The theory then established the idea that the Maori people migrated from Polynesia in a Great Fleet and took New Zealand from the Moriori, establishing an agricultural society.

hausa: Koyaya, sabbin shaidu sun nuna cewa Moriori wasu ƙungiya ce ta birnin Maori ne wanda suka yi hijira daga New Zealand zuwa Tsibirin Chatham, suna haɓaka al'adunsu na musamman, na zaman lafiya.
english: However, new evidence suggests that the Moriori were a group of mainland Maori who migrated from New Zealand to the Chatham Islands, developing their own distinctive, peaceful culture.

hausa: Akwai wata ƙabila a tsibirir Chatham sune ƴan Maori waɗanda suka yi hijira daga New Zealand.
english: There was also another tribe on the Chatham islands these were Maori who migrated away from New Zealand.

hausa: Suna kiran kansu da Moriori akwai wasu rikita-rikita a ƙarshen lamarin, an shafe Moriori.
english: They called themselves the Moriori there were a few skirmishes and in the end, the Moriori were wiped out

hausa: Mutune da suka kasance a lamarin cikin gomman shekaru sun taimake mu wajen fahimtar ƙarfinmu da kuma jarabarmu yayin da kuma muke la’akari da wahalhalun da ke ciki har ma da matsalolin ciki.
english: Individuals who had been involved for several decades helped us appreciate our strengths and passions while candidly assessing difficulties and even failures.

hausa: Yayin sauraren kowa da kowa yana bayar da labaran kansa, iyali da kuma na wuraren aiki/kungiya, muna samun muhimman bayanai da suka gabata na mutanen da suka yi tasiri ta hanya mai kyau ko akasin haka game da tsari ko dabi’un ƙungiya/wurin aiki.+
english: While listening to individuals share their individual, family, and organizational stories, we gained valuable insight into the past and some of the personalities who influenced for good or ill the culture of the organization.

hausa: Yayin fahimtar tarihin wani baya ɗaukar fahimtar aladun, ya kan taimakawa mutane wajan gane a gurbin da suke a tarihin maaikatar.
english: While understanding one’s history does not assume understanding of culture, it does at least help people gain a sense of where they fall within the history of the organization.

hausa: Yayin auna cigaban da aka samu tare da fahimtar gazawa, ɗaiɗaikun mutane tare da duk waɗanda suke cikin shirin sun ƙara gano darajoji, manufa, da kuma al’amuran da ke tafiyar da ma’aikatar.p.
english: While assessing the successes and becoming aware of failures, individuals and the whole of the participating persons discover more deeply the values, mission, and driving forces of the organization.

hausa: A wannan misalin, tuna wasu misalan da suka gabata na halayyar kirkire-kirkire da kuma nasarar da suka haifar ya taimakawa mutane wajen fahimtar sabbin sauye-sauyen da kuma alƙiblar cocin wurin.
english: In this instance, recalling previous instances of entrepreneurial behavior and resulting successes helped people to be open to new changes and new direction for the local church.

hausa: Waɗannan labaran nasarorin sun sassauta girman fargabar sauyin, yayin da ake ƙirƙirar tunani mai kyau izuwa sauyi da za a iya samu a gaba.
english: Such success stories lessened the fears of change, while creating positive inclinations toward change in the future.

hausa: Tsarin tunani mai canzawa dabaru ne na warware matsaloli waɗanda ke haɗa ra'ayoyi daban-daban ko fannoni don nemo mafita.yi
english: Convergent thinking patterns are problem solving techniques that unite different ideas or fields to find a solution.

hausa: Abinda tunaninka zai mai da hankali kai su ne, sauri, fikira da dacewa, tabbatar da gaskiyar zance, sake yin amfani da dabaru da ake da su, tattara bayanai.
english: The focus of this mindset is speed, logic and accuracy, also identification of facts, reapplying existing techniques, gathering information.

hausa: Abu mafi mahimmanci a wannan tunanin shine: amsa guda ɗaya ce kawai ta ke daidai. Kuna tunanin amsoshi biyu, su ne daidai ne ko ba daidai ba.
english: The most important factor of this mindset is: there is only one correct answer. You only think of two answers, namely right or wrong.

hausa: Irin wannan tunanin ana nasabta shi ne da wani tsarin kimiyya ko kuma tabbatattun tsare-tsare.
english: This type of thinking is associated with certain science or standard procedures.

hausa: Mutane masu irin wannan tunanin na da basirar tunani, suna iya hardace tsari, su warware matsaloli kuma su yi aiki akan gwaje-gwajen kimiyya.
english: People with this type of thinking have logical thinking, are able to memorize patterns, solve problems and work on scientific tests.

hausa: Yan Adam sun fi kowane nau'in halittu baiwa na gano tunanin wasu.
english: Humans are by far the most talented species in reading the minds of others.

hausa: Hakan yana nufin muna iya hasashe daidai game da abinda wasu mutane ke iya tsinkaya, ko su ke nufi, ko imani da shi ko su ka sani ko kuma su ke muradi.
english: That means we are able to successfully predict what other humans perceive, intend, believe, know or desire.

hausa: Ɗaya daga cikin baiwar shine, fahimtar abin da wasu mutane ke nufi yana da matuƙar muhimmanci. Yana ba mu damar warware rikitattun al’amura na ayyukan zahiri.
english: Among these abilities, understanding the intention of others is crucial. It allows us to resolve possible ambiguities of physical actions.

hausa: Misali, idan kaga wani yana fasa tagar mota, za ka yi tsammani ya na ƙoƙarin sace motar wani ne.
english: For example, if you were to see someone breaking a car window, you would probably assume he was trying to steal a stranger’s car.

hausa: Ya kamata a yi masa hukunci na daban idan ya ɓatar da mukullan motarsa ne kuma ya ke ƙoƙarin ɓalle ƙofar motar tasa.
english: He would need to be judged differently if he had lost his car keys and it was his own car that he was trying to break into.

hausa: MRI ya danganta ne ga faruwar kimiyyar lissafi da ake kira nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR), wanda Felix Bloch ya gano a shekarun 1930 (yayin da ya ke aiki a Jami’ar Stanford) da Edward Purcell (daga Jami’ar Harvard).
english: MRI is based on a physics phenomenon called nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR), which was discovered in the 1930s by Felix Bloch (working at Stanford University) and Edward Purcell (from Harvard University).

hausa: A wannan jijjiga, magnetic field da kuma sautin rediyo suna sanya ƙwayoyin zarra su ba da ƙananan sigina na rediyo.
english: In this resonance, magnetic field and radio waves cause atoms to give off tiny radio signals.

hausa: A shekara ta 1970, Raymond Damadian, likita kuma masanin kimiyya mai bincike, ya gano madogarar amfani da magnetic resonance imaging a matsayin kayan aiki don gano cuta a asibiti.
english: In the year 1970, Raymond Damadian, a medical doctor and research scientist, discovered the basis for using magnetic resonance imaging as a tool for medical diagnosis.

hausa: Bayan shekaru huɗu an ba da izini lambar mallakar kira, wanda shi ne farkon lambar kira a duniya da aka bayar a cikin fannin MRI.
english: Four years later a patent was granted, which was the world's first patent issued in the field of MRI.

hausa: A shekarar 1977, Dr. Damadian ya kammala aikin ƙirƙirar na’urar MRI "ta duka jiki" ta farko, wadda ya kira da “gagara misali”.
english: In 1977, Dr. Damadian completed the construction of the first “whole-body” MRI scanner, which he called the ”Indomitable”.

hausa: Hanyar Sadarwar ta asynchronous tana ƙarfafa lokacin yin tunani da kuma samun damar amsa wa wasu.
english: Asynchronous communication encourages time for reflection and reaction to others.

hausa: Yana ba wa ɗalibai damar yin aiki cikin hanzarinsu da iyakance hanzarinsu na kayan koyarwa da bayani.
english: It allows students the ability to work at their own pace and control the pace of instructional information.

hausa: Bugu da ƙari, akwai ƙarancin takunkumin lokaci tare da yiwuwar sassaucin lokutan aiki. (Bremer, 1998)
english: In addition, there are fewer time restrictions with the possibility of flexible working hours. (Bremer, 1998)

hausa: Yin amfani da intanet da yanar gizo yana bawa masu koyon samun dama ga bayyanai a kowane lokaci.
english: The use of the Internet and the World Wide Web allows learners to have access to information at all times.

hausa: Ɗalibai na iya gabatar da tambayoyi ga malamai a kowane lokaci na rana kuma suyi tsammanin amsoshi cikin gaggawa, maimakon jiran har sai ganawa ta gaba da gaba.
english: Students can also submit questions to instructors at any time of day and expect reasonably quick responses, rather than waiting until the next face-to-face meeting.

hausa: Mahangar zamanin ga koyo yana bada 'yanci daga kafaffun ƙa’idoji. Babu wata hanya mai kyau na koyo.
english: The postmodern approach to learning offers the freedom from absolutes. There is no one good way to learn.

hausa: A zahiri, babu wani abu mai kyau da za'a koya. Koyo yana faruwa ne a tsakanin mai koyo da kuma karantarwar da ake yi.
english: In fact, there is not one good thing to learn.Learning takes place in the experience between the learner and the knowledge presented.

hausa: Abin da muke fuskanta a yanzu da duk wani yi-da-kanka da gabatar da bayani, shirye-shiryen talabijin na koyo ya nuna haka.
english: Our current experience with all the do-it-yourself and information presenting, learning-based television shows illustrates this point.

hausa: Da yawa daga cikinmu mun sami kanmu muna kallon wani shirin talibijin da ke ba mu labarin wani tsari ko ƙwarewa wanda ba za mu taɓa shiga ko amfani da wannan ilimin ba.
english: So many of us find ourselves watching a television show that informs us of a process or experience in which we will never participate or apply that knowledge.

hausa: Ba za mu taɓa yi wa mota garambawul ba, gina maɓuɓɓugar ruwa a filin bayan gidan mu, tafiya zuwa Peru don nazarin gidajen mutanen dā, ko kuma yi wa gidan maƙwabcin mu kwaskwarima.
english: We will never overhaul a car, build a fountain in our backyard, travel to Peru to examine ancient ruins, or remodel our neighbour's house.

hausa: Godiya ga haɗe-haɗen kebur na fiber optic a ƙarƙarshin teku zuwa ga Turai da kuma tauraron ɗan Adam mai yawan faɗi, Greenland yana a haɗe sosai tare da 93% a cikin jam'arsa suna da damar ga haɗin yanar-gizo.
english: Thanks to undersea fiber optic cable links to Europe and broadband satellite, Greenland is well connected with 93% of the population having internet access.

hausa: Otel dinka ko kuma wanda zai ɗauki baƙoncinka (Idan kana zama a gidan ajiye baƙi ko kuma a gidansa) zai zama yana da wifi ko kwamfuta mai intanet kuma dukkan wuraren suna da shagunan intanet ko wasu wuraren da wifi na jama'a.
english: Your hotel or hosts (if staying in a guesthouse or private home) will likely have wifi or an internet connected PC, and all settlements have an internet cafe or some location with public wifi.

hausa: Kamar yadda aka ambata a sama, kodayake kalmar “Eskimo” ya kasance karɓaɓɓiya a cikin Amurka, ana ɗaukar sa mai daɗaɗawa ga yawancin mutanen da ba 'yan Amurka ba mutanen Arctic, musamman a Kanada.
english: As mentioned above, though the word "Eskimo" remains acceptable in the United States, it is considered pejorative by many non-U.S. Arctic peoples, especially in Canada.

hausa: A yayin da akwai yiwuwar jin kalmar da ‘yan asalin Greenland ke amfani dashi, ya kamata ‘yan waje su guji yin amfani da ita.
english: While you may hear the word used by Greenlandic Natives, its use should be avoided by foreigners.

hausa: Mazaunan asali na Greenland kan kira kansu da Inuit a ƙasar Canada da kuma Kalaalleq (jam’i Kalaallit), mutumin Greenland, a Greenland.
english: The native inhabitants of Greenland call themselves Inuit in Canada and Kalaalleq (plural Kalaallit), a Greenlander, in Greenland.

hausa: Laifi, da kuma ƙiyayya game da ƴan hijira gabaɗaya, kusan ba a sani ba a cikin Greenland. Ko da a cikin garuruwa, babu “yankuna masu ƙaurin suna.”
english: Crime, and ill-will toward foreigners in general, is virtually unknown in Greenland. Even in the towns, there are no "rough areas."

hausa: Wataƙila yanayin sanyi shi ne kaɗai haƙiƙar barazanar da wanda bai shirya ba zai fuskanta.
english: Cold weather is perhaps the only real danger the unprepared will face.

hausa: Idan ka ziyarci Greenland a lokutan sanyi (duba da sanyi na ƙaruwa ne idan ka ƙara gaba ta arewa), yana da muhimmanci a kawo wadatattun sutura mai saka ɗumi.
english: If you visit Greenland during cold seasons (considering that the further north you go, the colder it will be), it is essential to bring warm enough clothing.

hausa: Tsawon kwanaki a lokacin bazara na iya haifar da matsalolin samun isasshen bacci da rashin lafiya masu alaƙa da shi.
english: The very long days in the summer can lead to problems getting sufficient sleep and associated health issues.

hausa: Lokacin zafi, kuma ku lura da sauron yankin ƙasashen Nordic. Duk da cewa ba sa yaɗa wata cuta, amma suna da ban haushi.
english: During the summer, also watch out for the Nordic mosquitoes. Although they do not transmit any diseases, they can be irritating.

hausa: Kasancewar tattalin arziƙin San Francisco an fi alaƙanta shi da harkokin yawon buɗe ido, tattalin arziƙin ya shafi fannoni da dama.
english: While San Francisco's economy is linked to it being a world-class tourist attraction, its economy is diversified.

hausa: Manyan ɓangarorin masu samar da aiki ayyuka ne ƙwararru, gwamnati, fannin kuɗi, kasuwanci, da yawon buɗe ido.
english: The largest employment sectors are professional services, government, finance, trade, and tourism.

hausa: Yawan nuna ta cikin kaɗe-kaɗe, fina-finai, adabi da karɓaɓɓun al'adun zamani, ya taimaka wajen sanya birnin da iyakan garin zama fitacce a faɗin duniya.
english: Its frequent portrayal in music, films, literature and popular culture has helped make the city and its landmarks known throughout the world.

hausa: San Francisco ta samar da wani manyan gini na ‘yan yawon shaƙatawa da ke da otal da dama, gidajen abinci, da kuma fitattun kayayyakin zamani.
