english: San Francisco has developed a large tourist infrastructure with numerous hotels, restaurants, and top-notch convention facilities.

hausa: San Francisco ɗaya daga cikin gurare masu kyau a ƙasar don samun wasu nau’ukan abincin yankin Asiya: Korea, Thailand, Indiya da kuma Japan.
english: San Francisco is also one of the best places in the nation for other Asian cuisine: Korean, Thai, Indian, and Japanese.

hausa: Tafiya zuwa Duniyar Walt Disney tamkar wani aikin hajji ne ga akasarin iyalai a Amurka.
english: Traveling to Walt Disney World represents a major pilgrimage for many American families.

hausa: Irin wanna ziyarar ta ƙunshi sauka a Filin jirgin saman Orlando, da shiga otal ɗin Disney, yin kusan mako guda ba tare da barin harabar Disney, sannan komawa gida.
english: The "typical" visit involves flying into Orlando International Airport, busing to an on-site Disney hotel, spending about a week without leaving Disney property, and returning home.

hausa: Akwai sauyi da dama da zai iya faruwa, abinda mutane da yawa ke nufi idan su na maganar “Zuwa wurin wasa na Disney”.
english: There are infinite variations possible, but this remains what most people mean when they talk of "going to Disney World".

hausa: Da yawan tikitin da ake sayarwa a shafukan yanar gizo a irinsu eBay da Craigslist, suna kasancewa tikitin da ake maimaita amfani da su ne.
english: Many tickets sold online through auction websites such as eBay or Craigslist are partially used multi-day park-hopper tickets.

hausa: Duk da cewa al’amarin ya zama ruwan dare, Disney ta haramta yin haka: ba’a iya gusar da tikitocin.
english: While this is a very common activity, it is prohibited by Disney: the tickets are non-transferable.

hausa: Duk wani sansani dake ƙasan zagayen Grand Canyon yana buƙatar amincewar ƙasar.
english: Any camping below the rim in Grand Canyon requires a backcountry permit.

hausa: An iyakance izini don kare kwazazzabon, kuma ana ba da dama a ranar 1 ta wata, watanni huɗu kafin watan farawa.
english: Permits are limited to protect the canyon, and become available on the 1st day of the month, four months prior to the start month.

hausa: Don haka, izinin karkara na kowace farawa a watan Mayu zai kasance za'a samu a ranar 1 ga Janairu.
english: Thus, a backcountry permit for any start date in May becomes available on 1 Jan.

hausa: Sarari ga mafi mashahurin yankuna, kamar Bright Angel Campground wanda ke kallon gefen gurin kiwon Phantom, yana cika gaba ɗaya da saƙon nema da aka karɓa a ranan farko na buɗe daman neman shiga.
english: Space for the most popular areas, such as the Bright Angel Campground adjacent to Phantom Ranch, generally fill up by the requests received on first date they are opened to reservations.

hausa: Akwai iya adadin yawan izini da aka ajiye domin buƙatu na shiga-ciki da ake samu a tsarin waɗanda ya fara zuwa shi zai fara samu.
english: There are a limited number permits reserved for walk-in requests available on a first come, first served basis.

hausa: Shiga Kudancin Afirka da mota hanya ce mai ban mamaki don ganin duka kyawun yankin da kuma zuwa wurare da basa hanyoyin yawon buɗe ido na yau da kullum.
english: Entering Southern Africa by car is an amazing way to see all the region's beauty as well as to get to places off the normal tourist routes.

hausa: Za a iya yin hakan a ƙaramar mota tare da tsari na kulawa sosai amma 4×4 shi aka fi aminta da shi kuma wurare da dama sai da mota mai 4×4 za a iya shigarsu.
english: This can be done in a normal car with careful planning but a 4x4 is highly advised and many locations are only accessible with a high wheel base 4x4.

hausa: A sa a rai lokacin shiri cewa duk da cewa akwai zaman lafiya a kudanci afirka ba kowacce maƙwabciyar ƙasa a yankin ke zaune lafiya ba.
english: Keep in mind while planning that although Southern Africa is stable not all neighboring countries are.

hausa: Buƙatar Bizar da kuma kuɗinta ya banbamta daga ƙasa zuwa ƙasa kuma yana da nasaba da ƙasar da ka zo.
english: Visa requirements and costs vary from nation to nation and are affected by the country you come from.

hausa: Haka kuma kowace ƙasa tana da dokoki na musamman waɗanda ke buƙatar irin abubuwa na gaggawa da ya kamata su kasance a cikin mota.
english: Each country also has unique laws requiring what emergency items need to be in the car.

hausa: Victoria Falls dai wani gari ne da yake a wani yankin ƙasar Zimbabwe kan iyaka daga garin Livingstone, Zambia, kuma kusa da Botswana.
english: Victoria Falls is a town in the western portion of Zimbabwe, across the border from Livingstone, Zambia, and near Botswana.

hausa: Garin yana kusa da matsirgar ruwa, kuma shine abu mafi jan hankali, amma wannan sanannen wajen yawon buɗe idon zai baiwa yan yawon kasada da masu sha’awar kalle-kalle damar dogon zama a wajen.
english: The town lies immediately next to the falls, and they are the major attraction, but this popular tourist destination offers both adventure seekers and sightseers plenty of opportunities for a longer stay.

hausa: A lokacin damuna (Nuwamba zuwa Maris), yawan ruwan zai ƙaru inda Mafaɗar ruwa za ta zama mai ban mamaki.
english: In the rainy season (November to March), the water volume will be higher and the Falls will be more dramatic.

hausa: Babu makawa sai kun jiƙe idan kuka ƙetare gadar ko yin tafiya a kusa da hanyar mai kwane-kwane a kusa da matsirgar ruwan.
english: You are guaranteed to get wet if you cross the bridge or walk along the trails winding near the Falls.

hausa: A wani ɓangaren kuma, ya tabbata cewa saboda yawan ruwa yayi tsiri sama, shi yasa ya kare maka asalin matsirgar ruwa - daga dukkan ruwan!
english: On the other hand, it is precisely because the volume of water is so high that your viewing of the actual Falls will be obscured—by all the water!

hausa: Kabarin Tutankhamun (KV62). KV62 na iya zama mafi shahararrun ƙaburbura a cikin kwari, wurin da Howard Carter ya gano 1922 na kusan binne masarauta na matashin sarki.
english: Tomb of Tutankhamun (KV62). KV62 may be the most famous of the tombs in the Valley, the scene of Howard Carter's 1922 discovery of the almost intact royal burial of the young king.

hausa: Idan aka kwatanta da wasu ƙaburburan masarauta, kodayake, kabarin Tutankhamun yana da ƙarancin ƙimar isa a ziyarce shi, saboda yana da ƙanƙanta da ƙarancin ado.
english: Compared to most of the other royal tombs, however, the tomb of Tutankhamun is barely worth visiting, being much smaller and with limited decoration.

hausa: Duk mai sha’awar ganin shaidar ɓarnar da aka yiwa gawar yayin yunƙurin cire shi daga cikin akwatin gawa zai yi baƙin ciki tunda kai da kafaɗu kawai ake gani.
english: Anyone interested in seeing evidence of the damage to the mummy done during attempts to remove it from the coffin will be disappointed as only the head and shoulders are visible.

hausa: Dukiya mai ban mamaki da ke cikin kabarin ba ta cikin ta, amma an cire ta zuwa Gidan Tarihi na Masar da ke Alkahira.
english: The fabulous riches of the tomb are no longer in it, but have been removed to the Egyptian Museum in Cairo.

hausa: Yana da kyau baƙi masu ƙarancin lokaci su yi amfani da lokacin a wani wuri daban.
english: Visitors with limited time would be best to spend their time elsewhere.

hausa: Phnom Krom, kilomita 12 kudu maso yamma na Siem Reap. An gina wannan haikalin da ke kan tudu a ƙarshen ƙarni na 9, a zamanin Sarki Yasovarman.
english: Phnom Krom, 12 km southwest of Siem Reap. This hilltop temple was built at the end of the 9th century, during the reign of King Yasovarman.

hausa: Yanayin lalacewar wurin ibadar da kuma hangensa ta kan tafkin Tonle Sap ya sanya hawa tsaunin ya zama da kyau.
english: The gloomy atmosphere of the temple and the view over the Tonle Sap lake make the climb to the hill worthwhile.

hausa: A sauƙaƙe za a iya haɗe ziyara zuwa wurin da tafiya da kwalekwale zuwa tafkin.
english: A visit to the site can be conveniently combined with a boat trip to the lake.

hausa: Ana buƙatar izinin Angkor don shiga haikalin don haka kada a manta da kawo fasfo ɗinku yayin tafiya zuwa Tonle Sap.
english: The Angkor Pass is needed to enter the temple so do not forget to bring your passport along when heading to Tonle Sap.

hausa: Birnin Ƙudus shine babban birni kuma birni mafi girma a Isra’ila, kodayake yawancin ƙasashe da kuma Majalisar Ɗinkin Duniya ba su amince da shi a matsayin babban birnin ƙasar Isra’ila ba.
english: Jerusalem is the capital and largest city of Israel, though most other countries and the United Nations do not recognize it as Israel's capital.

hausa: Tsohon birni a cikin tsaunikan Yahudiya yana da tarihi mai ban sha'awa mai ɗaukar dubban shekaru.
english: The ancient city in the Judean Hills has a fascinating history spanning thousands of years.

hausa: Birnin mai tsarki ne ga addinai uku da suka gaskanta da ubangiji ɗaya - Yahudanci, Kiristanci da Musulunci, sannan yana zama a matsayin cibiyar tsarkake ruhi, addini, da al’ada.
english: The city is holy to the three monotheistic religions - Judaism, Christianity and Islam, and serves as a spiritual, religious, and cultural center.

hausa: Saboda mahimmancin birnin a addinance, musamman tsofaffin wurare na tsohon birnin, Birnin Ƙudus ya zama cibiyar yawon buɗe ido a ƙasar Israila.
english: Due to the religious significance of the city, and in particular the many sites of the Old City area, Jerusalem is one of the main tourist destinations in Israel.

hausa: Baitul maqdis tana da wuraren tarihi da yawa, na gargajiya da na al'adu, tare da kuɗaɗe da cibiyoyin cin kasuwa, gidajen shakatawa, da gidajen abinci.
english: Jerusalem has many historic, archeological and cultural sites, along with vibrant and crowded shopping centers, cafés, and restaurants.

hausa: Ecuador na bukatar cewa sai ‘yan kasar Cuba sun samu wasikar gayyata kafin shiga Ecuador ta filayen jiragen sama na ƙasa da ƙasa ko kuma wuraren shiga na kan iyaka.
english: Ecuador requires that Cuban citizens receive an invitation letter prior to entering Ecuador through international airports or frontier admission points.

hausa: Dole ne Ma'aikatar Harkokin Wajen Ecuador, ta halasta sahihancin wannan wasiƙa, kuma ta cika wasu buƙatu.
english: This letter must be legalized by the Ecuadorian Ministry of Foreign Affairs, and comply with certain requirements.

hausa: Wadannan ka’idoji an samar da su domin tsara yadda hijira tsakanin kasashen za ta rika gudana.
english: These requirements are designed to provide an organized migratory flow between both countries.

hausa: Yan kasan Cuba da ke da green card na US su ziyarci Ecuadorian Consulate domin karban kebewa daga wannan umurni.
english: Cuban citizens who are US green card holders should visit an Ecuadorian Consulate to obtain an exemption to this requirement.

hausa: Dole takardar shigar ka ta zama karbabbe na akalla wata 6 bayan ainihin ranar tafiyar ka. Ana bukatar tiketin tafiyar shiga da fita domin tabbatar da yawan ranakun da zaka zauna a kasar.
english: Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months beyond your travel dates. A round/onward trip ticket is needed to prove the length of your stay.

hausa: Yawan bude ido cikin jama’a ya fi saukin kudi, don haka idan kai kadai ne ko kana tare da abokin tafiya daya, yi kokari ka hadu da sauran mutane domin hada kungiya na mutum hudu zuwa shidda domin samun farashi mai sauki.
english: Tours are cheaper for larger groups, so if you're by yourself or with just one friend, try to meet other people and form a group of four to six for a better per-person rate.

hausa: Koda yake kada wannan ya dame ka, saboda yawanci yan yawon bude ido ana cusa su cikin motoci domin a cikasu.
english: However, this shouldn't really be off your concern, because often tourists are shuffled around to fill the cars.

hausa: Da alama wata hanya ce ta yaudarar mutane su kara biyan kudade.
english: It seems actually to be more a way of tricking people into believing they have to pay more.

hausa: Wanda tsawonsa ya yi wa ƙuryar arewacin Machu Picchu rumfa tsauni ne mai santsi, wanda yawanci ya zama farfajiyar baya a hotunan kufayin da dama.
english: Towering above the north end of Machu Picchu is this steep mountain, often the backdrop to many photos of the ruins.

hausa: Akwai alamar jan aiki daga ƙasa, kuma hawa ne mai tsawo da wahala, amma yawancin mutane masu lafiya za su iya kaiwa cikin kusan mintuna 45.
english: It looks a bit daunting from below, and it is a steep and difficult ascent, but most reasonably fit persons should be able to make it in about 45 minutes.

hausa: An jejjera duwatsun takawa a kan hanyar, a can sama kuma akwai igiyoyin karfe da ke dauke da karafunan da ake dafawa da hannu.
english: Stone steps are laid along most of the path, and in the steeper sections steel cables provide a supporting handrail.

hausa: Bayan fadin wannan, sa ran kasa yin numfashi, kuma ka kula a cikin bangarori masu santsi, musamman yayin da ka ke jike, saboda zai iya zama mai haɗari cikin sauri.
english: That said, expect to be out of breath, and take care in the steeper portions, especially when wet, as it can become dangerous quickly.

hausa: Akwai wani karamin kogo kusa da saman da dole ne a wuce ta wurin, ya yi ɗan ƙasa kuma matsetse sosai.
english: There's a tiny cave near the top that must be passed through, it is quite low and a rather tight squeeze.

hausa: Ganin wuraren da kuma dabbobin daji na Galapagos zai fi kyau a cikin kwalekwale, yadda Charles Darwin ya yi a 1835.
english: Seeing the sites and wildlife of the Galapagos is best done by boat, just as Charles Darwin did it in 1835.

hausa: Fiye da tekuna guda 60 suna tafiya cikin ruwan Galapagos - girman su daga fasinjoji 8 zuwa 100.
english: Over 60 cruise ships ply the Galapagos waters - ranging in size from 8 to 100 passengers.

hausa: Yawancin mutane suna yin ajiyar wurin su sosai kafin lokaci (saboda galibin kwale-kwalen cike suke a lokacin babban kaka).
english: Most people book their place well in advance (as the boats are usually full during the high season).

hausa: A tabbatar da cewa wakili wanda aka bi ta hannunsa gwanin Galapagos ne wanda yake da masaniya kan ire-iren jiragen ruwa.
english: Be sure the agent through whom you book is a Galapagos specialist with a good knowledge of a wide variety of ships.

hausa: Wannan zai tabbatar da cewa ainihi ra’ayinka da/ko gazawarka sun dace da jirgin ruwan da ya fi dacewa da su.
english: This will ensure that your particular interests and/or constraints are matched with the ship most suitable to them.

hausa: Kafin Spanish ta zo a cikin ƙarni na 16, arewacin Chile yana ƙarƙashin mulkin Inca yayin da 'yan asalin Araucanians (Mapuche) suke zaune a tsakiya da kudancin Chile.
english: Before the Spanish arrived in the 16th century, northern Chile was under Inca rule while the indigenous Araucanians (Mapuche) inhabited central and southern Chile.

hausa: Mapuche suma suna daga cikin kungiyoyin asalin Amurkawa masu cin gashin kai na baya, waɗanda ba su cika bin dokar mulkin Spanish ba har sai bayan Chileancin Chile.
english: The Mapuche were also one of the last independent American indigenous groups, that were not fully absorbed into Spanish-speaking rule until after Chile's independence.

hausa: Kodayake Chile ta ayyana yanci kai a 1810 (a lokacin yaƙe-yaƙen Napoleonic wanda ya bar Spain ba tare da gwamnatin tsakiya mai aiki ba har tsawon shekaru), ba a sami nasarar cin nasara akan Spanish ɗin ba sai 1818.
english: Although Chile declared independence in 1810 (amid the Napoleonic wars that left Spain without a functioning central government for a couple of years), decisive victory over the Spanish was not achieved until 1818.

hausa: Jamhuriyar Dominican (Da Sifaniyanci: República Dominicana) ƙasa ce da ke yankin Caribbean da ta kunshi rabin gabashin tsibirin Hispaniola, wanda su ka yi tarayya da kasar Haiti a cikinsaa
english: The Dominican Republic (Spanish: República Dominicana) is a Caribbean country that occupies the eastern half of the island of Hispaniola, which it shares with Haiti

hausa: Bayan gaɓar teku masu farin yashi da yanayin mai tsaunuka, a ƙasar ce ake da birnin Turai mafi tsufa a yankin Americas, wanda yanzu ya ke ɓangaren Santo Domingo.
english: Besides white sand beaches and mountain landscapes, the country is home to the oldest European city in the Americas, now part of Santo Domingo.

hausa: Taínos da Caribes su suka fara zama a tsibirin. Caribes mutane ne masu magana da harshen Arawakan waɗanda suka isa kusan 10,000 BCE.
english: The island was first inhabited by the Taínos and Caribes. The Caribes were an Arawakan-speaking people who had arrived around 10,000 BCE.

hausa: Cikin shekaru kaɗan bayan zuwan Turawa masu yawon bincike, yawan jama’ar Tainos ya ragu matuka sakamakon mayakan sifaniyawa yan mulkin mallakaa
english: Within a few short years following the arrival of European explorers, the population of Tainos had significantly been reduced by the Spanish conquerors

hausa: Dangane da Fray Bartolomé de las Casas (Tratado de las Indias) tsakanin 1492 da 1498 masu nasara daga Spain sun kashe kusan Taínos 100,000.
english: Based on Fray Bartolomé de las Casas (Tratado de las Indias) between 1492 and 1498 the Spanish conquerors killed around 100,000 Taínos.

hausa: Jardín de la Unión. An gina wannan sarari azaman tashar ƙarfe na ƙarfe na 17 na ƙarni, wanda Templo de San Diego shine kadai gidan da ya tsira.
english: Jardín de la Unión. This space was built as the atrium for a 17th-century convent, of which the Templo de San Diego is the sole surviving building.

hausa: Yanzu yana aiki azaman tsakiyar filin wasa, kuma koyaushe yana da abubuwa da yawa da ke gudana, dare da rana.
english: It now functions as the central plaza, and always has a lot of things going on, day and night.

hausa: Akwai gidajen abinci da yawa da ke kewaye da lambu, kuma da yamma a can galibi ana ba da kade kade kyauta daga gazebo ta tsakiya.
english: There are a number of restaurants surrounding the garden, and in the afternoons and evening there free concerts are often given from the central gazebo.

hausa: Callejon del Beso (Alley na Kiss). Falon baranda biyu da santimita 69 kacal suka rabu gida ne na tsohuwar tatsuniyar soyayya.
english: Callejon del Beso (Alley of the Kiss). Two balconies separated by only 69 centimeters is home of an old love legend.

hausa: A ‘yan kwabbai kadan wasu yara za su ba ka labarin.
english: For a few pennies some children will tell you the story.

hausa: Tsibirin Bowen sanannen tafiya rana daya ne ko ziyarar koyo na ƙarshen mako da ke samar da wasan kwalekwale, tattakin kan dutse, shaguna, gidajen abinci, da wasu.
english: Bowen Island is a popular day trip or weekend excursion offering kayaking, hiking, shops, restaurants, and more.

hausa: Al’ummar ta hakika na nan a Howe Sound idan ka wuce garin Vancouver, kuma ana iya shiga ta hanyar kwalekwalen haya da ke tashi daga tsibirin Granville dake garin Vancouver.
english: This authentic community is located in Howe Sound just off Vancouver, and is easily accessed via scheduled water taxis departing Granville Island in downtown Vancouver.

hausa: Domin waɗanda ke jin daɗin yin harkoki a waje, tattaki daga kan Teku zuwa farfajiyar Sama yana da muhimmanci.
english: For those who enjoy outdoor activities, a trek up the Sea to Sky corridor is essential.

hausa: Whistler (tuki na awa 1.5 daga Vancouver) yana da tsada amma sananne ne saboda Wasannin Olympics na lokacin sanyi na 2010.
english: Whistler (1.5 hour drive from Vancouver) is expensive but well-known because of the 2010 Winter Olympics.

hausa: A lokaci hunturu, ji dadi da gudun ski mafi kyau a North America, sannan da bazara a gwada hawan dutse a keke na kwarai da gaske.
english: In the winter, enjoy some of the best skiing in North America, and in the summer try some authentic mountain biking.

hausa: Dole ne a bayar da izinin lokaci kafin. Dole ne ya zama na kana da izinin kasancewa a Sirena tun farkon dare har wayewar gari.
english: Permits must be reserved in advance. You must have a permit to stay overnight at Sirena.

hausa: Sirena ne tashar gandun daji da ke samar da masaukin kwana da abinci mai zafi tare da kwanan sansani. La Leona, San Pedrillo, da Los Patos na samar da sansani ne kawai ba tare da abinci ba.
english: Sirena is the only ranger station that offers dormitory lodging and hot meals in addition to camping. La Leona, San Pedrillo, and Los Patos offer only camping with no food service.

hausa: Mai yiwuwa ne samun izinin wurin shakatawa kai tsaye daga Tashar Gandun Daji a Puerto Jiménez, amma ba su karbar katunan kuɗi.
english: It is possible to secure park permits directly from the Ranger Station in Puerto Jiménez, but they do not accept credit cards

hausa: Hukumar Kula da Wurin Shaƙatawar (MINAE) ba ta bayar da izinin shiga na sama da wata ɗaya kafin lokacin isowa da ake tsammani.
english: The Park Service (MINAE) does not issue park permits more than one month in advance of anticipated arrival.

hausa: CafeNet El Sol suna ba da sabis na ajiyar kuɗi don ƙimar US $ 30, ko $ 10 don wucewar kwana ɗaya; cikakkun bayanai akan shafin Corcovado.
english: CafeNet El Sol offers a reservation service for a fee of US$30, or $10 for one-day passes; details on their Corcovado page.

hausa: Tsibirin Cook tsibiri ce wanda ba ta da alaka tare da New Zealand, wanda ke cikin Polynesia, a tsakiyar Tekun Pacific ta Kudu.
english: The Cook Islands are an island country in free association with New Zealand, located in Polynesia, in the middle of the South Pacific Ocean.

hausa: Wani rukunin tsibirai ne da ke da tsibirai 15 da suke warwatse a faɗin kilomitar teku miliyan 2.2 km2.
english: It is an archipelago with 15 islands spread out over 2.2 million km2 of ocean.

hausa: Da yankin lokaci iri daya da na Hawaii, wasu lokuta a kan ɗauki tsibiran a matsayin “Hawaii ta can ƙasa”.
english: With the same time zone as Hawaii, the islands are sometimes thought of as "Hawaii down under".

hausa: Kodayake ƙarami ne, yana tunatar da wasu tsoffin maziyarta na Hawaii kafin samin ƙasa ba tare da duk manyan otal na ‘yan yawon shakatawa da kuma sauran cigaba.
english: Though smaller, it reminds some elderly visitors of Hawaii before statehood without all the large tourist hotels and other development.

hausa: Tsibiran Cook ba su da wasu birane amma suna da tsibirai daban-daban har 15. Manyan cikinsu su ne Rarotonga da Aitutaki.
english: The Cook Islands do not have any cities but are composed of 15 different islands. The main ones are Rarotonga and Aitutaki.

hausa: A ƙasashen da suka ci gaba a yau, an ɗaukaka samar da wurin kwana mai daraja da karin kumallo zuwa wani nau'i na fasaha.
english: In developed countries today, providing deluxe bed and breakfasts has been raised to a sort of art-form.

hausa: Daga ƙarshe dai, B&Bs tana gasa ne a abubuwar musamman guda biyu: shimfidas da abincin karya kumallo.
english: At the top end, B&Bs obviously compete mainly on two main things: bedding and breakfast.

hausa: Kamar yadda ya dace, mutum yana iya dacewa da samun gadon gurma a itin wanan kyakyawar kadamarwar, watakila wanda aka yi da hannu a murkushe ko tsohon gado.
english: Accordingly, at the finest such establishments one is apt to find the most luxurious bedding, maybe a handmade quilt or an antique bed.

hausa: kumallo na iya haɗawa da kayan ɗanɗano na yankin ko kuma abincin musamman na mai masauki.
english: Breakfast may include seasonal delights of the region or the host's speciality dish.

hausa: Yanayin ya kasance tsohon gini mai tarihi mai dauke da kayayyakin gargajiya, filin yanka farce da kuma wurin iyo.
english: The setting might be an historic old building with antique furnishings, manicured grounds and a swimming pool.

hausa: Shiga cikin motarka sannan ka kama doguwar hanyar tafiya yana da wani shauƙi na jin dadi kawai cikinsa.
english: Getting into your own car and heading off on a long road trip has an intrinsic appeal in its simplicity.

hausa: Ba kaman manyan motoci ba, maiyiwuwa kafi sabawa da tuka motar ka kuma kasan iyakokinta.
english: Unlike larger vehicles, you are probably already familiar with driving your car and know its limitations.

hausa: Kafa tenti a kaddara na musamman ko kuma cikin gari na iya jawo hankalin jama’a cikin sauki wanda ba’a so.
english: Setting up a tent on private property or in a town of any size can easily attract unwanted attention.

hausa: A takaice, yin amfani da motarka wata babbar hanya ce zuwa tafiya a kan hanya amma ba ko wace lokaci ba hanya ce na “zango”.
english: In short, using your car is a great way to take a road trip but seldom in itself a way to "camp".

hausa: Kwanan daji a mota ya fi dadi idan kana amfani da samfurin manyan motoci irinsu SUV, Sedan ko Station Wagon, wadanda ke da kujeru da ake iya kwantar da su.
english: Car camping is possible if you have a large minivan, SUV, Sedan or Station Wagon with seats that lay down.

hausa: Wasu otal suna da kayan tarihi tun zamanin zinariya na hanyar jirgin kasa da layin teku; kafin yakin duniya na biyu, a cikin karni na 19 ko farkon karni na 20.
english: Some hotels have a heritage from the golden age of steam railways and ocean liners; before the Second World War, in the 19th or early 20th centuries.

hausa: Waɗannan otaloli sun kasance inda masu arziƙi da kuma sanannu na yau za su zama, kuma sau da yawa suna da wurin cin abincin dare mai kyau da kuma rayuwar dare.
english: These hotels were where the rich and the famous of the day would stay, and often had fine dining and nightlife.

hausa: Tsoffin kayan aiki, da rashin sabbin abubuwan more rayuwa, da kuma wasu tsufa ma na daga cikin halayen su.
english: The old fashioned fittings, the lack of the latest amenities, and a certain graceful agedness are also part of their character.

hausa: Yayin da galibi suka kasance mallakin jama’a, a wasu lokutan kuma su kan karbi bakoncin shugabannin kasashe da ma wasu manyan mutane masu alfarma.
english: While they are usually privately owned, they sometimes accommodate visiting heads of state and other dignitaries.

hausa: Matafiyi da ke da tarin kudade na iya shirya zagaya duniya, ya rika tsayawa a wurare ya kwana cikin wasu daga dimbin ota-otal.
english: A traveller with piles of money might consider a round the world flight, broken up with stays in many of these hotels.

hausa: Gamayyar musayar karrama baƙi ita ce ƙungiyar da ke sadar da matafiya da mutanen yankin a garuruwan da za su ziyarta.
english: A hospitality exchange network is the organization that connects travelers with locals in the cities they are going to visit.

hausa: Shiga cikin rukunin nan, a wasu lokutan yana bukatar cike wata takadda ta Intanet: duk da yake wasu ma su kan bukaci karin tantancewa.
english: Joining such a network usually just requires filling out an online form; although some networks offer or require additional verification.

hausa: Jerin sunayen wadanda za su karbi bakin yana nan an wallafa shi ko dai a jaridu ko kuma a yanar gizo, a wasu lokutan ma har da karin bayani da sharhin wasu matafiyan.
english: A listing of available hosts is then provided either in print and/or online, sometimes with references and reviews by other travelers.

hausa: An kafa kamfanin Couchsurfing ne a watan Janairun 2004 bayan da masanin na'urar kwamfuta Casey Fenton ya sami jirgi mai arha zuwa Iceland amma bai sami wurin zama ba.
english: Couchsurfing was founded in January 2004 after computer programmer Casey Fenton found a cheap flight to Iceland but did not have a place to stay.

hausa: Ya turo saƙon imel zuwa ga ɗalibai a jam'iar ta gida kuma ya samu wani gagarumin yawan taya don masauki na kyauta.
english: He emailed students at the local university and received an overwhelming number of offers for free accommodation.

hausa: An samar da Gidajen otal din ne domin matasa - yawancin baki zaka samu basu wuce shekaru ashirin ba- amma kuma sau da yawa ana samun matafiya tsofaffi a wajen.
english: Hostels cater primarily to young people – a typical guest is in their twenties – but you can often find older travellers there too.

hausa: Iyalai tare da yara abu ne mai wuya, amma wasu gidajen kwanan suna ba su damar a ɗakuna masu zaman kansu.
english: Families with children are a rare sight, but some hostels do allow them in private rooms.

hausa: Birnin Beijing a kasar China ita ce mai masaukin baki gasar Olympic na lokacin sanyi na 2022, Wannan zai sanya birnin ta zama na farko da ta daukin nauyin mai masaukin baki na gasar a lokacin sanyin da na zafi.
english: The city of Beijing in China will be the host city of the Olympic Winter Games in 2022, which will make it the first city to have hosted both the summer and winter Olympics.

hausa: Beijing za ta karbi bakoncin budewa tare da rufe bukukuwan wasanni kan kankara na cikin daki.
english: Beijing will host the opening and closing ceremonies and the indoor ice events.

hausa: Sauran abubuwan da za a yi a tseren kankara za su kasance ne a yankin wasan tsere na Taizicheng da ke Zhangjiakou, kimanin kilomita 220 (mil mil 140) daga Beijing.
english: Other skiing events will be at the Taizicheng ski area in Zhangjiakou, about 220 km (140 miles) from Beijing.

hausa: Yawancin dakunan bautar na da bukukuwan shekara-shekara da kan fara daga ƙarshen Nuwamba zuwa Tsakiyar Mayu, bambancin ranakun sun danganta da irin jerin kidayar watanni a shekarar da kowane ɗakin bauta ke aiki da ita.
english: Most of the temples do have an Annual festival starting from November end to Mid of May, which varies according to each temple's annual calendar.

hausa: Yawancin bukukuwan haikalin ana yin su ne a matsayin ɓangare na ranar tunawa da haikalin ko bikin ranar haihuwar allahntaka ko wani babban taron da ke hade da haikalin.
english: Most of the temple festivals is celebrated as part of temple's anniversary or presiding deity's birthday or any other major event associated with the temple.

hausa: Bukukuwan ibada na Kerala suna da ban sha'awa don gani, tare da jerin gwanon giwaye da aka kawata, ƙungiyar makaɗa ta haikali da sauran shagalin.
english: Kerala's temple festivals are very interesting to see, with regular procession of decorated elephants, temple orchestra and other festivities.

hausa: Bukin Nune-nune na Duniya (da aka fi kira da Nunawa, ko a sauƙaƙe Nuni) wani babban taron ƙasa da ƙasa ne kan fasahar ƙirƙira da kuma kimiyya.
english: A World's Fair (commonly called World Exposition, or simply Expo) is large international festival of arts and sciences.

hausa: Kasashen da ke halartar taron sun gabatar da fasahohi da ilimai a dandalin kasashen su domin nuna wa duniya irin al’adu da tarihinsu.
english: Participating countries present artistic and educational displays in national pavilions to showcase world issues or their country's culture and history.

hausa: Bikin kasa-da-kasa na ayyukan noma shiri ne na musamman wanda ke nuna tsirrai, kayan lambu da duk wasu abubuwa da ke alaka da tsirrai.
english: International Horticultural Expositions are specialised events which showcase floral displays, botanical gardens and anything else to do with plants.

hausa: Ko da yake a ka'ida za su iya faruwa a kowace shekara (muddin suna cikin ƙasashe daban-daban), a aikace ba haka suke ba.
english: Although in theory they can take place annually (so long as they are in different countries), in practice they are not.

hausa: Wadannan al'amuran suna kasancewa a kowane lokaci tsakanin watanni uku zuwa shida, kuma tana gudana ne a fili mai fadin hectares 50 zuwa sama.
english: These events normally last anywhere between three and six months, and are held on sites no smaller than 50 hectares.

hausa: Akwai nau'ikan yadda ake nadar fina-finai da yawa waɗanda aka yi amfani da su tsawon shekaru. Wanda aka fi amfani da shi shine mai kaurin 35 mm (36 by 24 mm).
english: There are many different film formats that have been used over the years. Standard 35 mm film (36 by 24 mm negative) is much the commonest.

hausa: Ana iya mayarwa cikin sauki idan ya kare kuma yana iya bada ƙuduri na kusan kwatankwacin DSLR na yanzu.
english: It can usually be replenished fairly easily if you run out, and gives resolution roughly comparable to a current DSLR.

hausa: Wasu matsakaika-girman kamarorin fim suna amfani da girma 6cm ta 6cm, mafi daidai a 56mm ta 56mm babu.
english: Some medium-format film cameras use a 6 by 6 cm format, more precisely a 56 by 56 mm negative.

hausa: Wannan na bada haske kusan sau huɗu fiye da dodo fim 35 mm (3136 mm2 versus 864).
english: This gives resolution almost four times that of a 35 mm negative (3136 mm2 versus 864).

hausa: Dabbobin daji suna daga cikin mahimman ƙalubalen zane ga mai ɗaukar hoto, kuma yana buƙatar haɗuwa da sa'a, haƙuri, kwarewa da kayan aiki masu kyau.
english: Wildlife is among the most challenging motifs for a photographer, and needs a combination of good luck, patience, experience and good equipment.

hausa: Galibi ba a dauki sana’ar daukar hoton namun daji a da muhimmanci ba, amma kamar sana’ar daukar hoton gaba dayanta, hoto ya fi tasiri nesa ba kusa ba kan dubban kalmomi.
english: Wildlife photography is often taken for granted, but like photography in general, a picture is worth a thousand words.

hausa: Hoto na namun daji galibi yana buƙatar dogon ruwan tabarau na telephoto, kodayake abubuwa kamar garken tsuntsaye ko ƙaramin halitta suna buƙatar wasu ruwan tabarau.
english: Wildlife photography often requires a long telephoto lens, though things like a flock of birds or a tiny creature need other lenses.

hausa: Yawancin dabbobi masu ban sha'awa suna da wuyar samu, kuma wuraren shakatawa wasu lokuta suna da ƙa'idodi game da ɗaukar hoto don dalilan kasuwanci.
english: Many exotic animals are hard to find, and parks sometimes have rules about taking photographs for commercial purposes.

hausa: Dabbobin daji ko dai suna iya kasancewa masu gudun mutane ko kuma mafaɗata. Muhalli na iya zama mai sanyi, zafi, ko akasin haka mai ƙuntatawa.
english: Wild animals might either be shy or aggressive. The environment might be cold, hot, or otherwise hostile.

hausa: Duniya tana da yare fiye da 5,000, yaruka dabam-dabam, gami da sama da ashirin da miliyan 50 ko da masu magana.
english: The world has over 5,000 different languages, including more than twenty with 50 million or more speakers.

hausa: Rubutattun kalmomi sau da yawa suna da sauƙin fahimta fiye da kalmomin magana, kuma. Wannan gaskiya ne musamman ga adiresoshin, waɗanda galibi suna da wahalar furtawa cikin fahimta.
english: Written words are often easier to understand than spoken words, also. This is especially true of addresses, which are often difficult to pronounce intelligibly.

hausa: A wasu kasashen kusan kowa na jin turanci, amma a wasu da yawa ba haka abin ya ke ba musamman tsakanin matasa.
english: Many entire nations are completely fluent in English, and in even more you can expect a limited knowledge - especially among younger people.

hausa: Ka yi tunanin, idan za ka so, wani Mancunian, Boston, Jamaica da Sydneysider zaune a kusa da tebur suna cin abincin dare a wani gidan abinci a Toronto.
english: Imagine, if you will, a Mancunian, Bostonian, Jamaican and Sydneysider sitting around a table having dinner at a restaurant in Toronto.

hausa: Suna nishadantar da juna da labaru na garuruwansu, suna fadinsa a harsuna dabam-dabam na gida.
english: They're regaling each other with stories from their hometowns, told in their distinct accents and local argot.

hausa: Siyan abinci a cikin manyan shaguna shine galibi hanya mafi arha don ciyarwa. Ba tare da damar dafa abinci ba, zaɓuɓɓuka suna iyakance ga abincin da aka shirya.
english: Buying food in supermarkets is usually the cheapest way to get fed. Without cooking opportunities, choices are however limited to ready-made food.

hausa: Yawancin manyan kantuna su na dada samun sassa na kayan abincin ci kai tsaye daban daban. Wasu ma kan samar da na’urar dumama abinci.
english: Increasingly supermarkets are getting a more varied section of ready-made food. Some even provide a microwave oven or other means to heat food.

hausa: A wasu ƙasashe ko nau'ikan shagunan saida akwai aƙalla ɗakin cin abinci na kantin sayar da yanar gizon, galibi marassa tushe ne wanda yake da tsada.
english: In some countries or types of stores there is at least one on-site restaurant, often a rather informal one with affordable prices.

hausa: ka tabbatar ka ɗauka bugu na manufofinka da bayanan hulɗar mai inshorar tare da kai.
english: Make and carry copies of your policy and your insurer's contact details with you.

hausa: Suna bukatar a nuna adireshin imel na mai inshorar da kuma lambobin wayar kasahsen duniya domin bayar da shawarwari da kuma yin ikirari.
english: They need to show the insurer's e-mail address and international phone numbers for advice/authorizations and making claims.

hausa: Ka sami wani bugun a cikin kayan ka da kuma kan layi (imel da kanka tare da abin da aka makala, ko adana shi a cikin “gajimare”).
english: Have another copy in your luggage and online (e-mail to yourself with attachment, or stored in the "cloud").

hausa: Idan kuna tafiya tare da naurar kwamfutar tafi-da-gidanka ko kwamfutar hannu, adana kwafi a cikin ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya ko faifai (wanda za'a iya amfani ba tare da yanar gizo ba).
english: If traveling with a laptop or tablet, store a copy in its memory or disc (accessible without the internet).

hausa: Hakanan bayar da manufofi / kwafin layin waya ga abokan tafiya da dangi ko abokai na gida masu son taimakawa.
english: Also give policy/contact copies to traveling companions and relatives or friends back home willing to help.

hausa: Mosse (wandanda kuma aka sani da elk) ba a san su da faɗa ba, amma za su kare kansu idan suka zaci ana yi musu barazana.
english: Moose (also known as elk) aren't inherently aggressive, but will defend themselves if they perceive a threat.

hausa: Idan mutane basu ga hatsin suna da hatsarin gaske ba, suna iya kusantowa kusa dasu kuma su jefa kansu cikin hadari.
english: When people don't see moose as potentially dangerous, they may approach too closely and put themselves at risk.

hausa: A sha kayan barasa a sannu da hankali. Domin giya na tasiri daban daban ga mashayanta, don haka sanin gejinka na da mahimmanci.
english: Drink alcoholic drinks with moderation. Alcohol affects everyone differently, and knowing your limit is very important.

hausa: Matsaloli lafiya masu yiwuwa na dogon lokaci daga yawan shaye-shaye na iya haɗawa da lalacewar hanta har ma makanta da mutuwa. Haɗarin mai yiwuwa yana ƙaruwa lokacin shan giyan da baya bisa ƙa'ida.
english: Possible long term health events from excessive drinking can include liver damage and even blindness and death. The potential danger is increased when consuming illegally produced alcohol.

hausa: Samfurorin giya na fasa kwauri na iya kunsar sinadarai masu hadari irinsu methanol, wanda ke iya haddasa makanta ko ma mutuwa ko da kadan ne suka shiga jiki.
english: Illegal spirits can contain various dangerous impurities including methanol, which can cause blindness or death even in small doses.

hausa: Tabarau na iya fin araha a kasashen waje musamman kasashe matalauta inda biyan ma’aikata ke da rahusa.
english: Eyeglasses can be cheaper in a foreign country, especially in low-income countries where labour costs are lower.

hausa: Yi la'akari da samun gwajin ido a gida, musamman idan yana ƙarkashin inshora, sannan taho da takardar maganin don cike shi a wani wuri.
english: Consider getting an eye exam at home, especially if insurance covers it, and bringing the prescription along to be filed elsewhere.

hausa: Frames shahararrun kuma masu tsada da ake samu a wuraren na iya samun matsaloli guda biyu, wasu basu da kwari kuma na hakikar da aka shigo da su daga waje na da tsada fiye da na gida.
english: High-end brand-name frames available in such areas may have two problems; some may be knock-offs, and the real imported ones may be more expensive than at home.

hausa: Kofi yana daya daga cikin kasuwancin duniya, kuma tabbas za ku iya samun nau'ikan da yawa a yankinku.
english: Coffee is one of the world's most traded commodities, and you can probably find many types in your home region.

hausa: Duk da haka, akwai hanyoyi daban-daban na shan kofi a faɗin duniya wanda zai yi kyau mutum ya samu masaniya.
english: Nevertheless, there are many distinctive ways of drinking coffee around the world that are worth experiencing.

hausa: Shigarwar canyon (ko: Canyoneering) shi ne shigarwar ƙasan ramin canyon, wanda yake ko bussashe ko a cike da ruwa.
english: Canyoning (or: canyoneering) is about going in a bottom of a canyon, which is either dry or full of water.

hausa: Canyoning ya haɗu da abubuwa daga iyo, hawa da tsalle - amma yana buƙatar ɗan horo kaɗan ko siffar jiki don farawa (idan aka kwatanta da hawan dutse, wasan ruwa ko tseren kankara, misali).
english: Canyoning combines elements from swimming, climbing and jumping--but requires relatively little training or physical shape to get started (compared to rock climbing, scuba diving or alpine skiing, for example).

hausa: Yin yawo wata aiki ne na waje wanda ya ƙunshi tafiya cikin yanayin halitta, yawancin lokaci kan hanyar yawon.
english: Hiking is an outdoor activity which consists of walking in natural environments, often on hiking trails.

hausa: Tattakin rana ya ƙunshi nisan da ba su kai mil daya ba har zuwa nisa masu tsawon da za a iya kaiwa a cikin rana guda.
english: Day hiking involves distances of less than a mile up to longer distances that can be covered in a single day.

hausa: Don tattakin rana guda ta kan sassauƙar hanya ana buƙatar ‘yan shirye-shirye, kuma duk wani mutum mai matsakaiciyar lafiy zai iya jin daɗin su.
english: For a day hike along an easy trail little preparations are needed, and any moderately fit person can enjoy them.

hausa: Iyalai masu kananan yara na iya bukatar ƙarin shirye-shirye, amma shafe rana daya a waje zai yiwu ko da ma tare da jarirai da kananan yara da basu shiga makarantu ba ne.
english: Families with small children may need more preparations, but a day outdoors is easily possible even with babies and pre-school children.

hausa: A fadin duniya akwai kimanin ƙungiyoyi kusan 200 masu zaman kansu wadanda ke gudanar da harkokin yawon shaƙatawa.
english: Internationally, there are nearly 200 running tour organizations. Most of them operate independently.

hausa: Magajin Global Runnning Tours, Go Running Towers ta hada cibiyoyi sadarwa da yawa na masu gudu a nahiyoyi hudu.
english: The Global Running Tours successor, Go Running Tours networks dozens of sightrunning providers on four continents.

hausa: Da asali daga Zagayen Tseren Barcelona na Barcelona da kuma Ttseren Copenhagen na Copenhagen, nan da nan sai Zagayen Tseren Pague da ke Prague da wasu suka shigo.
english: With roots in Barcelona's Running Tours Barcelona and Copenhagen's Running Copenhagen, it was quickly joined by Running Tours Prague based in Prague and others.

hausa: Akwai abubuwa da yawa da ya kamata ayi la'akari da su kafin kuma lokacin tafiya wani wuri.
english: There are many things you have to take into consideration before and when you travel somewhere.

hausa: Idan kana bulaguro kada ka yi tsammani abubuwa za su kasance yadda ka san su a gida. Halayya, dokoki, abinci, zirga-zirgar abin hawa, masauki, ƙa'idodi, harshe da sauransu za su iya bambanta daga inda ka ke zaune.
english: When you travel, expect things not to be like they are "back home". Manners, laws, food, traffic, lodging, standards, language and so on will to some extent differ from where you live.

hausa: Wannan abu ne da ya kamata a sa a rai kodayaushe, don kaucewa samun rashin jin daɗi ko ma watakila bacin rai akan yadda bisa al’ada mutanen yankin ke yin abubuwansu.
english: This is something you always need to keep in mind, to avoid disappointment or perhaps even distaste over local ways to do things.

hausa: Kamfanonin tafiye-tafiye sun kasance tun karni na 19. Wakilin tafiye-tafiye galibi zaɓi ne mai kyau don tafiya wanda ya wuce abin da ya gabata na balaguro na ɗabi'a, al'ada, yare ko ƙasashe masu ƙarancin kuɗi.
english: Travel agencies have been around since the 19th century. A travel agent is usually a good option for a journey which extends beyond a traveller's previous experience of nature, culture, language or low-income countries.

hausa: Kodayake yawancin hukumomi suna shirye su ɗauki mafi yawan rijista na yau da kullun, wakilai da yawa sun ƙware kan wasu nau'ikan tafiye-tafiye, jeri na kasafin kuɗi ko inda ake so.
english: Although most agencies are willing to take on most regular bookings, many agents specialise in particular types of travel, budget ranges or destinations.

hausa: Zai fi kyau a yi amfani da wakili wanda yawanci lokaci Siya tiketi irin zuwa irin wuri daya.
english: It can be better to use an agent who frequently books similar trips to yours.

hausa: Lura da irin tafiye-tafiyen da wakili ke gabatarwa, ko a shafin yanar gizo ko a cikin taga shago.
english: Take a look at what trips the agent is promoting, whether on a website or in a shop window.

hausa: Idan kana son kallon duniya a araha, saboda bukatun dole, salon rayuwa ko kalubale, akwai wasu hanyoyin yin hakan.
english: If you want to see the world on the cheap, for necessity, lifestyle or challenge, there are some ways to do that.

hausa: A takaice, sun faɗi cikin ɓangarori biyu: Ko a yi aiki a yayin tafiya ko kuma takaita kashe kuɗi. Wannan bayani ta mayar da hankali a na ƙarshen.
english: Basically, they fall into two categories: Either work while you travel or try and limit your expenses. This article is focused on the latter.

hausa: Ga waɗanda za su iya sadaukar da kasancewa a wurin da su ke jin dadin zama, lokacinsu da hasashen rage kudaden da su ke kashewa sosai zai sa su iya shirya tafiya wadda ba zata ci kudi sosai ba.
english: For those willing to sacrifice comfort, time and predictability to push expenses down close to zero, see minimum budget travel.

hausa: Shawarwar tana daukar cewa matafiya ba sa sata, wuce iyaka, yin mu’amala a haramtacciyar kasuwa, roƙo, ko kuma yin amfani da wasu mutane don ribar kan su.
english: The advice assumes that travellers do not steal, trespass, participate in the illegal market, beg, or otherwise exploit other people for their own gain.

hausa: Wurin bincike na jami’an shige da fice yawanci shi ne wurin tsayawar farko yayin sauka daga jirgin sama, jirgin ruwa, ko kuma wani abin hawa.
english: An immigration checkpoint is usually the first stop when disembarking from a plane, a ship, or another vehicle.

hausa: A wasu jiragen kasa masu duban kan iyaka ana gudanar da bincike ne a yayin da jirgin ke tafiya kuma lallai ne ya zama kana da Katin Shaida lokacin da za ka shiga daya daga cikin irin wadannan jiragen.
english: In some cross-border trains inspections are done on the running train and you should have valid ID with you when boarding one of those trains.

hausa: A jirgin mai bacci na dare, mai gudanarwa na iya karban fasfo domin kada a dameka yayinda kake bacci.
english: On night sleeper trains, passports may be collected by the conductor so that you do not have your sleep interrupted.

hausa: Rajista wata ƙarin buƙata ce ta tsarin visa. A wasu ƙasashe, dole ne a yi rajistar kasancewarka da adireshin inda kake zaune tare da hukumomin yankin.
english: Registration is an additional requirement for the visa process. In some countries, you must register your presence and address where you are staying with the local authorities.

hausa: Wannan na iya buƙatar cike fom tare da yan sanda na gida ko ziyarar ofisoshin shige da fice.
english: This might require filling out a form with the local police or a visit to the immigration offices.

hausa: A ƙasashe da dama da ke da irin wannan doka, gidajen otal na yanki ke gudanar da rijistar (don haka tabbata ka tambaya).
english: In many countries with such a law, local hotels will handle the registration (make sure to ask).

hausa: A wasu lamuran kuma, wadanda suke zama a wajen wuraren zaman masu yawon bude ido ne kawai za su yi rajista. Ko da yake, hakan ya sa dokar ta zama wata iri, da bata fito baro-baro ba.
english: In other cases, only those staying outside of tourist accommodations need to register.  However, this makes the law much more obscure, so find out beforehand.

hausa: Tsara gine-ginen, tsari ne wanda ya jibanci kirkira da gina wurare. Tsarin gini yawanci na da tasiri wajen jawon hankalin masu yawon bude ido.
english: Architecture is concerned with the design and construction of buildings. The architecture of a place is often a tourist attraction in its own right.

hausa: Yawancin gine-ginen suna da kyan gani da kuma kallo daga dogon gini ko daga tagar da aka yi cikin hikima kan iya zama abin kyau da za a kalla.
english: Many buildings are quite beautiful to look at and the view from a tall building or from a cleverly-positioned window can be a beauty to behold.

hausa: Tsarin gine-gine ya cakudu da wasu sassa irinsu tsarin birane, ayyukan gini, kwalliyar gidaje, kwalliyar cikin dakuna da na waje.
english: Architecture overlaps considerably with other fields including urban planning, civil engineering, decorative arts, interior design and landscape design.

hausa: Ta yadda yawancin pueblos ɗin suke da nisa, ba za ku iya samun inda ake hada-hadar dare sosai ba tare da kun yi tafiya zuwa Albuquerque ko Santa Fe ba.
english: Given how remote many of the pueblos are, you won't be able to find a significant amount of nightlife without traveling to Albuquerque or Santa Fe.

hausa: Duk da haka akasarin gidajen caca da aka lissafa suna bayar da abun sha kuma yawanci suna nishadantarwa na arziƙi (musamman manyan dake zagaye da Albuquerque da Santa Fe kai tsaye).
english: However, nearly all of the casinos listed above serve drinks, and several of them bring in name-brand entertainment (primarily the large ones immediately surrounding Albuquerque and Santa Fe).

hausa: A yi hattara: kananan gidajen giya a garin nan wurare ne da ka iya zama hadari ga baki daga wata jihar.
english: Beware: small-town bars here are not always good places for the out-of-state visitor to hang out.

hausa: Kan abu daya, arewacin New Mexico na da manya matsaloli da tuki cikin maye, da kuma taruwan direbobi bugaggu ta yi yawwa kusa da mashayan kananan garuwa.
english: For one thing, northern New Mexico has significant problems with drunk driving, and the concentration of intoxicated drivers is high close to small-town bars.

hausa: Abubuwan da ba'a so ko makararrun rubutu an san shi azaman graffiti.
english: Unwanted murals or scribble is known as graffiti.

hausa: Duk da cewa ba sabon salon zamani ba ne, yawancin mutane watakila na alakanta shi da yadda matasa ke lalata wuraren jama’a ta hanyar amfani da fenti su yi zane-zane.
english: While it's far from a modern phenomenon, most people probably associate it with youth vandalizing public and private property using spray paint.

hausa: Duk da haka, a zamanin yau akwai ingantattun masu fasahar zane, abubuwan zane-zane da kuma “bangon shari'a” zanen. Graffiti a cikin wannan mahallin yawanci suna kama da ayyukan adabi maimakon alamun haramun.
english: However, nowadays there are established graffiti artists, graffiti events and "legal" walls. Graffiti paintings in this context often resemble artworks rather than illegible tags.

hausa: Boomerang jefawa sanannen fasaha ne da yawon bude ido ke son koya.
english: Boomerang throwing is a popular skill that many tourists want to acquire.

hausa: Idan kana son ka koyi jefa boomerang da ke dawowa hannunka, ka tabbatar kana da boomerang din da ya dace mai komowa.
english: If you want to learn throwing a boomerang that comes back to your hand, make sure you have a suitable boomerang for returning.

hausa: Yawancin majefi da ake samu a Australia a haƙiƙa ba masu dawowa ba ne. Yana da kyau ‘yan koyo kada su gwada jefawa a yanayin iska.
english: Most boomerangs available in Australia are in fact non-returning. It is best for beginners to not try throwing in windy

hausa: Ana dafa Abincin Hangi a cikin wani rami mai zafi a cikin ƙasa.
english: A Hangi Meal is cooked in a hot pit in the ground.

hausa: Ana dumama ramin ne ko dai da duwatsu masu zafi daga wuta, ko a wasu wuraren zafin ƙasa kan sanya zagayen tsandaurin ƙasa ya yi zafi.
english: The pit is either heated with hot stones from a fire, or in some places geothermal heat makes areas of ground naturally hot.

hausa: A kan yi amfani da hangi don dafa abincin dare irin na gargajiya.
english: The hangi is often used to cook a traditional roast style dinner.

hausa: Wurare da yawa a Rotorua na samar da hangi na murhun rami, yayin da wasu hangi ana samu a Christchurch, Wellington da wasu wurare.
english: Several places in Rotorua offer geothermal hangi, while other hangi can be sampled in Christchurch, Wellington and elsewhere.

hausa: MetroRail yana tsarin fasinjoji biyu a cikin jiragen kasa wadanda ke ciki da wajen Cape Town: MetroPlus (mai tsada na mawadata) da kuma Metro (mai araha na talakawa).
english: MetroRail has two classes on commuter trains in and around Cape Town: MetroPlus (also called First Class) and Metro (called Third Class).

hausa: MetroPlus ya fi kwanciyar hankali kuma ba shi da cunkoson jama'a amma ya fi tsada sosai, kodayake har yanzu ya fi tikitin jirgin ƙasa na yau da kullun a Turai.
english: MetroPlus is more comfortable and less crowded but slightly more expensive, though still cheaper than normal metro tickets in Europe.

hausa: Kowane jirgin ƙasa yana da MetroPlus da masu horar da Metro; masu koyawa MetroPlus koyaushe suna kan ƙarshen jirgin ƙasa mafi kusa da Cape Town.
english: Every train has both MetroPlus and Metro coaches; the MetroPlus coaches are always on the end of the train nearest Cape Town.

hausa: Daukawa wa wasu - Kar ku bar jakunanku inda baku ganin su ba, musamman idan kuna ƙetarewar iyakokin ƙasashen waje.
english: Carrying for others - Never let your bags out of your sight, especially when you are crossing international borders.

hausa: Za ka iya samun kanka ana amfani da kai a matsayin mai dakon ƙwayoyi ba tare da saninka ba, wanda zai jefa ka cikin gagarumar matsala.
english: You could find yourself being used as a drug carrier without your knowledge, which will land you in a great deal of trouble.

hausa: Wannan ya hada da jira a layi, saboda ana iya amfani da karnukan da ke shakar magani a kowane lokaci ba tare da sanarwa ba.
english: This includes waiting in line, as drug-sniffing dogs could be used at any time without notice.

hausa: Wasu ƙasashe suna aiwatar da hukunci mai tsanani ko da a kan masu laifukan farko ne; waɗannan na iya haɗawa da ɗauri a gidan kurkuku da ya wuce shekaru 10 ko mutuwa.
english: Some countries have exceedingly draconian punishments even for first time offenses; these can include prison sentences of over 10 years or death.

hausa: Jaka da ba a sata ba, makasudin sata ne kuma kan iya jan hankulan mahukunta saboda tsoron barazanar bam.
english: Unattended bags are a target for theft and can also attract attention from authorities wary of bomb threats.

hausa: A gida, saboda wannan yawan mu’amala da ƙwayoyin cuta na gida, akwai yiyuwar cewa tuni kun riga kun saba da su.
english: At home, due to this constant exposure to the local germs, odds are very high that you're already immune to them.

hausa: Amma a wasu ɓangarorin duniya, inda sabin halittar bakteriyar dabbobin a gare ku, zai yiwu ku shiga matsaloli.
english: But in other parts of the world, where the bacteriological fauna are new to you, you're far more likely to run into problems.

hausa: Hakanan, a cikin yanayin dumi kwayoyin cuta na girma da sauri kuma suna da tsawon rai a wajen jiki.
english: Also, in warmer climates bacteria both grow more quickly and survive longer outside the body.

hausa: Don haka annobar Delhi Belly, Tsinuwar Fir'auna, Ɗaukar Fansar Montezuma, da abokan su da yawa.
english: Thus the scourges of Delhi Belly, the Pharaoh's Curse, Montezuma's Revenge, and their many friends.

hausa: Kamar yadda matsalolin manumfashi suke a wurare masu yanayin sanyi, ana yawan samun matsalolin hanji a wurare masu yanayin zafi inda kuma lokuta da dama suna da ban haushi na daban amma ba hapipar haɗari ba.
english: As with respiratory problems in colder climates, intestinal problems in hot climates are fairly common and in most cases are distinctly annoying but not really dangerous.

hausa: Idan ka na tafiya a cikin kasashe masu tasowa a karon farko--ko a sashe na duniya da baka sani ba - ka tanaji ganin abubuwa da su ka sha banban da al’adunka.
english: If traveling in a developing country for the first time – or in a new part of the world – don't underestimate the potential culture shock.

hausa: Yawancin matafiya nutsatststsu na fuskantar kalubale sakamakon sabbin ci gaba a harkar tafiye-tafiye a duniya, yadda kananan canje-canje na al’ada ke karuwa cikin gaggawa.
english: Many a stable, capable traveler has been overcome by the newness of developing world travel, where many little cultural adjustments can add up quickly.

hausa: Musamman a kwanakinka na farko, yi la’akari da saukarwa kan salon yamma da ingantaccen masauki, abinci, da hidimomi na taimakawa wurin sabawa da yanayi.
english: Especially in your initial days, consider splurging on Western-style and -quality hotels, food, and services to help acclimatize.

hausa: Karka yi barci a katifa ko taburma a yankin ƙasa in da ka a san fauna na gida ba.
english: Do not sleep on a mattress or pad on the ground in areas where you do not know the local fauna.

hausa: Idan zaku yada zango, kawo sansannin sansanin ko guduma don kiyaye ku daga macizai, kunama da irin wannan.
english: If you are going to camp out, bring a camp cot or hammock to keep you away from snakes, scorpions and such.

hausa: Cika gidanka da wadataccen kofi da safe da kuma shayin shakatawa mai kyau na dare.
english: Fill your home with a rich coffee in the morning and some relaxing chamomile tea at night.

hausa: Lokacin da kake kan hutu, kuna da lokacin da za ku kula da kanku kuma ku ɗauki yan mintuna kaɗan don ƙirƙirar wani abu na musamman.
english: When you're on a staycation, you have the time to treat yourself and take a few extra minutes to brew up something special.

hausa: Idan kana son karin karsashi, ka yi amfani da damar samun wani abu da zai dau hankalinkaa
english: If you're feeling more adventurous, take the opportunity to juice or blend up some smoothies:

hausa: watakila ka gano wani abun sha da za ka iya haɗawa domin karin kumallo yayin da ka dawo aikinka na yau da gobe.
english: maybe you'll discover a simple beverage that you can make for breakfast when you're back to your daily routine.

hausa: Idan kana zaune a cikin birni mai al'adun shaye-shaye iri-iri, je gidajen giya ko mashaya a unguwannin da ba ka yawan zuwa.
english: If you live in a city with a varied drinking culture, go to bars or pubs in neighborhoods you don't frequent.

hausa: Ga wadanda ba sa gane kalmomin da ake amfani da su a harkar likitancin, kalmomin ciwuka masu watsuwa da na masu yaduwa na da ma'anoni daban-daban.
english: For those unfamiliar with medical jargon, the words infectious and contagious have distinct meanings.

hausa: Wata cuta mai saurin yaduwa ita ce wacce kwayar cuta Pathogen ke haifarwa, kamar ƙwayoyin cuta, ƙwayoyin bakteria, fungus ko wasu ƙwayoyin cuta.
english: An infectious disease is one that is caused by a pathogen, such as a virus, bacterium, fungus or other parasites.

hausa: Cuta mai saurin yaɗuwa cuta ce da ta ke da sauƙin yaduwa ta hanyar kasancewa a wurin da wanda ya kamu da cutar ya ke.
english: A contagious disease is a disease which is easily transmitted by being in the vicinity of an infected person.

hausa: Akasariin gwamnatoci na bukatar bakin dake shigowa ko kuma mazauna masu fita kasashensu da a yi musu rigakafin cuttutuka daban-daban.
english: Many governments require visitors entering, or residents leaving, their countries to be vaccinated for a range of diseases.

hausa: Yawanci wadannan dokokin zasu danganci kasar da matafiyin ya ziyarta ko ya ke shirin ziyarta.
english: These requirements may often depend on what countries a traveller has visited or intends to visit.

hausa: Daya daga manufofin masun karfi a Charlotte, North Carolina, ita ce cewa tana da wadataccen zaɓi mai inganci na iyalai.
english: One of strong points of Charlotte, North Carolina, is that it has an abundance of high-quality options for families.

hausa: Mazauna daga waɗansu wuraren yawanci kan ambaci zumuncin iyalai a matsayin babban dalilin komawa wurin, kuma sau da yawa maziyarta kan ji daɗin birnin cikin sauƙi zagaye da yara.
english: Residents from other areas often cite family-friendliness as a primary reason for moving there, and visitors often find the city easy to enjoy with children around.

hausa: A shekaru 20 da suka wuce, yawan abokantakar yara a babban garin Charlotte ya karu sosai.
english: In the past 20 years, the amount of child-friendly options in Uptown Charlotte has grown exponentially.

hausa: Iyalai a garin Charlotte ba su cika amfani da motocin haya ba, amma su kan yi amfani da su a wasu lokutan.
english: Taxis are not generally used by families in Charlotte, though they can be of some use in certain circumstances.

hausa: Akwai ƙarin don samun fasinjoji sama da 2, don haka wannan zaɓin na iya tsada fiye da yadda ake buƙata.
english: There is a surcharge for having more than 2 passengers, so this option might be more expensive than necessary.

hausa: Antarctica ce nahiya mafi sanyi a Duniya, wadda ta kewaye doron duniya na kudu.
english: Antarctica is the coldest place on Earth, and surrounds the South Pole.

hausa: Ziyarar yawon shaƙatawa na da tsada sosai, ya na buƙatar lafiyar jiki, za a iya yin ta ne a lokacin rani kaɗai Nuwamba-Fabrairu, sannan mafi yawa an taƙaice ziyarar ga Kewayen ruwa, Tsibirai da Tekun Ross.
english: Tourist visits are costly, demand physical fitness, can only take place in summer Nov-Feb, and are largely limited to the Peninsula, Islands and Ross Sea.

hausa: Ƴan dubunnan ma'aikata suna zaune a nan a lokacin rani a cikin wasu gidaje misalin dozin hudu galibi a waɗancan yankuna; wani adadi ɗan kaɗan suna zama a lokacin sanyi.
english: A couple of thousand staff live here in summer in some four dozen bases mostly in those areas; a small number stay over winter.

hausa: Cikin yankin Antarctica gari ne da babu kowa a ciki, ƙanƙara mai nisan km 2-3 ta rufe shi.
english: Inland Antarctica is a desolate plateau covered by 2-3 km of ice.

hausa: Ƙwararru na wasu lokai kan tafiye-tafiyen jirgin sama nesa da teku, don hawan dutse ko isa zuwa Iyakanci Duniya, wanda ke da babban tushe.
english: Occasional specialist air tours go inland, for mountaineering or to reach the Pole, which has a large base.

hausa: Hayar Layin Duniya na Kudu (ko Babbar Hanya) tsawon kilomita 1600 ne daga Tashar McMurdo akan Tekun Ross zuwa Layin duniyar.
english: The South Pole Traverse (or Highway) is a 1600 km trail from McMurdo Station on the Ross Sea to the Pole.

hausa: An cika matsatsen dusan ƙanƙarar shi mai tsagu kuma anyi alama da tutoci. Za a iya tafiyan da shi da tractors na musamman, hauling sleds da mai da kayayyaki.
english: It's compacted snow with crevasses filled in and marked by flags. It can only be traveled by specialized tractors, hauling sleds with fuel and supplies.

hausa: Waɗannan ba su da azama sosai saboda haka za ta ɗauki sawun ta doguwar tafiya a kewayen dutsen Transantarctic don zuwa saman jigawan.
english: These aren't very nimble so the trail has to take a long swerve around the Transantarctic Mountains to come onto the plateau.

hausa: Abin da ya fi haddasa haɗura a lokacin hunturu shi ne titi da gefen titi da mutane ke bi da kuma matattakala masu santsi.
english: The most common cause for accidents in winter is slippery roads, pavements (sidewalks) and especially steps.

hausa: Mafi karanci kana bukatar takalmi wanda ƙasan sa ya dace. Takalman lokacin zafi yawanci su na sulluɓewa a kan ƙanƙara ko dusarta hatta wasu takalman na hunturu su na gazawa.
english: At a minimum, you need footwear with suitable soles. Summer shoes are usually very slippery on ice and snow, even some winter boots are deficient.

hausa: Ya kamata tsarin ya sami isasshen zurfi, 5 mm (inci 1/5) ko fiye, kuma kayan aikin su kasance masu taushi a yanayin sanyi.
english: The pattern should be deep enough, 5 mm (1/5 inch) or more, and the material soft enough in cold temperatures.

hausa: Wasu takalman suna da ƙusoshi a ƙasansu kuma akwai abin ƙari mai ƙusoshi don yanayin santsi, wanda ya dace da yawancin takalma da sau ciki, domin takalmi mai tsini ko mai tsini da soson tafin ƙafa.
english: Some boots have studs and there is studded add-on equipment for slippery conditions, suitable for most shoes and boots, for the heels or heels and sole.

hausa: Ya kamata tsinin takalma su yi ƙasa da faɗi. Yawanci ana watsa yashi, tsakuwa ko gishiri (Calcium Chloride) a kan tituna ko hanyoyi don inganta kama ƙasa.
english: Heels should be low and wide. Sand, gravel or salt (calcium chloride) is often scattered on roads or paths to improve traction.

hausa: Avalanches ba abu ne mara kyau ba; gangara na iya riƙewa a hankali sosai, sai kuma sauran kima za su zuɓo a matsayin avalanches.
english: Avalanches are not an abnormality; steep slopes can hold only so much slow, and the excess volumes will come down as avalanches.

hausa: Matsalar ita ce dusar ƙanƙara na da danƙo, don haka yana buƙatar musabbabi da zai saka shi saukowa, kuma wasu dusar ƙanƙara da ke saukowa na iya zama musabbabin aukuwa ga sauran.
english: The problem is that snow is sticky, so it needs some triggering to come down, and some snow coming down can be the triggering event for the rest.

hausa: Wasu lokuta asalin musabbabin aukuwan shine rana da ke ɗumama dusar ƙanƙara, wani lokacin wasu ƙarin dusar ƙanƙara, wani lokacin wasu al'amuran yanayi, sau da yawa ɗan adam.
english: Sometimes the original trigging event is the sun warming the snow, sometimes some more snowfall, sometimes other natural events, often a human.

hausa: Mahaukaciyar guguwa kamar wani sunduƙi ne me jujjuyawa wanda ke ƙunshe da iska mai nauyi wadda ke zuƙar sauran iska da ke gefenta daga ciki da sama.
english: A tornado is a spinning column of very low-pressure air, which sucks the surrounding air inward and upward.

hausa: Suna samar da iska mai ƙarfi (yawanci 100-200 mil/awa) kuma na iya ɗaga abu mai nauyi a iska, ɗauke da su yayinda iska mai nauyin take tafiya.
english: They generate high winds (often 100-200 miles/hour) and can lift heavy objects into the air, carrying them as the tornado moves.

hausa: Suna farawa ne daga wani abu kamar hayaƙi da ke sauka daga girgijen guguwa sannan ya zama “mahaukaciyar guguwa” yayin da suka taba ƙasa.
english: They begin as funnels descending from storm clouds, and become "tornadoes" when they touch the ground.

hausa: Masu bada Keɓaɓɓen VPN (cibiyar sadarwar masu zaman kansu) hanya mai kyau ce ta ƙetare takunkumin siyasa da kasuwancin IP-geofiltering.
english: Personal VPN (virtual private network) providers are an excellent way of circumventing both political censorship and commercial IP-geofiltering.

hausa: Sun fi wakilan gidan yanar-gizo bisa dalilai da yawa: Suna gyara duka harɗewar intanet, ba http kawai ba.
english: They are superior to web proxies for several reasons: They re-route all Internet traffic, not only http.

hausa: A ƙa’ida suna samar da zango mai ƙarfi da kuma aiki mai inganci. An sirranta su don haka suna da wuyar leƙen asiri.
english: They normally offer higher bandwidth and better quality of service. They are encrypted and thus harder to spy on.

hausa: Kamfanonin yaɗa labarai suna yawan ƙarya akan dalilin wannan, suna iƙirarin cewa domin “hana satar fasaha” ne.
english: The media companies routinely lie about the purpose of this, claiming that it is to "prevent piracy".

hausa: A gaskiya, lambobin yankuna basu da wani dangantaka da naɗe mara ƙa'ida; naɗe da aka yi da kyau a faifai zai iya aiki daidai kan kowanne na’ura inda na asalin zai yi aiki.
english: In fact, region codes have absolutely no effect on illegal copying; a bit-for-bit copy of a disk will play just fine on any device where the original will.

hausa: Ainihin manufar ita ce a baiwa waɗancan kamfanoni ikon sarrafa kasuwannin su; duk magana ce ta juya kuɗaɗe.
english: The actual purpose is to give those companies more control over their markets; it's all about money spinning.

hausa: Saboda kiran waya kan biyo ta kan intanet, ba ka buƙatar yin amfani da kamfanin waya da ke inda ka ke zama ko inda ka yi tafiya.
english: Because calls are routed over the Internet, you do not need to use a phone company located where you live or where you travel.

hausa: Haka nan babu wata buƙatar cewa ku samu lambar gida daga yankin da ku ke zaune; za ku iya samun haɗin intanet mai tauraron ɗan adam a cikin wilds of Chicken, Alaska kuma ku zaɓi wata lamba da ta ce kuna cikin yanayin Arizona na rana.
english: There is also no requirement that you obtain a local number from the community in which you live; you can obtain a satellite Internet connection in the wilds of Chicken, Alaska and select a number which claims you're in sunny Arizona.

hausa: Sau da yawa, dole ne ka sayi lambar duniya daban wanda zai ba wayoyin PSTN damar kiran ku. Inda lambar ta fito yana kawo bambamci ga mutanen da suke kiranka.
english: Often, you have to buy a global number separately that allows PSTN phones to call you. Where the number is from makes a difference for people calling you.

hausa: Manhajoji masu fasara rubutu a kan lokaci – manhajoji waɗanda suke iya fasara dukkan ɓangarorin rubutu kai tsaye daga wani yare zuwa wani.
english: Real-time text translator apps – applications that are capable of automatically translating whole segments of text from one language into another.

hausa: Wasu daga cikin manahajar da ke wannan rukuni na iya fassarar rubutu a cikin yaren ƙasashe waje akan alamu ko wasu abubuwa a cikin ainihin duniyar lokacin da mai amfani ya nuna waya mai ƙwaƙwalwar zuwa ga abubuwa.
english: Some of the applications in this category can even translate texts in foreign languages on signs or other objects in the real world when the user points the smartphone towards those objects.

hausa: Injunan fassara sun inganta sosai, kuma yanzu sau da yawa suna ba da cikakkiyar fassara ko wacce ba ta kai ba (da kuma ƙarin ƙarancin shirme), amma ya dace a bada kulawa, saboda har yanzu suna iya yin hakan duka ba daidai ba.
english: The translation engines have improved dramatically, and now often give more or less correct translations (and more seldom gibberish), but some care is due, as they still may have gotten it all wrong.

hausa: Ɗaya daga cikin manhaja mafi shahara a wannan rukuni shine Google Translate, wanda ke bada damar fasara babu internet bayan ka sauke bayanan yaren wanda aka fi so.
english: One of the most prominent apps in this category is Google Translate, which allows offline translation after downloading the desired language data.

hausa: Amfani da manhajar GPS a kan wayar ka ta hannu zai iya kasancewa hanya mafi sauƙi da daɗin gane inda kake yayin da ka fita daga ƙasar ku.
english: Using GPS navigation apps on your smartphone can be the easiest and most convenient way to navigate when out of your home country.

hausa: Zai iya adana kuɗi akan siyan sabbin taswira don GPS, ko na'urar GPS mai zaman kanta ko yin haya daga kamfanin haya na mota.
english: It can save money over buying new maps for a GPS, or a standalone GPS device or renting one from a car rental company.

hausa: Idan baka da kuɗin hawa yanar gizo a wayarka, ko ka yi nisa da network, ayyukansu zai iya zama taƙaitacce ko baya samuwa.
english: If you don't have a data connection for your phone, or when it is out of range, their performance can be limited or unavailable.

hausa: Kowane kantin kusurwa yana cike da tulin katunan wayar da aka riga aka biya mai rikitarwa waɗanda za'a iya amfani dasu daga wayoyin biya ko kuma wayoyin talakawa.
english: Every corner store is filled with a confusing array of pre-paid phone cards that can be used from pay phones or ordinary telephones.

hausa: Yayin da galibin kati yake da kyau don kira zuwa ko ina, wasu kuma sun ƙware wajen bayar da rangwamen kiran ga wasu zaɓaɓɓun ƙasashen duniya.
english: While most cards are good for calling anywhere, some specialise in providing favourable call rates to specific groups of countries.

hausa: Samun dama ga waɗannan ayyukan galibi ta hanyar lambar tarho kyauta ce wanda za a iya kira daga yawancin wayoyi ba tare da caji ba.
english: Access to these services is often through a toll-free telephone number that can be called from most phones without charge.

hausa: Ana amfani da dokokin ɗaukar hoto na yau da kullum a wajen ɗaukar bidiyo, wataƙila ma fiye da hakan.
english: Rules regarding regular photography also apply to video recording, possibly even more so.

hausa: Idan kawai ba'a yarda a ɗauki hoton wani abu ba, to kada ma ka ma yi tunanin yin rikodin bidiyo ɗinsa.
english: If just taking a photo of something isn't allowed, then you shouldn't even think of recording a video of it.

hausa: Idan ana amfani da nau’rar hoto na jirgi, a lura da kyau akan abubuwan da aka yarda da ɗaukar hoton su da kuma me akwai izini ko ana buƙatan ƙarin lasisi.
english: If using a drone, check well in advance as to what you are allowed to film and what permits or additional licensing are required.

hausa: Shawagi da jirgi mai sarrafa kansa kusa da filin jiragen sama ko a saman taron jama’a kusan dabara marar kyau ce, ko da ma bai ci karo da doka ba a yankin ku.
english: Flying a drone near an airport or over a crowd is almost always a bad idea, even if it's not illegal in your area.

hausa: Kwanakin nan ba a cika sayen tikitin jirgin sama kai tsaye ta hanyar kamfanin jiragen ba tare da an fara yin bincike da kuma kwatanta farashin ba.
english: Nowadays air travel is only rarely booked directly through the airline without first searching and comparing prices.

hausa: Wani lokacin tafiyar jirgin sama ɗaya na iya samun farashi da suka bambanta sosai a wasu masu tarawa kuma ya dace a kwatanta sakamakon bincike a kuma duba shafin yanar gizo na kamfanin jirgin sama da kansa kafin biyan kuɗi.
english: Sometimes the same flight can have vastly differing prices at various agregators and it pays to compare search results and to also look at the website of the airline itself before booking.

hausa: Yayin da ba lalle ne ka buƙaci biza don taƙaitattun ziyarar zuwa wasu ƙasashe a matsayin ɗan yawon shaƙatawa ko kasuwanci ba, tafiya can a matsayin ɗalibi na ƙasa da ƙasa yana buƙatar zama na dogon lokaci fiye da zuwa can kawai a matsayin ɗan yawon buɗe ido.
english: While you may not need a visa for short visits to certain countries as a tourist or for business, going there as an international student generally requires a longer stay than going there just as a casual tourist.

hausa: Gabaɗaya, kasancewa a kowace ƙasar waje na tsawan lokaci na buƙatar ku sami takardar izini a gaba.
english: In general, staying in any foreign country for an extended period of time will require you to obtain a visa in advance.

hausa: Bizar ɗalibi gaba ɗaya suna da abubuwan da a ke buƙatu da hanyoyin neman bizar da suka bambanta da bizar da aka saba ta yawon shaƙatawa ko kasuwanci.
english: Student visas generally have different requirements and application procedures from normal tourist or business visas.

hausa: A mafin yawancin ƙasashe, kana buƙatar takardar shiga daga cibiyar da kake neman yin karatu tare da shaidar yawan kuɗi wanda zai taimaka maka wajen gudanar da karatun na aƙalla shekarar farko.
english: For most countries, you will need an offer letter from the institution you wish to study at, and also evidence of funds to support yourself for at least the first year of your course.

hausa: Duba da cibiyoyin, tare da sashen jami'in shige da fice na ƙasar da kake neman yin karatu domin samun cikaken ƙa’idoji.
english: Check with the institution, as well as the immigration department for the country you wish to study in for detailed requirements.

hausa: Saidai idan kai ma’aikacin diflomasiya ne, gaba ɗaya yin aiki a ƙasashen waje na nufin sai ka bayar da bayanan haraji na kuɗaɗen shigarka a ƙasar da kake zaune.
english: Unless you are a diplomat, working overseas generally means that you will have to file income tax in the country you are based in.

hausa: Harajin kuɗin shiga an tsara su daban a cikin ƙasashe daban-daban, kuma ƙimar haraji da takunkumi sun bambanta sosai daga ƙasa zuwa ƙasa.
english: Income tax is structured differently in different countries, and the tax rates and brackets vary widely from one country to another.

hausa: A wasu ƙasashe na tarayya, kamar Amurka da Kanada, ana karɓar harajin samun kuɗaɗe a matakin tarayya da na ƙananan hukumomi, don haka ƙimar kuɗi da takunkumi na iya bambanta daga yanki zuwa yanki.
english: In some federal countries, such as the United States and Canada, income tax is levied both at the federal level and at the local level, so the rates and brackets can vary from region to region.

hausa: Duk da yake rajistar shige da fice yawanci baya nan ko wani tsarin idan ka isa ƙasarka, ikon kwastam na iya zama matsala.
english: While immigration check is usually absent or a formality when you arrive in your homeland, customs control can be a hassle.

hausa: Tabbatar kun san abin da zaku iya shigowa da shi da wanda ba za ku iya shigowa dashi ciki ba kuma zayyana komai sama da iyakar doka.
english: Make sure you know what you can and cannot bring in and declare anything over the legal limits.

hausa: Hanya mafi sauƙi don fara harkar rubuta labarin tafiye-tafiye shi ne ta fitar da ƙwarewar ku akan wani shafin yanar-gizo na blog na tafiya da aka samar.
english: The easiest way to get started in the business of travel writing is to hone your skills on an established travel blog website.

hausa: Bayan kun sami kwanciyar hankali da tsarawa da yin gyara akan yanar gizo, sannan daga baya, kuna iya ƙirƙirar gidan yanar gizonku.
english: After you become comfortable with formatting and editing on the web, then later, you might create your own website.

hausa: Sadaukarwar sa-kai yayin da a ke tafiya babbar hanya ce ta kawo canji amma ba kawai batun bayarwa ba ne.
english: Volunteering while travelling is a great way to make a difference but it's not just about giving.

hausa: Rayuwa da sadaukarwar sa-kai a ƙasar waje babbar hanya ce ta sanin wata al’ada ta daban, haɗuwa da sabbin mutane, sanin kanka, samun fahimtar hangen nesa har ma da samun sabbin dabaru.
english: Living and volunteering in a foreign country is a great way to get to know a different culture, meet new people, learn about yourself, get a sense of perspective and even gain new skills.

hausa: Yana iya zama hanya mai kyau na shimfiɗa kasafin kuɗi domin ba da izinin zama mai tsayi a wani wuri tunda yawancin aikin sa kai na ba da ɗaki da ɗaukan nauyi da kuma ƙadan suna biyan ƙanƙanin albashi.
english: It can also be a good way to stretch a budget to allow a longer stay somewhere since many volunteer jobs provide room and board and a few pay a small salary.

hausa: Vikings sun yi amfani da mashigan ruwa na Rasha don kaiwa tekun Black Sea da Tekun Caspian. Har yanzu ana iya amfani da sassa na waɗannan hanyoyi. Binciki yiwuwar samun izini na musamman, wanda samun shi zai iya yin wahala.
english: Vikings used the Russian waterways to get to the Black Sea and Caspian Sea. Parts of these routes can still be used. Check possible need for special permits, which may be difficult to get.

hausa: Madatsar ruwa ta Tekun Baltic ta haɗa Tekun Arctic zuwa Kogin Baltic, ta cikin Tabkin Onega, Tabkin Ladoga da Saint Petersburg, yawanci ta ƙoramu ko tafkuna.
