english: The White Sea–Baltic Canal connects the Arctic Ocean to the Baltic Sea, via Lake Onega, Lake Ladoga and Saint Petersburg, mostly by rivers and lakes.

hausa: Lake Onega yana da haɗi kuma da Volga, saboda haka zuwa daga Tekun Caspian ta hanyar Rasha har yanzu yana yiwuwa.
english: Lake Onega is also connected to Volga, so coming from the Caspian Sea through Russia is still possible.

hausa: Ku tabbatar cewa da zarar kun isa Marinas komai zai zama a bayyane. Za ku haɗu da wasu masu satar jirgin ruwa kuma za su raba bayanansu tare da ku.
english: Be assured that once you hit the marinas everything will be pretty obvious. You will meet other boat hitchhikers and they will share their information with you.

hausa: Mafi muhimmanci za ka iya sanya sanarwar bayar da taimakon ku, yin tattaki a tashoshin jiragen ruwa, kusantar mutane da ke tsabtace jirgin ruwan su, ƙoƙarin yin hulɗa da masu jirgin ruwa a mashayar, da dai sauransu.
english: Basically you'll be putting up notices offering your help, pacing the docks, approaching people cleaning their yachts, trying to make contact with sailors in the bar, etc.

hausa: Yi ƙoƙarin magana da mutane da dama. Bayan ɗan lokaci kowa zai san ka kuma za a baka labari akan kwale-kwalen da ke neman wani.
english: Try to talk to as many people as possible. After a while everyone will know you and will give you hints as to which boat is looking for someone.

hausa: Ya kamata ku zaɓi kamfanin jirgin saman ku na yau da kullun a cikin ƙawance a hankali.
english: You should choose your Frequent Flyer airline in an alliance carefully.

hausa: Duk da cewa zaka iya tunani zai jawo ka wajen shiga jirgin da aka fi hawa, abun lura shine sanin cewa gatar da aka bayar wa sun bambanta kuma karamci na mai shaidar hawa akai-akai na iya bambanta a wani jirgi dake kawance daya.
english: Although you may think it is intuitive to join the airline you fly most, you should be aware that privileges offered are often different and frequent flyer points may be more generous under a different airline in the same alliance.

hausa: Jiragen sama kamar su Emirates, Etihad Airways, Qatar Airways da Turkish Airlines sun ƙara faɗaɗa ayyukansu zuwa Afirka, kuma suna ba da sadarwa zuwa manyan biranen Afirka da dama a farashi mai rahusa fiye da sauran kamfanonin jiragen sama na Turai.
english: Airlines such as Emirates, Etihad Airways, Qatar Airways & Turkish Airlines have greatly expanded their services to Africa, and offer connections to many major African cities at competitive rates than other European airlines.

hausa: Kamfanin Jiragen Saman Turkiya yana tashi zuwa wurare 39 a cikin kasashen Afirka 30 daga shekarar 2014.
english: Turkish Airlines flies to 39 destinations in 30 African countries as of 2014.

hausa: Idan kuna da ƙarin lokacin tafiya, ku duba ku ga yadda jimillar farashinku na zuwa Afirka yake in an kwatanta farashin zagayen-duniya.
english: If you have additional travel time, check to see how your total fare quote to Africa compares with a round-the-world fare.

hausa: Kar a manta da ƙara ƙarin farashin ƙarin visa a ciki, harajin tashi, jigilar ƙasa, da sauransu. don dukkanin wuraren da ke wajen Afirka.
english: Don't forget to add in the extra costs of additional visas, departure taxes, ground transportation, etc. for all those places outside of Africa.

hausa: Idan kana son zagaye duniya gaba ɗaya a jirgi a sashen Kudancin duniya, zaɓin tashin jirage da wuraren zuwansu a takaice yake saboda rashin hanyoyin da ke bi ta cikin teku.
english: If you want to fly around the world completely in the Southern Hemisphere, the choice of flights and destinations is limited due to the lack of transoceanic routes.

hausa: Babu wani haɗin gwiwar kamfanin jiragen sama da ke ratsa tekuna uku da ke sashen kudancin duniya (kamfanin sky team basa bin layi ko guda a ciki)
english: No airline alliance covers all three ocean crossings in the Southern Hemisphere (and SkyTeam covers none of the crossings).

hausa: Duk da haka, Star Alliance ta rufe komai banda gabashin Kudancin Pacific daga Santiago de Chile zuwa Tahiti, wanda jirgin LATAM Oneworld ne.
english: However, Star Alliance covers everything except the eastern South Pacific from Santiago de Chile to Tahiti, which is a LATAM Oneworld flight.

hausa: Wannan jirgi ba shi ne kaɗai zaɓi ba idan kana so ka tsallake South Pacific da yankin bakin teku na America ta yamma. (duba kasa).
english: This flight is not the only option if you want to skip the South Pacific and the west coast of South America. (see below)

hausa: A 1994, yankin ɓagarencin Armenian Nagorno-Karabakh na yankin Azerbaijan ta ja yaƙi da Azeris.
english: In 1994, the ethnically Armenian Nagorno-Karabakh region of Azerbaijan waged war against the Azeris.

hausa: Tare da taimakon Armenia, an kafa wata sabuwar jamhuriya. Ko da yake, babu wata daga cikin ƙasashen duniya da suka kafu - hatta ita Armenian kanta - ta amince da wanzuwar ta.
english: With Armenian backing, a new republic was created. However, no established nation - not even Armenia - officially recognizes it.

hausa: Muhawarar diflomasiya akan yankin ta cigaba da dagula dangantaka tsakanin Armenia da Azerbaijan.
english: Diplomatic arguments over the region continue to mar relations between Armenia and Azerbaijan.

hausa: Gundumar Canal (Dutch: Grachtengordel) shahararriyar gunduma ce ta ƙarnin 17 da ke kewaye da Binnenstad na Amsterdam.
english: The Canal District (Dutch: Grachtengordel) is the famous 17th-century district surrounding the Binnenstad of Amsterdam.

hausa: An naɗa gaba ɗayan gundumar a matsayin wani Wurin Gado na Duniya na UNESCO don darajar al'ada da kuma tarihin shi na musamman, da kuma darajojin kadararsa suna daga cikin mafi girma na ƙasar.
english: The whole district is designated as a UNESCO World Heritage Site for its unique cultural and historical value, and its property values are among the highest of the country.

hausa: Cinque Terre, wanda ke nufin Filaye Biyar, ya ƙunshi ƙananan karkara biyar na bakin teku na Riomaggiore, Manarola, Corniglia, Vernazza da Monterosso waɗanda ke ,mmcikin yankin Liguria na Italiya.*
english: Cinque Terre, which means Five Lands, comprises the five small coastal villages of Riomaggiore, Manarola, Corniglia, Vernazza and Monterosso located in the Italian region of Liguria.

hausa: Su na cikin jerin sunayen wuraren tarihi na duniya na UNESCO.
english: They are listed on the UNESCO World Heritage List.

hausa: A ƙarnuka da suka shuɗe, mutane sun gina farfajiyoyi a kan manyan tsaunukan da suka kai har zuwa ƙwalƙolin duwatsun da ke ƙetare tekun.
english: Over the centuries, people have carefully built terraces on the rugged, steep landscape right up to the cliffs that overlook the sea.

hausa: Babban abin sha’awar shine rashin alama kururu ta zamanantarwa. Hanyoyi, jiragen ƙasa da kwale-kwale na haɗa ƙauyukan, kuma motoci ba za su iya kaiwa can daga waje ba.
english: Part of its charm is the lack of visible corporate development. Paths, trains and boats connect the villages, and cars cannot reach them from the outside.

hausa: Nau'o'in Faransanci waɗanda ake magana dasu a Belgium da Switzerland sun ɗan bambanta da Faransancin da ake magana dasu a Faransa, kodayake suna kama da juna sosai da za'a iya fahimtar juna.
english: The varieties of French which are spoken in Belgium and Switzerland differ slightly from the French spoken in France, though they are similar enough to be mutually intelligible.

hausa: Musamman, tsarin ƙirga lambobi a wajen waɗanda ke yaren faransanci na ƙasar Belgium da Switzerland na da ɗan banbanci na daban da yaren faransanci da ake magana da shi a Faransa,kuma yadda ake furta wasu kalmomin ya sha bambam.
english: In particular, the numbering system in French-speaking Belgium and Switzerland has some slight peculiarities that are different from the French spoken in France, and the pronunciation of some words is slightly different.

hausa: Duk da haka, duka ’yan Belgium masu magana da harshen Faransanci kuma da ‘yan Swiss za su zamana sun koyi karbabben Faransanci a makaranta, saboda haka  zasu iya fahimtarka ko da ka yi amfani da tsarin rubuta lambobi na karɓaɓɓen Faransanci.
english: Nevertheless, all French-speaking Belgians and Swiss would have learned standard French in school, so they would be able to understand you even if you used the standard French numbering system.

hausa: A sassa dayawa na duniya, ɗaga hannu alama ce ta abokantaka, mai nuna “sannu.”
english: In many parts of the world, waving is a friendly gesture, indicating "hello."

hausa: Sai dai kuma, a Malaysiya, aƙalla a tsakanin ‘yan kasar da ke yankunan karkara, yana nufin “taho nan.” irin alamar da zaka lanƙwasa yatsan nuni izuwa gangar jiki, wato irin alamar da ake amfani da ita a wasu ƙasashen yamma, kuma ana amfani da ita ne kawai don wannan manufa.
english: However, in Malaysia, at least among the Malays in rural areas, it means "come over," similar to the index finger bent toward the body, a gesture which is used in certain Western countries, and should be used only for that purpose.

hausa: Hakanan, wani matafiyin ɗan Burtaniya a Spaniya na iya kuskuren yin ban kwananɗaga hannu da ya ƙunshi tafin hannunsa na kallon mai ɗaga hannun (maimakon wanda ake ɗagawa hannun) wadda motsi da hannu ne don ka dawo.
english: Similarly, a British traveller in Spain may mistake a wave goodbye involving the palm facing the waver (rather than the person being waved at) as a gesture to come back.

hausa: Harshen taimako wasu harsuna ne mara ainihi ko ginanne da aka ƙirƙira da niyyar sauƙaƙa sadarwa tsakanin mutane waɗanda sukan samun wuyar sadarwa idan ba haka ba.
english: Auxiliary languages are artificial or constructed languages created with the intent of facilitating communication between peoples who would otherwise have difficulty communicating.

hausa: Sun bambanta da yaren ƙasa, waɗanda ke asalin yare ko asalin halitta waɗanda suka zama rinjaye saboda dalili ɗaya ko wani dalilin akan hanyar sadarwa a tsakanin masu magana da wasu yarukan.
english: They are separate from lingua francas, which are natural or organic languages that become dominant for one reason or another as means of communication between speakers of other languages.

hausa: A zafin rana na yini, matafiya na iya ganin haske masu kamannin ruwa daga nesa (ko wasu abubuwa dabam).
english: In the heat of the day, travelers can experience mirages that give the illusion of water (or other things).

hausa: Waɗannan kan iya zama masu haɗari idan matafiyin ya bi hasken, yana hasarar kuzari da ragowar ruwa a banza.
english: These can be dangerous if the traveler pursue the mirage, wasting precious energy and remaining water.

hausa: Ko mafi zafin hamada na iya zama da matsanancin sanyi a cikin dare. Hypothermia babban haɗari ne idan babu sutura mai bada ɗumi ba.
english: Even the hottest of deserts can become extremely cold at night. Hypothermia is a real risk without warm clothing.

hausa: A lokacin rani, musamman, akwai buƙatar lura da sauro idan kun yanke shawarar yin tattakin kan dutse a daji mai ruwan sama.
english: In summer, especially, you'll need to watch out for mosquitoes if you decide to hike through the rainforest.

hausa: Ko da kana tuƙi ta cikin dajin yanki mai yanayin ruwan sama sosai, daƙiƙa kaɗan da ƙofofi a buɗe yayin da ku ke shiga cikin motar ya isa lokacin da sauro zai shiga motar tare da ku.
english: Even if you're driving through the subtropical rainforest, a few seconds with the doors open while you get inside the vehicle is enough time for mosquitoes to get in the vehicle with you.

hausa: Murar tsuntsaye, ko kuma avian influenza, na iya kama duka tsuntsaye da dabbobi masu shayarwa.
english: Bird flu, or more formally avian influenza, can infect both birds and mammals.

hausa: An ba da rahoton samun matsalan ga ƙasa da dubu guda a jikin mutane, amma wasu daga ciki sun kasance masu tsanani.
english: Fewer than a thousand cases have ever been reported in humans, but some of them have been fatal.

hausa: Yawanci an saka mutane masu aikin kiwon kaji ne, amma kuma akwai haɗari ga masu lura da tsuntsaye.
english: Most have involved people who work with poultry, but there is also some risk to birdwatchers.

hausa: Abun daya shahara game da ƙasar Norway shine ƙoramu masu tsayi da kwari da tsibiri dake sauka kan ƙasa mara tudu.
english: Typical for Norway are steep fjords and valleys that suddenly give way to a high, more or less even plateau.

hausa: Waɗannan duwatsu masu faɗi galibi ana kiransu da “vidde” ma'ana, buɗaɗɗen itace mai faɗi, sarari mara iyaka.
english: These plateaus are often referred to as "vidde" meaning a wide, open treeless space, a boundless expanse.

hausa: A Rogaland da Agder yawancin ana kiransu “hei” ma'ana wani tsiro mara bishiya da ke buɗaɗɗen daji mai cike da ciyayi.
english: In Rogaland and Agder they are usually called "hei" meaning a treeless moorland often covered in heather.

hausa: Gilashin kankara ba su da ƙarfi, amma suna gangarowa daga dutsen. Wannan zai haifar da tsagewa, gurabe, wanda gadoji na dusar ƙanƙara ke iya rufe shi.
english: The glaciers are not stable, but flow down the mountain. This will cause cracks, crevasses, which may be obscured by snow bridges.

hausa: Bango da rufi na kogunan ƙanƙara na iya rushewa kuma akan iya rufe tsaga.
english: The walls and roofs of ice caves can collapse and cracks can get closed.

hausa: A kusuruwar gilashin ƙanƙarar sai wasu manyan daskararru suka zame, suka faɗi ƙasa kuma wataƙila ma suka yi tsalle ko suka barbazu daga kusurwar.
english: At the edge of glaciers huge blocks break loose, fall down and perhaps jump or roll farther from the edge.

hausa: Kakar yawon shakatawa a tasoshin kan tuddu yawancin bunƙasarta shine a lokacin bazara ta Indiya.
english: The tourist season for the hill stations generally peaks during the Indian summer.

hausa: Sai dai kuma, suna da wasu nau'ikan kyau da ɗaukar ido lokacin hunturu, yayin da yawancin tasoshin kan tudu su ke samun yawan dusar ƙanƙara kuma su ke samar da wasanni irin su gudun kan ƙanƙara da zarmiyar kan ƙanƙara.
english: However, they have a different kind of beauty and charm during winter, with many hill stations receiving healthy amounts of snow and offering activities such as skiing and snowboarding.

hausa: Kamfanonin jiragen sama kaɗan ne kawai ke ba da kuɗin tafiya makoki, waɗanda ke ɗan rage farashin tafiya na jana'iza na ƙarshe.
english: Only a few airlines still offer bereavement fares, which slightly discount the cost of last-minute funeral travel.

hausa: Kamfanonin zirga-zirgar jiragen sama da ke samar da wannan sun haɗa da Air Canada, Delta Air Lines, Lufthansa don jiragen da ke tashi daga Amurka ko Canada, da kuma WestJet.
english: Airlines that offer these include Air Canada, Delta Air Lines, Lufthansa for flights originating from the U.S. or Canada, and WestJet.

hausa: A ko wace hali, dole sai kun siya tiketi da waya kai tsaye daga kamfanin jirgin saman.
english: In all cases, you must book by phone directly with the airline.
